proposals.title: Refund Support for Film Ode to Skate with 0,253ETH -  U$1000
proposals.body:
"Coverage $1000 of the short film production, which was shot in January and February, as well as a support for the final day of the project, which includes the photos + fashion film for the Ode to Skate, to be carried out on March 31st."
 
![unnamed (6).jpg](ipfs://bafybeidomwihw5dj2q4baknyvvuelqchhrxa3hnihui7ytwhonjtcdz6ke)

 
![unnamed (12).jpg](ipfs://bafybeibtdu5k32lqjd3vytnvjdv36nmoo5n4xxbzusfelgcqwpufdlwc7a)

 
![WhatsApp Image 2024-01-22 at 15.55.36.jpeg](ipfs://bafybeia5e7dkvcuw5ge6kmo62y7wzwtx3qib2anu62twj3wvdprym6dlzm)

![unnamed.jpg](ipfs://bafybeif7n5zuzrg4zdy33zfoqorirnekpyggrijws74oti2bjrrlv2xv6m)
    
    
## Introduction
The "Ode to Skate" project, conceived by Carolina Cristine, a photographer, began in 2021 as a photo project and evolved into the production of a short film in 2023. All scenes were independently recorded in that same year, but the project was not completed. Now, in 2024, we are resuming efforts to fulfill this dream and record the Ode for the second time from scratch.

Through a film, photographs, art, classical painting, street art (pixo), music, and narratives, "Ode to Skate" aims to reveal the challenges and love present in the skateboarding scene, encouraging discussions and exploring various other areas of life, connecting them to the skateboarding universe. In the future, we plan a grand launch event, including Best Trick, a photo exhibition, a party with the musicians who created the music and soundtrack, and the premiere of the short film.

Currently, we are in the process of developing the photos and the film, which explores profound themes such as freedom, work, desire, childhood, speech, art, introspection, community, expectation, and frustration. This film delves into the skateboarding universe in a unique way, bringing to light the complexities of growth and the quest for a connection with our inner child.

## Synopsis
"Ode to Skate" delves into the emotional journey of a skateboarder named Gui, who faces the challenges inherent in the process of growth. The film addresses themes such as the Peter Pan syndrome, anxiety, and the struggle against expectations that can lead to frustration. Gui, our protagonist, finds himself confronted with the responsibilities of adulthood while trying to balance his work and his passion for skateboarding. Throughout the journey, he discovers the importance of community and authenticity, with friends playing crucial roles in his transformation. The film celebrates life, art, freedom, and the quest for true essence.

The film aims to immerse itself in the world of skateboarding, classical painting, street art (pixo), emotional journey, and community, delivering a compelling narrative that critiques the current skateboarding scene and market.

In addition to the short film, we are exploring other forms of expression, such as photography. It was through photography that Carolina, the mind behind the project, after a year of capturing unpublished images, came up with the idea of telling the story in a more dynamic way. Over these nearly 3 years, we have conducted various experiments and documented them all, concluding with the final photo session set to take place in the coming days. We are also involved in music, with Pedro producing the film's soundtrack, and we are recording a song performed by Guilherme Alves, Romero, and Janvi, three skateboarders from the cast. We are also exploring classical painting and pixo with Romero and MIA. Additionally, we are delving into art and fashion, already customizing the protagonist's clothing. The idea is to develop more clothing pieces and then head to a photography studio for the final project records.

## Objetive
**Immediate Goal:**

* Clearing outstanding payments in the short film production
* Production of art on clothing pieces. 
* Photo session to be held on March 31st."

## Production Details:

Recording Dates:  21 e 22/01,  26 e 27/02 e 31/03.
Location: São Paulo, Brazil.
Team Involved: 30 technical staff and 75 cast members.

## Production Costs:

Food: $ 500
Transportation: $ 300
Equipment + Clothing + Art: $200

**Estimated Total: $1,000**

(The costs are mainly focused on food and transportation, considering the size of the team and cast. Currently, we are conducting a raffle with the goal of raising funds to expand our ideas and go further with the project.)

**Resources Obtained Through Support:**

Online Raffle: $200
Filming Equipment
Audio Capture Equipment
Van for Equipment

## Future Goal Expected for August 2024:

* Best Trick
* Artistic Interventions
* March
* Photo Exhibition
* Film Premiere
* Launch Party with Ode Musicians

### Established Partnerships

Collaboration with audiovisual team, skate professionals, and digital magazines, including Black Media, Flanantes, and Brit's.

### Support Opportunity:

We are seeking financial support to cover the costs of team food and transportation on filming and photo days.

### Offered Counterpart to Brands:

- Visibility associated with a creative and innovative project.
- Social commitment, supporting community, art, and culture.
- Recognition in front of a diverse and engaged audience.
- Story posts.
- Video of Skaters with Nouns' skateboard deck for digital media.

Main and Supporting Skateboarders participating in the project acquired the Nouns shape, during the day of productions to produce media content (photo and video) for dissemination on Gnars/Nouns social networks and for people who watch the participants' videos to awaken curiosity about the shape of Nouns glasses, bringing visibility and publicity about Nouns, and encouraging more people to join the community.
"The video will be made by Gnars athlete, Pedro Nem (nemdabel) who is already part of it and is responsible."",

## Proposal Costs:

| -------- | ----- | 
| Food     | **$500**  | 
|Transport | **$300** |
| Equipment Clothing Pieces Art | **$200** |
|Estimated Total: | **$1000** | 0.253 ETH Today

proposals.body:
### Davin's Notes:
Really want to thank Josh and Trevor for being patient with us as we go through the gnars political cycle to resolve some underlying issues in our DAO. Expect a final proposal from Vlad to make it official that we now only give away 1 Gnar per Shredder.

## Introduction
This counter counter -proposal is designed to ensure the onboarding of Josh Lippi and Trevor Banta is made Clear with the standardized practices of Gnars DAO. In keeping with our commitment to fairness and consistency, this proposal over writes the 2 other Proposals which both got over 80+% support from voters

## Background

This proposal provides clarity from the two "successful" proposals which are:
1. https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x3dcb9566427c72d318242451eac0e8e37ec338f63c4813ffcbf9cffc7603f188 (FOR - 85%, AGAINST - 14.95%)

## Proposal Details

Allocation:
Allocate 1 Gnar NFT to Josh Lippi (joshlippi.eth)
Allocate 1 Gnar NFT to Trevor Banta (errorgardener.eth)

NFT Selection:
Trevor’s Choice - Gnar #3157
Josh’s Choice - Gnar #3857

Transaction Details:
The NFT transfer will be executed from the Gnars Multisig wallet, with transaction details to be confirmed and signed off by authorized DAO members.

## Conclusion
This Proposal supersedes all previous proposal to break the mould and usher in a new day for Gnars. Keep Shredding.

proposals.title: Counter-Proposal: Standardized Onboarding of Josh Lippi and Trevor Banta
proposals.body:
### **Introduction**
This counter-proposal is designed to ensure the onboarding of Josh Lippi and Trevor Banta aligns with the standardized practices of Gnars DAO. In keeping with our commitment to fairness and consistency, this approach respects the diversity of how members join our community, whether through purchase or other means.

### **Background**
The original proposal suggested allocating 2 Gnar NFTs each to Josh Lippi and Trevor Banta, which diverges from our standard onboarding procedure. In the interest of maintaining a balanced and equitable approach, especially considering that some community members acquire Gnars through purchase or other individual efforts, it is important to standardize NFT allocations. This ensures that each member, regardless of their entry method, is welcomed equally.

### **Proposal Details**

1. **Allocation Adjustment:** 
   - Allocate 1 Gnar NFT to Josh Lippi (joshlippi.eth)
   - Allocate 1 Gnar NFT to Trevor Banta (errorgardener.eth)

2. **NFT Selection:**
   - The specific Gnar NFTs to be allocated will be chosen based on availability and relevance, ensuring a meaningful and representative selection for both new members.

As the specific Gnar NFTs intended for allocation to Josh Lippi and Trevor Banta were not specified in the previous proposal, nor have they been pre-determined by the Gnars Community, I propose a collaborative and transparent approach to this process. To ensure fairness and community involvement, it is suggested that the proposers present their preferred Gnar NFT choices to the Community Pod. This will allow for an internal voting mechanism as a palliative measure.

The available Gnars for selection can be viewed at this link. This step will provide an opportunity for community members to have a say in the allocation process, ensuring that the NFTs chosen are in alignment with community interests and values.

This approach not only maintains transparency in the onboarding process but also reinforces the communal spirit of Gnars DAO by involving members in key decisions. It reflects our commitment to fairness and inclusivity, ensuring that all members, particularly new ones, feel valued and integrated into our community.

3. **Transaction Details:**
   - The NFT transfer will be executed from the Gnars Multisig wallet, with transaction details to be confirmed and signed off by authorized DAO members.

### **Justification for Counter-Proposal**
This counter-proposal is justified by the need for a fair and consistent onboarding process. Given that Gnars are acquired by community members in various ways, including purchase, it is essential to avoid arbitrary allocations of multiple NFTs to certain individuals. This ensures that every new member, regardless of their background or contributions, is welcomed on an equal footing, maintaining the integrity and egalitarian ethos of the Gnars community.

### **Conclusion**
We encourage the Gnars community to support this counter-proposal, which aligns with our standard onboarding practices and upholds the principles of fairness and consistency in welcoming new members.

proposals.title: Petition for Enhancing Fairness and Decentralizing Decision-Making in GNARs DAO Governance
proposals.body:
#### TL;DR:

Petition for our biggest holder and founder to temporarily adjust their participation in the GNARs DAO's decision-making process. 

### **Introduction**:
GNARs DAO currently faces a challenge with the concentration of voting power in the hands of its largest holder. This situation has implications for the diversity and fairness of decision-making within our community. Our proposal seeks to introduce temporary measures to mitigate this issue, fostering a more balanced governance structure until we can achieve a better token distribution and enhance governance engagement.

### **Problem Statement**:
For onChain proposals
The dominant voting power of the largest holder in GNARs DAO discourages participation from smaller holders, particularly due to the financial burden of gas fees associated with Ethereum-based contract voting. This diminishes the active involvement of a significant portion of our community in the governance process. Once a small holder will wait to decide if its worth to spend their money according with the biggest holder vote. With the current holders engagement a vote turnout against the biggest holder becomes almost impossible and it never occurred so far.

> #### "Yes, I will vote if I find a window of cheap gas after that big holder votes" 

**In general** 
A significant concentration of voting power in the hands of the largest holder poses a challenge to the decentralized decision making sold by our brand.


**Possible Proposed Solutions**:
1. **Voluntary Voting Pause by the Largest Holder**: A temporary cessation of voting by the largest holder is proposed to allow for a more evenly distributed decision-making process. This measure will remain in effect until a more balanced token distribution is established.
   or
2. **Establishment of a Delegation Program**: To encourage wider participation and offset the impact of Ethereum gas costs, a delegation program will enable the largest holder to distribute their voting power among a broader group of community members.


### **Implementation Plan**:
- The Voluntary Voting Pause will involve a commitment from the largest holder, with a timeline synchronized with key milestones towards achieving equitable token distribution.
- The Delegation Program requires a framework that ensures fair and transparent delegation processes.


### **Impact Analysis**:
- The Voluntary Voting Pause will immediately address the current imbalance and pave the way for more democratic participation.
- The Delegation Program aims to mitigate the financial barriers to voting, encouraging broader community involvement.


### **Conclusion**:
This proposal introduces temporary measures aimed at realigning the governance dynamics of GNARs DAO to be more inclusive and representative. Our goal is to create a governance environment that reflects the diversity and collective strength of our community until a more permanent solution can be established.

### **Call to Action**:
We invite the members of the GNARs DAO community to engage in discussions around this proposal, offer insights, and contribute to refining these ideas. Your involvement is vital in shaping a governance structure that is truly reflective of our community's collective voice.

proposals.body:
> Vlad Note: 
> I met Karao7a 5 years ago because of Mimpi Film Festival. He was, like me, one of the judges of the curatorship of the biggest Skate Film Festival or Latin America. Everything that came from his camera, mouse or hands was always impressive. His skills as skater, artist, videomaker, video editor, magazine diretor and salesman are for sure a great adition to the Dao and definetelly a lot of authencity from our part.

Elevate [@fatherfiger](https://www.instagram.com/fatherfiger/) - Grady Moquin
---


Grady Moquin is a 30 year old skateboarder from Minnesota. He is a friend of [@web-gnar](https://www.gnars.wtf/dao/proposals/11). He was recently attacked in a bar where his jaw was broken. His jaw is wired shut and he can not work for 2 months. This man does not come from money and his folks have created a Go-Fund-Me to help them take care of Grady. Grady rips at skateboarding and works a full time job to support his life.

The dude is between a rock and a hard spot and needs a fresh start. 

This proposal aims to make  Gnars Dao a donor to his Go Fund Me,  involving @web-gnar making a Go-Fund-Me account with the name: GNARS DAO. The funds would be sent to @web-gnar-- who would then, send them to Grady's Go-Fund-Me.


---
Proposal for Gnars Dao to aid him with 600 USD, and become the top donor in his Go-Fund-Me. 
---

### [GoFund Me Link](https://www.gofundme.com/f/grady-moquin-extremely-difficult-next-few-months?utm_campaign=p_cp+share-sheet&utm_medium=copy_link_all&utm_source=customer)

![Screenshot 2023-12-03 at 3.00.14 PM](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmZ2vxYwY1cfPaSSXERGnLQ1n4MfEQMS1ygVmQGwCKRim1?pinataGatewayToken=nxHSFa1jQsiF7IHeXWH-gXCY3LDLlZ7Run3aZXZc8DRCfQz4J4a94z9DmVftXyFE)

> As some of you may know Grady was recently part of a terrible and unjustifiable incident that took place at [Skardas bar](https://www.google.com/maps/place/Skarda's+Bar/@44.9250091,-93.1306714,3a,48.6y,125.41h,85.65t/data=!3m6!1e1!3m4!1sdNxo987rmZjsNY2jfeMEiA!2e0!7i16384!8i8192!4m7!3m6!1s0x87f62afb837d15ad:0x794dc017682ee687!8m2!3d44.924874!4d-93.1304755!10e5!16s%2Fg%2F1hc1pgyh9?entry=ttu) this past week. Long story short, we all were playing pool and Grady was asking this guy to move so we could finish the game. He didnt seem to want to listen so Grady told him again, which after that, things got a little heated and he decided to mock Grady saying the "n-word" as well(keep in mind he is caucasian and was mocking Grady) So we decided to grab the bartender to get him kicked out due to his hostility and racial unnecessary slurs. This is where it gets worse. This guy and Skardas were going back and forth he found time to sucker punch Grady in the face. GRADY was then taken to regions hospital on the 26th of November where he found out his jaw was broken in 2 places and would be needing surgery immediately. His insurance had just expired so he wouldn't be getting any help there… fast forward to now. Unfortunately his mouth is completely wired shut and Grady is out of work for 6 weeks to 2 months. I am asking for help with Gradys new liquid diet, Rent, along with some medical bills that will be stacking up. Anything would help. Especially when your everyday life changes so quick. Also I want to say thank you to everyone that has already helped and to anyone that decides to help❤️ Grady deserves to be worry free as he undergoes these next few stressful, hard months.

proposals.title: Jasper - Moderation Proposal
proposals.body:
## Introduction
This proposal is for a Discord Moderator role for the Gnars DAO community Pod. The individual will be responsible for managing the Discord server, creating messages, making announcements, scheduling pod meetings, ensuring Discord security, and bringing any community issues to the board for voting on resolutions.

## Proof of Nounishness
I am a Gnars holder and voter that has previously served as a moderator in other Discord communities, demonstrating a strong understanding of community management, conflict resolution, and Discord security protocols.

**Other communities worked:**

- Odysee (20k members)

- LBRYFoundation (10k members)

- Carabela (200 members )

- Futster (700 members)

**More recently I helped Vlad to update discord server with the new discord onboard features** :point_down: 

  
 
![image](ipfs://bafkreiawjky3lpt2zylis77estkf5nw2uuyxypwh6wsfvvyrpcixfwimlm)
    
    
    

## Description
The Discord Moderator will be responsible for:

- Managing the Gnars DAO Discord server
- Creating and posting messages and announcements
- Scheduling pod meetings and other events

| Events   | Frequence|
| -------- | -------- | 
| Community Call| Tuesday   
| Governance Call| tbd      
| Community Pod | tbd  |
| **Announcements**|Daily|
| Daily Drops |Daily|
| Nouns Square Twitter Spaces|Weekly

**Available all day for changes and server support**

> Announcements should have its write reviewed by Pod:community 
> Other announcements and demands can be defined by community pod
> Full schedule should be presented after proposal approval

- Ensuring the security of the Discord server
- Bringing any community issues to the board for voting on resolutions
- The individual has a proven track record in community management and has demonstrated a strong understanding of the Gnars DAO community and its values.

## Budget and Deliverables
The budget for this proposal is 0.4 ETH+ 1 Gnars for a period of 4 months. The deliverables will be the successful management of the Gnars DAO Discord server, including the creation of messages and announcements, scheduling of pod meetings, ensuring Discord security, and bringing any community issues to the board for voting on resolutions.


## Conclusion
This proposal aims to ensure the smooth running of the Gnars DAO Discord server, enhancing community engagement and ensuring the security of the platform. The individual proposed for this role has a proven track record in community management and a strong understanding of the Gnars DAO community and its values.

proposals.title: Luiz Hadad (Surfer) | Travel grant proposal: Indonesia | 2 ETH
proposals.body:
![]![](https://i.imgur.com/boT4gbw.png)
This photo reminds of the Wavehead NFT that I got  when joined gnars :)
From my previous surftrip to Fernando de Noronha


![](https://i.imgur.com/pBcFRGo.png)


**TL;DR**

**Travel grant proposal: Surftrip to Indonesia | 2 ETH**

Intro; Highlights from previous sponsorship term; Surtrip proposal to Indonesia; Content production; Use of funds

## **About me**

Aloha guys, I am Luiz Hadad, brazilian, 33 years old, surf since I am a little kid and have been a [Gnars sponsored freesurfer since September 2022](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x4b0fef8be71a1beae3d7d2b31d44ee2df2ca539b36aa66a8221b346f6a713c4a).

My initial goal was to do a prop to renew my sponsorship, but since we're on a transition period and my trip is starting in two weeks, I spoke with @xvlad , @knowhow , @willdias and few other community members and we thought that proposing a travel grant would be the best way to keep building the Shredders Journey.

I've been on the blockchain world since 2017, working as a community builder in different projects, such as  [Cambiatus](https://www.cambiatus.com/) and [SurfHive](https://www.peakd.com/c/hive-141964/created). I also participate as an advisor at [Ethereum Brasil](https://www.ethereumbrasil.com/) and [Play4Change](https://www.play4change.io/).
![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/SyzY79tN3.jpg)
Lucas Rocha (@lrocha94), Myself, Mari (@marinioac), Gibson (@3rdeye_crypto) and Vlad (@xvlad) at the Gnars Session during Ethereum Rio 2023.


When I got into crypto, I was able to have flexible working hours and dedicate myself to my biggest passion: spend time in the ocean chasing swells and surfing big barrels - as you can see on my https://thatsgnar.ly/luizhadad profile.

![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/BJDnC9dun.jpg)
Picture from my last time visiting Macaronis Resort

I am a partner and advisor at [Surfguru](https://www.surfguru.com.br), Brazil's biggest online surfing community and forecast website, with 300k unique users and 2.5M visits per month. I co-lead the web3 movement there with @marinioac and @crisciacm. We recently launched [Surfguru DAO](https://thatsgnar.ly/surfguru) in collab with Thats Gnarly and approved a prop with Gnars [to create educational content, help onboard surfers that can be NFT holders or shredders and raise awareness about Gnars. ](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x9e670758685c096b923e0b9fa65e2e9cd44906983ea78fe73d750d77be7c568c)


In 2022 we launched [SurfHive](https://www.peakd.com/c/hive-141964/created), a community inspired by [SkateHive](https://peakd.com/c/hive-173115/created) (special thanks to Vlad and the SkateHive crew) and [Surflimpo](https://www.cambiatus.com/surflimpo), a social currency that incentivize people [taking care of the oceans and participating in beach cleanups](https://surflimpo.cambiatus.io/invite/5w2AoW). 




From September 2022 until March 2023 I was able to do many things related to @Gnars.  In my original proposal I commited to: 

"My focus will be on producing content and representing gnars in different events - from beach cleanups to web3 events.

Surfguru.com.br will also be a partner in this iniciative, sharing news, reposting content on social media, and raising awareness about gnars in any other ways we can think about.

I’ll get stickers to put on my board and all the other avaliable merch to represent gnars anywhere I go."

During this 6 months, I believe I acomplished the proposed goals, as you can see on [my sponsorship report](https://peakd.com/hive-141964/@luizhadad/6-months-as-a-sponsored-surfer-at-gnars-dao-or-6-meses-como-um-surfista-patrocinado-da-gnars-en-pt-br).  I'd love to keep collaborating with Gnars as a sponsored surfer. Since we're still buiding the [Gnarthlete Journey](https://discord.com/channels/928811922244137020/1118918402472411266/1118918402472411266)

Here goes few highlights from the report:


![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/Skvt1ZVI3.jpg)
- Creating surfing content in gnarly waves, such as slabs and barrels, in Espirito Santo and Fernando de Noronha; This content became part of few Gnars videos, including the first surfing/water sports mint on That's Gnarly and the first surfing collab mint too;

![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HJFokZVIh.jpg)

- Spreading the word about Gnars as a speaker during the Ethereum Rio Conference and 3 meetups at WeBelieve Hub;

![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rkaTkbV8n.jpg)
- Running a DAO Governance Workshop at Ethereum Rio and having Gnars as one of the cases;



- Onboarding Mari, Lucas Rocha, Bernardo Nassar, Carlos Bellumat, Criscia, Gabriel Sodré, João Parmagiani, Felipe and Gabriel Carvalho amongst others to our community; 

![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/ryTbl-V83.png)

- Growing SurfHive and fostering the community, that now can generate a small revenue to Gnars - every Gnars member can choose Gnars as a default beneficiary, and the DAO will earn at least 5% of the post's rewards;

- Helping close partnerships that bring benefits for Gnars holders:  
    - [Surfguru](https://surfguru.com.br/) - 1 year subscription for all Gnars holders with +2 NFTs and 90 days subscription for all holders.
    - [We Believe Hub](https://webelieve.com.br/) gnars holders can work there 2x a week for free
  
    

## **Travel grant proposal: Surftrip to Indonesia**

Indonesia is a dream for every surfer. It has perfect waves, beautiful islands, awesome parties, lots of fun and plenty of opportunities to spread the word about Gnars.

With the travel grant, I commit to **continue** as a Gnars surfer travelling in indo with: 

- Gnars logo at the top of my board, along with Surfguru as my major sponsors;
![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HynzWWEUn.jpg)

- Gnars mention on every social media post related to the trip  - also @thatsgnar.ly, @nounish, @nounsbr and #GnarsWaves #GnarsDAO and #NounsWaves hashtags
- Noggles on my web2 and web3 profile names ⌐◨-◨  (They're already on my [instagram](https://www.instagram.com/luizhadad) and [twitter](https://www.twitter.com/luizhadad))
![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HJ4Alr483.jpg)

- Wearing Gnars gear (hats, shirts, glasses, POAP) during the trip;

**On the web3 content side** I can commit to post at least once a week a blog post on SurfHive and submit two creations on That's Gnarly.

Over 2 months (8 weeks), that would mean:
- **8 posts on SurfHive + 16 submissions on That's Gnarly**

I'd like to contribute with 20% of my earnings on SurfHive to Gnars. There, I can set Gnars as a default beneficiary. I am curious of how much this will be after the surftrip.


**Regarding **web2 content**, my deliverables will be:**

- Two web2 surfing post per week (minimum) on Instagram mentioning and tagging Gnars, That's Gnarly, SurfHive, Nounish, NounsBr; **That equals 16 posts.** 
- Stay active on instagram stories creating content about the trip and relating to gnars / web3

- Put nounish stickers all over the place ⌐◨-◨ 
- Foster partnerships with local business, like Bagus Ink Surf Camp, that our friend Ricky onboarded to Gnars.


**Planned surfing schedule for the trip:**

**From July 9th until August 31st:**
- Two months in Indonesia: few days in Bali (10th until the 13th of July), from 14th July until 28th of July I'll be in the Mentawais at Macaronis Resort (one of the best waves in the planet). 
- I will go back to Bali and keep chasing barrels during August - G-Land and Desert point are on my bucket list



![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/BJL9VWNU3.jpg)

**Financial proposal**

My ask is a travel grant of 2 ETH to help me with travel expenses.

My current travel budget is as it follows:

1k USD - Return ticket: Brazil - Jakarta (Indonesia)
250 USD - Return tickets from Jakarta to Bali
300 USD - Return tickets from Bali to Padang (Mentawaii)
150 USD - Hotel + food in Bali for the first days (July 10th until July 13th)
3k USD - Cost of Macaronis Resort for 2 weeks ($200 per day + transfers)
500 USD - Hotel in Bali / Desert Point in August
500 USD - Videomakers/photographers for the trip

Total costs: 5.650 USD

2 ETH = 3.8k USD at the time of writing (1 ETH - 1.903 usd).

I saved some money for this trip and I am also looking for other sponsors to help me pay for the remaining 1.8k usd from the travel costs.

Thanks Mari for delegating your Gnars so I could put my prop up.

Also thanks to Vlad and Gami for the continous support! You guys are legends!

Mahalo!
![](https://i.imgur.com/1oEPgyq.png)
            @luizhadad / wavehead
proposals.author: 0xFc27B375fAf1FBd3F3462044Cf810082F042a45B

votes.reason: amazing tuberider
I know Luiz is going to do more than Travelling! Great contributor and all round very supportive
Legend!

proposals.title: Noun²gnar¹versary
proposals.body:
![](https://ipfs.decentralized-content.com/ipfs/bafkreicnjc5oebxyrxhbepupq32777qxjn5fchttuqdrjenpowqa7ldcfy)

**Requesting 5 ETH, 15 Gnars and 15 Nouns Vision** to fund a mandated Prop House round for an open, permissionless and decentralised celebration of nounish and gnarly culture globally. 

Gnars DAO turns one 21 June (Go Skateboarding Day) so let's have a belated birthday party to coincide with the second Nouniversary beginning 8 August 2023. 

## ⚡️ TLDR

**Prop House round:**

- 5 x 1 ETH grants for Noun²gnar¹versary celebrations
- 5 x 3 Gnars and 5 x 3 Nouns Vision for prize giveaways
- Showcase gnarly culture, our people and their creations 
- Jam sessions and parties with friends around the globe
- Photo and video content to document the experience

## 🤘 Recommendations

We've loads of things to celebrate and we should all bring our own unique flavour to our own events. Here's some ideas to get the creative juices flowing:

- Any action sport, meet, jam and after party
- Big noggles stickers turn any board into noun head
- Host a screening of any relevant gnars nounish films
- Onboarding to That's Gnarly and Gnars DAO membership
- Get some friends who do film and photography to come along
- Photos and film to be released within 2 weeks of event finish
- Hippy jump noggle setup where nose bridge is the limbo bar
- Discuss giant noggles 'opstacle' and distribute the blueprints
- If you have ability to fabricate an 'opstacle' exhibit or shred
- Portable version that folds and assembles would be cool
- Community artwork showcase and gnarly skate decks
- Lil Bubble EP on rotation and live music or DJ set
- Gnars HD artwork reveal and official launch

## ✅ Requirements

Let's peer into the void, keep building at the edges, and showcase our absurd cultural movement like never before. Prop House submissions must:

1.  Explain how you'll maximise attendance
2.  Suggest merch you'll provide for attendees
3.  Formulate a plan for how to give away prizes
4.  Demonstrate plan for a film and photo crew
5.  Nominate a relevant nounish film to screen

## 📅 Scheduling

To allow ample time for planning, we've taken into consideration this proposal cycle, Prop House round setup, promotion and facilitation.

- Proposals: 1 week - 21 Jun to 28 Jun
- Voting period: 5 days - 29 Jun to 4 Jul
- Events planning: 4+ weeks - 5 July to 7 Aug
- Celebration: up to 1 week - 8 Aug onwards
- Media production: release within 2 weeks

## 💡 Prop House 

Below is the exact content I will submit to Prop House through their "create timed round form" so that entrants know what to expect during the voting cycle. During these 2 weeks, I will be promoting the upcoming round heavily so that entrants feel well-prepared and have ample time for brainstorming, ideation and feasibility studies.

---

### What is your contact info? (twitter, discord or email works):

https://twitter.com/0xigami

### What is the round name? (Please use only standard letters, no special characters such as dashes or question marks):

Noun²gnar¹versary

### What is the round description? (Please use a markdown editor to format your description):

`![](https://ipfs.decentralized-content.com/ipfs/bafkreicnjc5oebxyrxhbepupq32777qxjn5fchttuqdrjenpowqa7ldcfy)`

An open, permissionless and decentralised celebration of nounish and gnarly culture globally. 

Gnars DAO turns one 21 June (Go Skateboarding Day) so let's have a belated birthday party to coincide with the second Nouniversary beginning 8 August 2023. 

- 5 x 1 ETH grants for Noun²gnar¹versary celebrations
- 5 x 3 Gnars and 5 x 3 Nouns Vision for prize giveaways
- Showcase gnarly culture, our people and their creations 
- Jam sessions and parties with friends around the globe
- Photo and video content to document the experience

To allow ample time for planning, we've taken into consideration the time required for this Prop House round, promotion and facilitation.

- Proposals: 1 week - 21 Jun to 28 Jun
- Voting period: 5 days - 29 Jun to 4 Jul
- Events planning: 4+ weeks - 5 July to 7 Aug
- Celebration: up to 1 week - 8 Aug onwards
- Media production: release within 2 weeks

Please take note of these minimum proposal requirements. They provide a benchmark for you to build on and we know that they'll help to ensure you and your attendees get the most out of a gathering.

1.  Explain how you'll maximise attendance
2.  Suggest merch you'll provide for attendees
3.  Formulate a plan for how to give away prizes
4.  Demonstrate plan for a film and photo crew
5.  Nominate a relevant nounish film to screen

We've outgrown optical sponsorship of existing events, so let's peer into the void, keep building at the edges, and showcase our absurd cultural movement like never before!

### When does the round proposing period start? (exact date and time in UTC):

21 Jun 1am UTC


### When does the round voting period start? (exact date and time in UTC):

29 Jun 1am UTC

### When does the round voting period end? (exact date and time in UTC):

4 Jul 1am UTC

### How many winners are there?:

5

### What is the symbol for the currency being used as the award? (eg $ETH, $NOUN)):

$ETH, $GNAR, $GLASSES

### How much of the award currency does each winner get?

1, 3, 3

### Who is voting on this round? (Respond with NFT/ERC20 contract address or specific wallet addresses):

0x558BFFF0D583416f7C4e380625c7865821b8E95C

### What house should this round be attached to? (Respond with house name - if you don't have a house, the name you input here will be used to create a new house for you):

Gnars

---

## 💸 Transactions

Attached transactions do the following:

1. Send 5 ETH to vote.gami.eth
2. MultiSend 15 Gnars NFT and 15 Nouns Vision NFT to vote.gami.eth using 0x40a2accbd92bca938b02010e17a5b8929b49130d contract

All the ETH and NFTs will be used as prizes in the Prop House round. Five winners, with each receiving:

- 1 ETH
- 3 Gnars NFT
- 3 Nouns Vision NFT

The Nouns Vision NFTs are redeemable for the physical pairs at nounsvision.com

## 💬 Questions?

Thanks for taking the time to read this proposal. If you have any questions, please feel free to reach out. 

Happy Noun²gnar¹versary!

[Gami](https://twitter.com/0xigami)

proposals.title: "Pixel 189" - a Gnars Pixelord Commission worth 0.69ETH + Droposal
proposals.body:
## TL;DR
**Requesting 0.69 ETH commission and Vote to drop Pixelord's rendition of GnarsDAO Mascot noun 189**
 
![nooun.jpg](ipfs://bafybeihdjs4fwtnefobop2kpkxn4puqcknvlvtjhdv5hxxnkbamdwxf7ny)    

## Introduction: who is Pixelord?

Pixel Lord is a Renowned futurist digital art and musical artist thats has unveiled a breathtaking reimagination of GnarsDAO's beloved mascot, Noun 189.
 
[![pxl.jpeg](ipfs://bafybeih3codtbqyhmiq3dfaif2u44ezohw7biwxpdcsevp4w2lmo55vvwa)](https://twitter.com/pixelord)
    
Pixelord is a GnarsOG holder and through this captivating collaboration brings together Pixelord's distinct artistic vision and GnarsDAO's pioneering spirit in the world of extreme sports and subDAOs.

## What are all the details?
We are asking a 0.69ETH commission fee for Pixelord's artwork and deploying a gnarsDAO official droposal with the artwork that has been submitted.

Given the success of this proposal, the transactions attached will deploy a  2 week Timed Open edition with Pixelord's artwork to be officially minted by our DAO treasury address gnars.eth

## How will impact be made?
This collaboration opens up new avenues for exploration of gnartists and gnars official droposals, sparking conversations and inspiring new gnarly individuals to push their own creative boundaries. Pixelord's reimagination of Noun 189 invites everyone to embark on a journey of self-expression, embracing the fearless spirit that lies within each of us.

## Why should we?
A 2 week Timed Open edition will be kicked off after success of the proposal with a sale price of 0.0069420 ETH, revenue splits will be 40% to Pixelord and 60% to GnarsDAO treasury.

After 5 day DAO voting period, a custom [That's Gnarly](https://thatsgnar.ly/thatsgnarly/creations) mint page will appear, bringing new eye balls and new wallets to connect on That's Gnarly

This Proposal serves as a gnartwork commission prop + Droposal of said commissioned work.

proposals.title: Onboarding Abuga Aroni with 1 Gnar NFT for LvL 1 Gnars shredder
proposals.body:
![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/ryWB8jQrn.jpg)

Hello everybody! I am **Abuga Aroni**, a downhill skateboarder from Kenya, and the homie behind [Downhill254](https://downhill254.com/).

I picked up downhill skateboarding in the UK back in 2016. But when I came back to Kenya in 2017, I found I was pretty much the only downhill skater in around.

This kinda sucked, and so I spent the following years trying to grow the Kenyan downhill skate scene. 

![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rkSRDsXH2.jpg)

Couple years later, and we're still only a handful but we're slowly growing. I dream of having a massive scene one day, and hopefully the seeds of stoke I plant will blossom 🌸.

I'm a big believer in giving back. Over the last few years, I've been helping out beginners and novices through my [blog](https://downhill254.com/) and [youtube channel](https://www.youtube.com/@downhill254skate). 

I've been creating content that helps skaters around the world get off the right (goofy or regular hehe) foot for [downhill skating](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Tn5bk6hg_B0&list=PLDfyn8uDFYiZ-PITeT0439V5-AukFKKeK). Teaching them everything they need to know, to allow them to go from being a total beginner, to a skater that can handle any hill they come across. 

![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/ryAgFsXBh.png)

The great side effect of helping new skaters, is that I've been able to  make downhill skateboarding my main source of income through content creation. 

And being a part of movements and communities like Gnars, and Skatehive couldn't be more perfect.

proposals.title: Onboard Raicca Ventura with 1 Gnar NFT
proposals.body:
![Screenshot 2023-05-15 at 23.39.54.jpg](ipfs://bafkreibayg7a55h46hqk3pwsecs5kozml346mntorc3cfqbj752qqg4dga)
    
Raicca Ventura, at the age of 16, has gone from being a promising talent to a reality in the current park skateboarding scene in Brazil, and unless there are major reasons preventing it, she will be representing Brazil in the 2024 Paris Olympics. There is great expectation that the women's park skateboarding category will bring an unprecedented medal for the country. It is the only skateboarding category in which Brazil has not won a medal.

With a collection of awards in her resume and currently ranked as the number one female professional park skateboarder in Brazil, Raicca has skateboarding running through her veins. Her history with skateboarding is long-standing and comes from her family. Raicca learned to skateboard at the age of 6 under the influence of her father and uncle, who are also skateboarders. The girl would tag along for her father's skateboarding lessons at the São Bernardo do Campo skatepark and ended up developing a passion for it.


In 2022, Raicca competed for the first time against the world's best in Rio de Janeiro and finished in 4th place. In 2023, she took part in the Dubai stage of the World Championship and finished in 11th place.

## Whats Next 

Raicca was one of the first woman to drop the megaramp and certainly a great add to our Gnarly Crew. 

This proposal requests Gnar 717 to onboard her to the community.

With this proposal Raicca would be recognized as Gnarthlete level 2 -> https://app.charmverse.io/gnars/page-5339523206847683). 

 
![Screenshot 2023-05-15 at 23.41.51.jpg](ipfs://bafkreidm2bdpqnrj24numh2kxsskvphfa7tpr42ndduuwler56bek5yyte)

proposals.title: Surfguru educational campaign to onboard holders into GnarsDAO [1ETH for 3 months]
proposals.body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/b2wl3vf.jpg)

### WHAT

[Surfguru](https://surfguru.com.br) is going to create a well rounded educational campaign with graphic presentations, video content and online classes during 3 months to onboard Brazilian surfers to become Gnars holders.

![](https://i.imgur.com/zDfWkTM.jpg)

Surfguru is going to offer a 1 year subscription for all Gnars holders with +2 NFTs and 90 days subscription for all holders. 
The subscription includes:
- 15 days of surf forecast
- Personalized surf alerts
- +10 years of forecast data
- Less ads
- Access to benefits club
- 10% goes to the oceans

[Surfguru has already created a GnarsDAO merch store](https://reserva.ink/surfguru?collection=GNARSDAO) where subscribers have 31% discount.

![](https://i.imgur.com/uXtBYMU.png)
*Check out Ilustradora artwork for #gnarswave at the store*

### WHO

![](https://i.imgur.com/ZUjrZwH.jpg)

Surfguru is the leading surf forecast website and largest surfer community in Brazil with +300k unique users and +37k followers on instagram,, providing surfers with comprehensive information on wave forecast and surf news. Surfguru's mission is to connect people with the ocean, live the Aloha spirit and take care of the ocean. 10% of Surfguru’s income goes to social and environmental projects around Brazil, like [TPM](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x0b3d6c307f7e596892dda29cf4914598368c0b0212739081290ab6608de770cf) (also sponsored by Gnars).

![](https://i.imgur.com/pIPR4wk.jpg)


Surfguru founded [Surfhive](https://peakd.com/c/hive-141964/created), created the social currency [DROP](https://www.instagram.com/reel/Civ5iKJDxfo/) to reward beach clean ups, and has done educational campaign for [Detrash](https://www.instagram.com/reel/CkRaVTUjVg4/). [Mari](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x781c3062dce32c2ae1b29ad80bc95c37175c67c43ed086b196b20104669177bc) and [Luiz Hadad](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x4b0fef8be71a1beae3d7d2b31d44ee2df2ca539b36aa66a8221b346f6a713c4a), are partners of Surfguru, sponsored athletes and active members of GnarsDAO. [Críscia](https://thatsgnar.ly/thatsgnarly/user/0x1c3a9b9070d86d54e22a99334eac90a30e7cfd36) is an active content creator of Thatsgnar.ly and she also creates content for Surfguru and she leads Surfhive. [She did the reels about Thatsgnar.ly](https://www.instagram.com/reel/CrRZEZEuwfd/) that went viral with +23k views and onboarded 19 creators to TG. In addition, Surfguru has a wide team that believes that GnarsDAO can become a very strong community of surfers.

![](https://i.imgur.com/oGdgPKP.jpg)


![](https://i.imgur.com/7mGLEUF.png)

*Surfguru is going to continue #gnarswave competition directly on Thatsgnar.ly starting on May23.*

### WHY
Brazilian surfers are becoming more and more interested in NFTs. Surfjunkies is a great example of that with +3k mints in 3 days, which +40% were web3 newbies. Plus, big surfers like 3 times world champion [Gabriel Medina](https://forbes.com.br/forbes-tech/2022/06/gabriel-medina-fala-sobre-sua-nova-onda-a-web3/) and giant wave surfer [Lucas Chumbo](https://hardcore.com.br/lucas-chumbo-entra-para-o-universo-das-criptomoedas/) are involved in large crypto projects. 

![](https://i.imgur.com/O848ZdB.png)


From a different perspective, GnarsDAO benefited greatly by partnering with well-established communities such as, Coletivo XV. And now it can partner with Surfguru impact NounsDAO through the surf community.


### HOW

![](https://i.imgur.com/n4qUnAR.gif)

During these 3 months Surfguru is going to create educational content about how to be part of GnarsDAO: how to buy a Gnar and how to participate in the community.

- 1 reels per month on Surfguru’s instagram about GnarsDAO:
    1) What is GnarsDAO, websites and discord
    2) Basics of creating a waller, buying ETH and purchasing a Gnar at Opensea
    3) How to bid and settle Gnars auction

- 1 carousel per month on Surfguru’s instagram about GnarsDAO:
    1) What is GnarsDAO, websites and discord
    2) Basics of creating a waller, buying ETH and purchasing a Gnar at Opensea
    3) How to bid and settle Gnars auction
- 2 Live interviews with GnarsDAO members on Surfguru instagram during the two first months
- 1 Online class about GnarsDAO at the end of the 3 months
- 30k Banner impressions per month of GnarsDAO on Surfguru’s website 
- 1 Newsletter per month to Surfguru’s users to share the instagram content to the users
- 1 Article about GnarsDAO on Surfguru and Surfhive 

*Surfguru Instagram has +37k followers and website has +300k unique users, reaching a wide audience of surfers who are interested in web3*.




![](https://i.imgur.com/wtbSKtb.jpg)



### HOW MUCH AND HOW LONG
1 ETH for the 3 months


Mahalo! 
Let's go surfing!

proposals.title: Ground Catch x Gnars Skate Tournament in the Philippines
proposals.body:
**tl;dr** Sponsor a Ground Catch x Gnars 2 day Tournaments with raffles of Gnars Merch & Stickers, a watch party & development of a cc0 Gnars giant skatable ⌐◨-◨ obstacle structure.

This is Ground Catch PH! 
![](https://i.imgur.com/99VCQw0.png)

### Introduction
Whats up Gnars Fam? It's me [bossjcrypto](https://twitter.com/MemanJeff) a Founder of PinoyNouns, Community Member of Gnars, FilipiNouns, Core Team Member of InternatioNouns & other subdaos of nouns. I'm also a active prop builder, crypto enthusiast, marketer, proliferator and a community manager of a skateboard club called "[Ground Catch](https://www.facebook.com/GroundCatchTuguegarao)" composed of tons of Great Filipino Skateboard Atheletes. I’ve been in the Gnars community for about 5 months.

**WHO ARE WE?**

[Ground Catch (GC) Skateborders Club](https://www.facebook.com/GroundCatchTuguegarao) is a filipino Skateboarding Club, BMX & MTB Enduro founded in 2010 having a 2.8K Likes & 2.9K Followers on our Facebook Official Page. 

We participate in many sketeboard tournaments from other cities to represent our club. 

As a community manager, I am very thankful to start this proposal, because i believe that this is a huge opportunity for us to build a massive interaction IRL to proliferate Gnars Dao & to onboard new members to our club also with Gnars, and to make our club more active.

Here are just a few photos of the many wins we have had over past 13 years of joining & participating in large and small tourmanents around the Philippines:

https://www.facebook.com/tuguezombie01/videos/863350544476587/
That is osted on our first Content in #That'sGnarly

**Past Nounish Work:**

IRL Lil Nouns Ads Waiting Shed Bus Stop - 4Eth Funded by LilNouns gaining 1533 Vote For with 0 Against & 0 Abstain
[Prop #106](https://lilnouns.wtf/vote/106)

[Construction Photos on Twitter](https://twitter.com/bossj_eth/status/1645263397083303936?s=20)

![](https://i.imgur.com/sXL9Jqw.png)

[NSFW Winning Retro Proposal Nouns Dao Giveback to Aeta Agta People (FIP) ⌐◨-◨](https://prop.house/nsfw/what-did-we-miss/2672)
![](https://i.imgur.com/LhsjKkl.jpg)

[TNS #NounsGiveBack Winning Entry](https://twitter.com/bossj_eth/status/1589310289962741760?s=20)
![](https://i.imgur.com/T0OPGMD.jpg)

[IRL Open Category Art Contest & DIY Community Art in our College School](https://twitter.com/bossj_eth/status/1622012993004511232?s=20&t=Crv2io4lBcAlAuoDU8BzLg)

**Budget and Deliverables:**

We are asking 2.5 ETH + 1 gnars to create a huge event sponsored by Gnars Dao. This event is about 2 days and open to all of skateboarders here in Tuguegarao City, Philippines.

We will also be coordinating with our LGUs (local government units) for outreach this event into our local community for public safety and visibility with the goverment.

The 2.5 ETH will be used for the following:

1. **Tournaments with Prizes 0.5 Eth**
Freestyle Skateboard Competition Using Gnars ⌐◨-◨ Obstacles With Judging (Elimanation Round) only 2 Atheletes will compete for the Finals Championship Round

2. **Prizes**
- Champion - Will be recieving a Cash (0.25 Eth) + Trophy Gnars Merch & Laces, Stickers
- 2nd Place - Will be recieving a Cash (0.15 Eth) + Trophy Gnars Merch & Laces, Stickers
- 3rd & 4th Place - Both Will be recieving a Cash (0.05x2 = 0.1 Eth ) Gnars Merch & Laces, Stickers

3. **Gnars Merchs & Laces, Stickers Packs Raffle to all contestant 0.2 Eth**
4. **DJ Music & MC 0.1 Eth**
5. **New Gnars ⌐◨-◨ Obstacles Structure Design - 0.5 Eth**
6. **2 Days Rent Venue of the event - 0.5 Eth**
7. **Free Foods, Drinks, Tarpaulins & Accomodation of the Organizers & Staffs - 0.5 Eth**
8. **Photographer & Videographer of the Event - 0.2 Eth**

**Planning** 

**Week 1: **
- Setteled Payment for 2 Days Venue
- Permission to Request a Permit with coordinating the Local Goverment Unit about the Event 
- Production of Gnars ⌐◨-◨ Obstacles Structure Design, Merchs, Stickers & Trophy
- Advertising Skate Competition to be posted in Our Facebook Page
- Seek MC, Judges, DJ

**Week 2:** 
- Registration of All Contestant in the Event
- Organizing Food Stall
- Skateboard Contest Formats 
- Organized Production of Taurpaulins
- Coordinate with the Police Enforcers for the safety protocols in the Event 

**Event Schedule**

**Day 1:** 

9:00 am - 10:00 am: Registration and Check-in
10:00 am - 12:00 pm: Ceremonial Opening and Freestyle Skateboard Competition Elimination Round 1
12:00 pm - 1:00 pm: Lunch Break
1:00 pm - 3:00 pm: Freestyle Skateboard Competition Elimination Round 2
3:00 pm - 4:00 pm: Break
4:00 pm - 6:00 pm: Freestyle Skateboard Competition Finals
6:00 pm - 7:00 pm: Award Ceremony for the Skateboard Competition

**Day 2:** 

9:00 am - 10:00 am: Watch Video Party - Information all about Gnars Dao Ecosystem
10:00 am - 11:00 am: Picture Taking with all the contestant of the Event & Head Organizers
11:00 am - 12:00 pm: Raffle Draw - Gnars Merch & Stickers Packs for all contestants
12:00 pm - 1:00 pm: Lunch Break
1:00 pm - 2:00 pm: Photographer & Videographer of the Event Showcase
2:00 pm - 4:00 pm: Venue Clean Up and Event Wrap-up

We are very happy with this proposal because this could really help our Gnars Dao Governance Ecosystem by spreading the gnarly work to all of community here in the philippines. We have a lot of potential investors here who would be excited to join our community and buy Gnars!

![](https://i.imgur.com/pjQMo5t.jpg)

![](https://i.imgur.com/Y3XAJ41.png)


### Droposal Idea:
- [ ] When this event has been concluded, We will be doing gnarly event recap video and picture collection that we hope can be minted on That's Gnarly as a (https://thatsgnar.ly/) open edition with a 50% split with the Gnars Treasury and Ground Catch Team

### Social and Links

Ground Catch Facebook Group Page: [GC Official Group Page](https://www.facebook.com/groups/176349749147148) With a 1.5k Members

Pinoy Nouns Founder
IRL Proliferator
Writer Proposer
Gnars Athelete
Videographer

proposals.title: PROPOSAL FOR FUNDING THE DEVELOPMENT OF A CHILDREN'S BOOK CALLED: **THE INCREDIBLE BOOK OF TRICKS**
proposals.body:
> I am sponsoring this proposal for nikolaevkappa.eth 


## **Introduction**

My name is Renato Galvão a.k.a. Nikolaev "Kappa" and I’ve been a skateboarder since 16 yo. I'm 35 now 🧙‍♂️. I’ve worked with most big brands both in Brazil and USA and now I am focused on creating a children books called The Incredible Book of Tricks.

*As a creative director and 3D animator, I could bring an engaging perspective to the books, and my background in photography could help to create beautiful and dynamic illustrations.* 

Here are my companies so you can see the visual aspects:
http://instagram.com/obvious.cc
http://instagram.com/chapadinhasdeendorfina
http://instagram.com/prazerobvious

*Living in a couch in Copacabana for years and spending most of my days skateboarding must have provided me with a unique perspective and a wealth of knowledge about being a skateboarder. My experience with Casa Urbana creating skateboarding content could also be a valuable asset.*

*Here some of my favorites:*

[[URBN] PRMTRL](https://vimeo.com/78445531)

[[URBN] QUICK TRIP #1](https://vimeo.com/72244552)

[[URBN] QUICK TRIP #2](https://vimeo.com/72704440)

[[URBN] THIS IS MEMORY](https://vimeo.com/111691763)

A **children's book** with a glossary of skateboarding tricks and their variations, along with illustrations and step-by-step instructions, could be a great resource for kids who are interested in learning more about skateboarding. In addition to teaching kids how to perform different tricks, the book could also include information about the history and culture of skateboarding, as well as profiles of famous skateboarders. By incorporating **VR assets** and **animations**, the book could provide a unique and immersive learning experience for kids. 

An **NFT collection** could also be a fun way to collect and showcase different skateboarding tricks. A book like this could be a valuable resource for kids and even grown-ups who are interested in skateboarding.

### **Description**

Parents who want their children to learn about skateboarding will be very interested in this material as well. **The book will be fully interactive. The first volume will have approximately 45 flat ground tricks explained in detail**, where they came from and how to do them. The **inclusion of augmented reality animations** will make the book even more engaging and interactive, and the hardcover format could make it more durable and long-lasting.

**How does this proposal benefit the DAO?**
> This proposal could benefit the DAO by providing a valuable digital ( and later a physical one) resource for anyone (not just kids) who are interested in learning more about skateboarding.
> 
> The use of Noggles and Gnars from the community in the illustrations and artwork could further emphasize the connection to the Gnars community. Could be a great way to promote the Gnars and its culture to a wider audience and to engage with the community in a meaningful way. 
> 
> The idea is that **33%** of the sales of the book and the NFT collection's revenue be reverted to GNARS  treasure fund. 

# VISUAL EXAMPLES

**Here is some more we can do:**

→ The boards will have Gnars PFP from the community and Noggles stickers.
![](https://i.imgur.com/vNafOo8.jpg)
→ One of the possibilities is to choose Gnars Visionaries from ThatsGnarly and people from the community to have your NFT to illustrate the boards.
![](https://i.imgur.com/PKn3GE4.jpg)


→ Through the process we will have a strong visual team that will create assets to try to implement dcl emotes and GLB or GLTF formats for the community to use in metaverse and other applications. Also renders to illustrate the Gnars brand.


Also including a Nounish-Gnars page at the end of the book so we provide more information about the community and answer any questions that people might have. 

Giving the Gnars community permanent credit for their sponsorship and help to recognize and support it’s contribution to the book.

**What marketing and networking opportunities are associated with this proposal?**

> After having the pilot we can go to the global distribution network of the Nouns community. It could help to reach a global audience and promote the book to different bookstores in different countries. 


## **Budget and Deliverables**

A timeline of six months for the completion of the book, with regular deliveries along the way, could help to ensure that the project stays on track and is completed on time.

## Timeline and Deliverables
**Week 1-2**: *Research and content development*

Comprehensive glossary of skateboarding tricks
Historical and cultural insights

**Week 3-6**: *Illustrations, 3D modeling, and texturing*

Character creation with Noggles
Application of Gnars from the community through the [Visionaries from **ThatsGnarly**](https://thatsgnar.ly/thatsgnarly/visionaries)
Skateboard and clothing design

**Week 7-8**: *NFT creation*

NFT collection creation

**Week 9-12**: *Final editing, marketing, and pilot approval*

Editing and finalizing content
Marketing and promotion
Final Approval

### Deliverables for this project include:

A fully illustrated and animated digital book pilot
An NFT collection with all tricks and their variations

# A future proposal for printing and distribution of the physical book at NOUNS.


This pilot will help us test the book's potential success in the community and identify areas for improvement before we fully launch the book.

During the pilot, we will distribute a limited number of copies of the book to select audiences in various regions. We will also gather feedback and data on the digital book's sales, readership, and engagement. Based on this information, we will refine our marketing and distribution strategies for the full launch.

Once the pilot is completed, We would like to present a new proposal to the Nouns DAO or Lil Nouns (Since the book if for kids). The proposal will outline how we can leverage the power of blockchain technology to streamline the printing and distribution process of the book worldwide. By utilizing the Nouns Ecosystem, we can ensure that the book is produced and delivered efficiently, securely, and cost-effectively.

I believe that this pilot and subsequent proposal will only benefit even more the success of the Gnars DAO.

## Team Budget Break out (1.5ETH)

→ Skateboarders & Filmmaker with 135 Filmed Tricks - **0.5ETH**
→ 43 Tricks 3D Animation, Lighting and Render - **1ETH**

proposals.title: Sponsor Igor Mandic & Albert Ivančić (Co-Driver) for 1.62 ETH for the FIA WRC 2023 Croatia
proposals.body:
TLDR: 

Fund Igor Mandic & his co-driver Albert Ivančić for 1.62ETH (2755 Euro) to compete at this year's WRC Croatia (20.04 - 23.04) and start positioning GnarsDAO within the Extreme Automotive World.

WRC - Rally Croatia 2k21
 
![uy.jpeg](ipfs://bafkreig6slfojn76qhio5i7h5d7g2fydttl4qnxgiixtcf5vhr4ume5tdq)
    

Intro. 

Dear GnarsDAO, my name is Josip Vlah and I am a fellow GnarsDAO member from Croatia. 
Some of you might know me from different events we have attended together. 

Recently I have been closely in touch with Igor Mandic and following his journey in the WRC ecosystem. 
We have been discussing together about potential sponsorship opportunities by my own company which is now finalized and throughout this conversation GnarsDAO came into discussion and this transpired into me writing this proposal. 

Background about Igor Mandic. 

Igor Mandić is a professional Croatian Rally Driver for the last 13 years. He is an active member of AK Delta which is the team behind him for the WRC Rally 2023. 

Some of Igor's achievements in the previous couple of years.

2009: Junior Champion of Croatia. 
2010: Junior Champion and Champion of Technical Discipline. 
2014: State Champion in Technical Discipline. 
2016: First Group Place at Ina Delta Rally
2017: First Group Place at Croatia Rally 
2019: Croatia State Champion - Historic Rally  
2022: State Champion in Rally (Croatia) and Representative at WRC 2023. 

See professional profile of Igor: 
https://www.ewrc-results.com/profile/19308-igor-mandic/ 

World Rally Championship Croatia

The World Rally Championship (WRC) is the highest level of global competition in rallying, owned and governed by the FIA. Learn more about WRC → https://www.wrc.com/en/  

WRC came into Croatia in 2021 and created a global reach for the county as well as the drivers. In terms of the numbers WRC 2021 was followed by more than 100 million consecutive viewers on TV from 150 different countries. In terms of social media, there were more than 11,200 SM mentions across all channels and this is expected to grow during the 2023 WRC. 

This year's WRC will be held from 20.04 - 23.04.2023 spanning across numerous county’s in Croatia.  
WRC 2023 is expected to bring more than 600,000 people to Croatia during April. 
For more information please visit WRC Croatia → https://rally-croatia.com/en/ 

See the highlights from the previous 2022 WRC Croatia
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mFQosD3N0Tw

 
![uy.jpeg](ipfs://bafkreig6slfojn76qhio5i7h5d7g2fydttl4qnxgiixtcf5vhr4ume5tdq)    
 
![unnamed.jpeg](ipfs://bafkreihmriyeflo5epqq4encle3gpd47ur6jk4z2tvarmk6volcq54cuja)
    
![jhjh.jpeg](ipfs://bafkreig56qvnnkl2fl24xd6jfnxzd24eomqywdg6jkyzzfy4yjorhkbike)
    

What's the proposal about? 

This proposal serves a purpose to fund Igor Mandic and the team to compete at this year's WRC Croatia. 

In exchange for the funding GnarsDAO visuals will be created and promoted on the car of Igor Mandic (Renault Clio R.S. Line, See photos below) 

Furthermore, In terms of the promotional aspect, Josip Vlah & the RZLT team will take on the responsibility of Social Media promotion and photography / videography for GnarsDAO which will be shared throughout the channels. (This will be done for free by the RZLT Team) 

We will also utilize videography from the Media outlets of the WRC since it will be covered on the global scale with more than 1000 news reporters flying in from all over the world.  

After the WRC we will onboard Igor and the team more in depth within the GnarsDAO ecosystem for numerous potential activations in the future and proliferation of GnarsDAO within the motosport world. 

Images of the car in question in action: 

(Posting Imgur link because Snapshot is giving me a hard time to upload photos) 
https://imgur.com/gallery/FXe2dFA

What will be done? 

GnarsDAO Logo visible on the car of Igor (Front, Back, side and Roof, Example Below) 

GnarsDAO Logo visible on the support area for the mechanics where there is a large amount of people gathering to see the cars and talk with the teams) → Beach Flags (Example Below)  

Social Media Content for the GnarsDAO. (Photography, Videography of GnarsDAO being present at WRC Croatia) 

GnarsDAO being mentioned in the driver-interviews and PR. 

Car Sponsorship locations (+ Roof of the car which will be visible from the Aerial, Helicopter Photos) 
 
![unnamed (1).png](ipfs://bafkreidw2gxg2dvkpk6llhqmr773zgarwvzqxo33pmgr53my3kdk4cogei)
    
Beach Flags (2 Pieces) - Which will be at the support / mechanics stand from the crew. 

![unnamed.png](ipfs://bafkreibmfpvji63e76ontj3mjb2vnpfj5ei4huzdxlc4rseqlslvmxkscq)

How will this benefit GnarsDAO? 

Through this activation GnarsDAO will start to position itself within new forms of Extreme sports (Automotive) and capture world-wide recognition on-site as well as for the future-based activations. 

Proliferation of GnarsDAO throughout the WRC Croatia and potential acquisition of new Members and Athletes onto the GnarsDAO. 

Multi-Million viewership Media Exposure. 

Multiple content pieces created by the RZLT team on-site which will be pushed on the GnarsDAO Social Media, RZLT Social Media.

How much are we asking? 

We are requesting 1.62 ETH (2755 Euro) which will be allocated towards the team of Igor Mandic & Albert Ivančić for the WRC 2023 as well as additional promotional materials which will be on-site. 

Breakdown. 

1,47 (2,500 Euro) - Sponsorship 
0,16 (300 Euro) - 2 Large custom beach flags. 

All of the funding will go towards them and me with the team at RZLT will coordinate content on-site during the rally championship at no cost. 

Hope we have elaborated the proposal, if you have any questions or concerns please do not hesitate to contact me / tag me in discord proposal section. 

Discord
Josip | RZLT ⌐◨-◨ (🚬,☕, ❄)#2788 

Thank you.

proposals.title: That's Gnarly Daily Drop Deployment + NFT Transfers Gas Cost
proposals.body:
## TL;DR

**Requesting 1 ETH** for That's Gnarly Daily Drop Deployment gas costs and Gnars NFT/ That's Gnarly NFT transfers for the shredders that have been dropped, this follow up Proposal

You can check out first gas costs proposal here: https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x75de871dc2cdfb52513789573ba4f5cd27b663122b27de157ae100593d8b916c

## Introduction

ThatsGnarly is slowly becoming go-to destination for anyone who wants to stand out from the crowd and express their individuality. One of the most significant challenges we are still encountering is the high gas cost associated with deploying NFT editions on That's Gnarly. These costs have made it difficult to have a daily drops on some days, limiting our potential user base from growing.

Previous Proposal was passed to request 1 ETH for 1 month worth of drops which we have done successfully From end of February, through March and starting April: 

## List of Deployments + Gas Costs: 
You can review the full 30 day breakdown of this intiative in this Wallet i setup to manage the deployment and Gas costs that sometime are encountered by Rocketman and I issue a refund:

https://etherscan.io/txs?a=0x0aceF9ff1399bA132ad459B9d761899deb24B908&p=1

## What are all the details?

To overcome this challenge, we propose to continue this initiative that will go subsidize the gas costs associated with deploying That's Gnarly Editions + Sending out That's Gnarly NFTS and Gnars NFTS to our winning Shredders and Prize winners on the Ethereum network. We have estimated the highest gas fee we have encountered during these drops is 55$ - 110$ on a high gas fee day.

55$ X 30 Daily Drops ~ 1 ETH cost per month to deploy these editions (Ununsed gas fees will be carried over to next month to keep it going as long as Possible

### NOTE: For Questions on this Proposal, please tag me or Rocketman in That's Gnarly Chat - as our Proposal thread area for any comments or questions.

proposals.title: Sponsor Kevin Kowalski with Gnars Travel Budget in 2023 for 1.5 ETH
proposals.body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/MdQB4sG.jpg)

I’m a professional skateboarder asking for a Gnars travel budget in this proposal. I have some skate trips coming up that I could definitely use some help funding. As one of the first Gnars athletes that’s been involved with projects before. I’m asking for a travel budget of 3 eth this spring and summer split in half with two deposits of 1.5 eth.

I was one of the first athletes to do projects with Gnars. I went to New York City for NFT NYC where we filmed the gnars introductions video that we use to help on board more shredders till this day. I’ve also got to raise money for the dao with a 3 way profit split limited mint. That allows everyone to get involved and makes money for the treasury. I’d like to do more like the last one I did on Zora.  I’ve left links in the discord chat to that. That will help towards all my skateboarding travel expenses needed including gas,airfare,hotels,etc.

Looking forward to a good and productive year!


## 2023 SKATE TRIPS
#### TRAVEL BUDGET
* March 29th Warm Springs skatepark grand opening
* Gas and lodging $1,000
* https://www.instagram.com/p/CqB-l_EpJ0_/?igshid=YmMyMTA2M2Y=

* Can get social media clips to post on Twitter and tag Gnars.

* Plane tickets and lodging $4,000
* Proposal for 1.5 ETH

## WHAT I’VE DONE FOR THE DAO

* I was one of the first athletes for Gnars dao. The first proposal I was a part of was filmed and is now
* part of the Gnars introduction video that helps onboard to dao.
* After that I was given a travel budget that helped me produce more content and get on more trips
* To make it to more events.
* I noticed I was able to make more post on Twitter about Gnars.
* We minted a photo on an iconic skate spot with a three way royalty split between me the photographer and Gnars DAO. Each profited a few hundred dollars.
* I think we can do a lot more cool projects like that and help grow the DAO.
* Hint I have a lot of nouns glasses stickers I plan on sticker slapping different places on my travels.

Thank you so much for your consideration and Look forward to Chatting about This Proposal in discord

proposals.title: Breakdance × Nouns: Showing my breaking on Redbull BC one with Nouns T shirts and noggles ⌐◨-◨
proposals.body:
>[CharonCrypto](https://twitter.com/CharonCrypto) : I am sponsoring and supporting this proposal for [Mizukigreen]( https://twitter.com/mizukigreen64).

Hey Gnars fam! My name is Mizukigreen, and I'm stoked to be reaching out to you as one of the few female breakdancers in the scene. 

# **My proposal**

## **Showing my breaking nounishly, with Nouns, on the floor of Redbull BC 1**

I'm reaching out in hopes that you'll consider **sponsoring me as I chase my dream of competing on the ultimate stage for breakdancers - the Redbull BC1.**
 
 
![01.jpg](ipfs://bafybeif2t5nlo4jkymjw4tn5h7gdrg6ymtx7g5twdyb5jdfixojzkj6kw4)
    
Redbull BC1 is admired by breakdancers worldwide, with over 606K followers on Instagram and qualifiers held not just in the US, but also in various countries. Last year, the US qualifiers took place in Austin, Orlando, Philadelphia, Boston, and Seattle from May to August. I had the amazing opportunity to be invited to the Austin qualifiers in Texas, where I showcased my passion and skills.

## **My moves on Redbull BC1 last year**
![https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/965881825748729906/1093708600112857128/02GIF.gif](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/965881825748729906/1093708600112857128/02GIF.gif)

Redbull BC1 is admired by breakdancers worldwide, with over 606K followers on Instagram and qualifiers held not just in the US, but also in various countries. Last year, the US qualifiers took place in Austin, Orlando, Philadelphia, Boston, and Seattle from May to August. I had the amazing opportunity to be invited to the Austin qualifiers in Texas, where I showcased my passion and skills.

Currently, I live in California, but I'm eager to travel and participate in qualifiers in other regions. As a proud member of the Gnars community, I would love to represent Nouns on this journey. I'll rock Nouns-branded clothing during my performances and promote the nouns through my high-energy dance routines,nounishly⌐◨-◨

 
![03.jpeg](ipfs://bafkreiaqqcskvfsk5szfsoh52bgu7bco5gve7qfuseczuzoidaks5tnq7a)
    

But it doesn't stop there! I'll also wear Nouns glasses and create a short movie showcasing my breakdancing skills, which I'll share on social media for everyone to see. This collaboration will bring the Nouns brand into the spotlight within the extreme sports culture of breakdancing, especially as it becomes an official sport in the 2024 Paris Olympics.

# **My Activities for Nouns Community**

I am already showing my dance style for Nouns on social media by wearing Nouns glasses and creating dance videos.
![https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/965881825748729906/1093709259700715652/04GIF.gif](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/965881825748729906/1093709259700715652/04GIF.gif)

![https://twitter.com/mizukigreen64/status/1638708954065960960?s=20]
I have also collaborated with NounsDAO Japan to create T-shirts that showcase the Nouns logo.

I’m dancing wearing them.
 
![06.jpg](ipfs://bafkreiephzhcp74rxtsxjiiw5x2a6kr6tv3rvyotn2hsuvsv7etxugy5j4)
    

# **Budget**

In this sponsorship proposal, I'd like to dance and represent Nouns in two cities. I’ll focus on representing Nouns in major cities, for example New York and Miami, and so on.

Here is the amount I’d like to get your support:

| budget | City 1 | City 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Round-trip Airfare  | 0.25 ETH ($467.88) | 0.25 ETH ($467.88) |
| Hotel (3 nights) | 0.13 ETH ($243.40) | 0.13 ETH ($243.40) |
| Transportation during stay | 0.06 ETH ($112.29) | 0.06 ETH ($112.29) |
| Event Participation Fee (1 time) | 0.01 ETH ($25) | 0.01 ETH ($25) |
| Other cost for stay (3 days) | 0.05 ETH ($93.58) | 0.05 ETH ($93.58) |
| Total per city | 0.50 ETH ($942.15) | 0.50 ETH ($942.15) |
| Grand Total (2 cities) | 1.00 ETH ($1,884.30) |  |

※ The current price of 1 ETH is $1871.53.

# **Contributer for Nouns community**

Also, I dedicate myself into Nouns DAO communities. I am currently the main host for NounsDAO Japan's English radio show. Additionally, I have represented NounsDAO Japan on InternatioNouns' Twitter space, sharing our activities with the world.

**here is archives:**

[https://twitter.com/i/spaces/1ynKOaVXMYqJR](https://twitter.com/i/spaces/1ynKOaVXMYqJR)

[https://twitter.com/i/spaces/1OdKrzoMnZqKX](https://twitter.com/i/spaces/1OdKrzoMnZqKX)

# DanceNFT creator

Besides, I’m creating nounish danceNFT collection “Dancing Nouns”

[https://opensea.io/collection/dancingnouns](https://opensea.io/collection/dancingnouns)
![https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/965881825748729906/1093709260745089146/07GIF.gif](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/965881825748729906/1093709260745089146/07GIF.gif)

# Let’s dance together!

Together, we can make waves in the breakdancing world and show everyone what the Gnars community is all about. I hope you'll join me in this incredible journey, and I'm excited to see what we can achieve together!

Thank you for your consideration, and let's break the limits with Nouns and Gnars! Nounishlyyy⌐◨-◨

proposals.title: Giving is Gnarly - Support young skaters in Brazil and promote Skate Cuida
proposals.body:
## TL;DR

We are requesting 1 ETH from Gnars to help That’s Gnarly fund the top voted initiative: Bob Burnquist’s Instituto Skate Cuida. (https://skatecuida.org/)

## Introduction

This is an organization that supports kids skating in Brazil and was selected by Gnars holders as That’s Gnarly’s top initiative (https://thatsgnar.ly/initiatives)

Check out what Bob has to say:
https://www.instagram.com/p/Cqblc4BjEGY/

## Details
.5 ETH will go directly to support Skate Cuida. The other .5 ETH will be used to fund a contest. 

For the contest, everyone will be invited to submit clips of themselves shredding in a way that promotes Gnars and Skate Cuida. 

The 5 clips with the most votes will get .1 ETH each.

We will then use these clips to create a community-based open edition to commemorate the ongoing collaboration between Gnars and Bob Burnquist and Skate Cuida.

## Impact

The goal here is twofold:
-support the kids and a social good chosen by the Gnars community
-drive more attention to Gnars and Instituto Skate Cuida via the contest

More attention -> more eyes on gnars.wtf auctions and thatsgnar.ly drops while raising awareness for Skate Cuida.  

Questions? DM @ rocketman_w on Twitter or in Discord
