proposals.title: Sponsor Elisa (paragliding) with 1 ETH to become an official sponsored athlete
proposals.body:
Hi all,
My name is Elisa and you can find me in https://www.instagram.com/rio.from.above/. I have been paragliding for more than a decade and I am the current state champion in Rio de Janeiro. 
The podium is not a stranger to me. Since my early days in paragliding I have made it to the podium several times, but usually in the female category. I have made it to the top in the world rankings in cross country flying. This season, I nailed the **1st place overall** (among men and women) in the serial category, which made me pretty happy.

![](https://i.imgur.com/1eGUL5T.jpg)

And I want more! I want to crush records in the Brazilian Sertão and spread the word about Gnars. 

## A little more about me

Some of my achievements in paragliding:


- 2022 – 1st overall – Rio de Janeiro State championship (Serial category)
- 2022 – 6th female – Panamerican ranking
- 2022 – 5th female – World XC Contest 
- 2022 – made 3 flights of over 300 km of distance
- 2021 – 3rd female - National championship
- 2021 - made one flight over 300km of distance
- 2017 – 1st female – National championship
- 2016 – 2nd female – National championship

I’m passionate about all outdoor sports. On top of paragliding, I love kitesurfing, Va’a paddling and I have been recently learning how to surf. I’m also a mother of an 8-year-old skater and a 6-year-old ballerina and they both love flying with me. **Moms rock!**

Music and technology are part of my life. My expertise is in how musicians make money from music royalties. I help develop softwares as a product owner and I participate in other DAOs, focused in the music business, such as “Water & Music” and “Música, Copyright e Tecnologia” (a Brazilian DAO about Music, Copyrights and Technology). I am also a journalist and I have lead as editor a music magazine for 11 years, organized events and social media growth for a not-for-profit music association. I write regularly for the largest Paragliding magazine in the world (Cross Country or @xcmag). 


## Raising funds and community building

I have founded a community called Saia Para Voar (translated from Portuguese, it means both ‘get out and fly’ and ‘use a skirt to fly’). It became a very strong decentralized community and movement that helped women learn how to fly a paraglider, develop their skills or just socialize. We were able to gather funds and offer sponsorship for competition pilots and also made a documentary that was aired in a Brazilian TV channel called OFF (https://vimeo.com/464824633).

During the pandemic, in the Music NGO I contributed for, I created a fund called ‘Juntos Pela Música’ and we were able to get a partnership with Spotify to double whatever funds we raised. The fund grew up to BRL 1,7 million with the help of many musicians like Alceu Valença, Djavan, Erasmo Carlos and many others. The fund was distributed among struggling musicians with periodic payments during the pandemic. To learn more: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UXgUr5eD2uI&t=50s

## Sponsorship proposal

I would be honored to receive 1 ETH to cover part of the costs for a distance-record-breaking expedition to the northeast of Brazil (Assú - RN) and move to Level 3 to become an official Sponsored Athlete. 

I’m in a hybrid position as the Gnars Athlete Sponsorship Protocol has recently changed. I have been already granted with 1 Gnar to be onboarded in the community. So I assume I’m level 2 now, so the proposal would be to land on level 3 according to [this protocol](https://0xsatori.notion.site/Gnars-Athlete-Sponsorship-Protocol-7854a940f3f2461bb9d6413f76da8cf2) 

### :small_blue_diamond: Ojective: 
Fly 400 km in a paraglider during the trade winds season (from September to November)

### :small_blue_diamond: The ask: 
1 ETH to cover costs and become level 3 athlete

### :small_blue_diamond: Other support: 
Video editing for media content

### :small_blue_diamond: The plan: 
Spend 12 days in the Sertão and fly as much as possible to cross the 400km barrier in a paraglider.

### :small_blue_diamond: Expedition costs (estimation): 


| **Item** | **Description** | **Cost** | **Units** | **Total Cost**|
|:--------:|:---------------:|:--------:|:---------:|:-------------:|
|  Towing and retrieve   |  The glider is towed up at 6-7 AM and the flight is done in a straight line until the sunset. This item includes the towing operation, the car with a driver that follows the athlete for over 300km and the way back to Assú.   |   BRL 600  | 12 days | BRL 7,200 |
| Accomodation       |    Single room with air conditioning in Assú (RN) |   BRL 150       |12 days|BRL 1,800|
|Flight   |  Two-way flight from Rio de Janeiro to Natal (RN) |  BRL 2,500   | 1 |BRL 2,500|
| Training   | 10+ hours of flying requires physical preparation. I’m already training 5 times a week.    | BRL 800  |6 months|BRL 4,800|
|   Specific training   |  The sertão is comparable to “Nazaré” for surfers. It’s a place with very strong thermals and extreme flying conditions. For safety reasons, I need to do an incident simulation course before going to better understand the reactions of my wing when an incident happens.     |  BRL 2,000        | 1|BRL 2,000 |
|Other costs|Satellite tracker subscription /Food and beverage / Airplane ticket for my mother-in-law to come to Rio and help with my kids during the expedition / Spare equipment (spare lines for the glider in case of damage, reserve chute case etc)/ Other costs. |BRL 5,000|1|BRL 5,000|
||||**Total**|**BRL 23,300**|

*equipment not included as I intend to fly with the competition equipment I already have.

## Why the Brazilian sertão?

Brazilians are blessed to be in the country where most of the paragliding world records were broken. The Sertão is the Meca of cross country pilots throughout the world during the season (from September to November). 

I went there in 2021 and 2022 and this is where [I flew my longests flights](https://www.instagram.com/p/CWYFZNyN-gH/?utm_source=ig_web_copy_link). In 2022, I was very few kilometers away from the South American record. 

[Watch me](https://www.instagram.com/tv/CV59fNMD6LM/?utm_source=ig_web_copy_link) crossing the skies above both Rio Grande do Norte and Ceará states in one 280+ Km flight in the Brazilian sertão.

My personal best is 320 km in a 10-hour flight.


## How can I contribute to the Gnars community?

- Explain Web 3.0, Gnars initiative and how buying NFTs can move this community and extreme sports
- Write articles for XCMAG about the above (follow the link to learn more about the reach and the readers profile)
- Write article for Go Outside Magazine or others
- I have 20 years of expertise in music royalties flow. I’m a guest teacher at Berklee’s music business graduation and MBA, and I work at a major music company, so I  can help with this knowledge if there is a need to understand how to  monetize original music content.  
- Create nounish content on instagram (@riofromabove)
- Create and publish content on Thatsgnar.ly with original music by Bakemono
- Promote the DAO using Nouns glasses and Gnars logo on my wing to create buzz
- Wear Nouns glasses on merch during TV interviews or podiums
- Onboarding more athletes

![](https://i.imgur.com/Xih3OoN.jpg)

![](https://i.imgur.com/9dGPkT7.jpg)

![](https://i.imgur.com/Sj4Buqb.jpg)

![](https://i.imgur.com/nYvn7x5.jpg)

![](https://i.imgur.com/Ll8PrGg.jpg)

proposals.title: [Prop. 76] - Sponsor Pedro Nem (@dabel) - 1 ETH
proposals.body:
> Vlad: I am sponsoring and supporting this proposal for Pedro Nem (@dabel)

Hello family, how are you?

My name is Pedro Henrique, also known as Nem. I'm 27 years old, I'm a skater and beatmaker musician.

I currently live in São Paulo, but I was born and raised in Rio de Janeiro. I've been skating for over 20 years and a lot of who I am is because of it.

Skateboarding is the art with which I can express my personality, and I also continue to express it through the music I listen to and produce.

I studied design for 2 years at Unifoa -RJ and then I moved to São Paulo to live off skateboarding. However, in 2020 the covid-19 came and I stayed at home producing music and little by little, with the advances in vaccines and releases to the streets, I returned to producing skateboarding videos for my video part, videos for collectives, brand campaigns and competing in Street Skate events. 
Moving and producing, had the opportunity to be featured in Thrasher Magazine and other media outlets.

And last year I got to know Nouns through the action in Vale do Anhangabaú/SP at Nouns Weeks…

### Following my last proposal according with Gnarthletes pre-documentation, this proposal requires 1 ETH / 2 months 

● My main proposal is, through Gnars' sponsorship, to plan myself financially and quit the job I'm currently working on. 

I work as a sales supervisor at [Matriz Skate Shop](https://www.matrizskateshop.com.br/) and for the past 3 years I have been reconciling my life between the shop and skateboarding. Which has been wearing me out a lot.

Leaving the store, I will be able to dedicate myself 100% to skateboarding,
roaming and producing freely around the city and, if possible, around the world. 

Integrating my music productions into various videos and photos exclusively for the Gnars community, showing how Skate Street performs on

marketing to boost the platform and on web2.

**Costs for the proposal:**
● 60% to live as an athlete, (household account, food, transport for content
creation)
● 20% off trips to skate competition and skate gear

● 20% for creating stickers, Gnars apparel for marketing

proposals.title: 0.35 ETH additional funding for 'GNARS'ly' video part
proposals.body:
![dwadaxz.png](ipfs://bafkreibs7cxe3idpvltujrbiumvccsegczxxfgy4nkgt3ai2nn33vjwlvm)


## TL;DR

Requesting additional 0.35 funding to travel to 3 locations and film some final tricks for "GNARS'ly" video part.

Original ask in [Gnars Discord Prop Discussion](https://discord.com/channels/928811922244137020/1080903733745025074) was 0.42 ETH but lowered the ask cause ETH price went up.

## Introduction

This is a project I'm working on since October 2022 after my [Gnars Sponsorship proposal passed]((https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x31d9113448e4dc06cf86cb8b2d94681297769fbe6cde158c24745c7eaf0f1b62)). Gnars Dao alocated me 2k so I can pay mine and my filmer's Andy Haroupias travelling expenses.

We already have around 80% of video part filmed and there's also a part teaser playing on thatsgnar.ly : https://thatsgnar.ly/creations/haris-housos-gnarsly-part-trailer

Part will be dropping on May 2023

## What are all the details?

Me and Andy have already travelled to lots of destinations around Greece (Thessaloniki, Arta, Lefkada, Ioannina, Filipiada and more) and budget is running low. To finish this part I am asking 0.35 ETH to cover travelling expenses to 3 more destinations (Corfu,Agrinio, Patra) as well as buy a few things I need (boards, shoes, trucks).

I've seen some really awesome spots in those cities and I do wanna skate them so bad hehe! Our current budget only allow us to do 1 day trips, not travel to further destinations and spend the night in hotels.

## How will impact be made?

Skate and film in the spots I want will hype me up to land dope tricks and complete the video part as I envisioned it. This will be the first ever GNARS athlete video part and I want it to be as GNAR'ly as it can get!

GNARS'ly video part will be uploaded to GNARS Youtube channel and will be a permanent advertisement for the DAO. Also hopefully this part motivates GNARS athletes to work on something bigger like a GNARS full video?!?

## Who's part of the team?

 - [Haris Housos](https://www.instagram.com/haris_housos/) or @knowhow92
 - [Andy Haroupias](https://www.instagram.com/andreas_haroupias/)

## When will it be done?

Deadline for filming is on April 30 and part will be delivered in May 2023.

## What happens if proposal doesn't get funded

Nothing really. There are always closer destinations we can visit and film so we'll keep doing those 1 day trips and hopefully we can find some cool spots to skate.

## Final words

Regardless the outcome of this prop thank you Gnars fam for motivating me to film a video part at my 30's, feels f*cking amazing! 

Full video is gonna be dope featuring never-skated-before street spots and will be dropping as an open edition NFT (still working on drop details).

proposals.body:
## TL;DR

+6 months has passed since [my first proposal](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0xe2d423fe8eb703977b61da957cae6a434ed8c7ba38623f42834c667e0e9af620) in Gnars Dao. This proposal goal is to renew Vlad's Sponsor as Gnars Dao Skateboarder.

![](https://i.ibb.co/tMys9Bk/ezgif-com-video-to-gif-1.gif)
**Requesting (1 ETH/month X 4 months)** for 6 months term, 4 ETH total  + 1 Gnar

## Introduction

|Twitter|[Link](https://twitter.com/vladhzc)|

|-|-|


## What was porduced so far 

### [That's Gnarly Profile](https://thatsgnar.ly/user/0x41cb654d1f47913acab158a8199191d160dabe4a)

![](https://i.ibb.co/1Q8kNFB/ezgif-com-video-to-gif.gif)

### Passed Proposals

- [ I ⌐◨-◨ XV ](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0xb63306dbfe950dd9754d5edcf8f48c6ff9bdd32eeeff4c644cb90c974a3055fa)
- [ ETH Denver ](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0xd44c38a59adc8b086ec31e9c8759b2623dbea06421bbfabd65c19d72a2559289)
- [ Will Dias ](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0xde53e95d97d4c5660423d33a75630a9fb89c85c7773c172f3df9e39dd3546cf2)
- [ Pedro Nem ](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0xea949349fb4bdeb3bb2a69c2b92f6c2aca39908e6dcf09916569338e95f96c3b)

### Videos


| ![](https://i.imgur.com/zx1b5Nx.jpg) | ![Column 2](https://thumbs.odycdn.com/7d3993d1d96c71ed8db49645927cfe24.webp) | ![](https://i.imgur.com/7kdDStk.png) |![](https://i.imgur.com/e4mqYOM.jpg)|
| -------- | -------- | -------- |----|
| [ETH DENVER](https://thatsgnar.ly/thatsgnarly/creations/eth-denver-tour)     | [Bob and Vlad on TV with Noggles](https://skatehive.app/hive-173115/@xvlad/rucfdpzf)     | [DEVCON Video](https://skatehive.app/hive-173115/@xvlad/awztxfta) |[Cosmosverse](https://odysee.com/@vlad:e/medellin:5)|


#### Participation in talks in conferences like Innovation Week, Rio CryptoHub, ETH.Rio and Documentaries like NounsOTG

#### and lots of stickers =)    

#### Also will be producing photos and videos drops sharing revenue with the DAO + Daily web2 contente and weekly web3 content 

## Why should we?

I will do more than my best. If you think I made a positive impact in the Dao and I am likely continuing doing so, you should vote Yes 

Looking ahead, I have a few plans in mind that I believe will bring value to Gnars Dao and the skateboarding community:

**Assist with Pods:** I will work with other members to support the development of new pods and assist with any challenges they may face.
**Enhance Video Production for Travels:** I plan to improve the quality of my travel videos to better showcase the local skate scenes and to inspire other skateboarders to explore new places.
**Create Co-Branded Product Models:** I want to work with Gnars Dao to create co-branded product models, such as pro boards and clothing, that will represent the Gnars Dao brand and its mission to support skateboarders.
**Continue Positive Impact:** I will maintain my involvement in Gnars Dao and continue to take actions that have a positive impact on the community.
**Learn More Gnarly Trick:** Cause we need tricks    

## Random Stuff


| Dev Learning Stuff | Column 2 | 
| -------- | -------- | 
| [Gnars.Center](https://sktbrd.github.io/gnars-docs/)| Public Documentation and tutorials editable in github |
| [Gnars.Treasure](https://gnars-treasure.vercel.app/)| A tool for checking NFTs in Gnars and Thatsgnar.ly treasure
| [Skatehive.App](https://skatehive.app/) | monetized web3 social media for skateboarding content|

proposals.title: GnarsDAO x ComicsDAO - Gnarly tricks Strip comic + page for 0.69ETH
proposals.body:
## TL;DR
Gnars is to fund 1 page comic drawing + comic strip which shows Gnarthlete Tom Rohrer teaching Skate tricks featuring out Mascot Noun 189 Skateboard
**Requesting 0.69  ETH** for supporting Comics DAO selected artist draw up GnarsDAO character in Nouns Comic 

![](https://i.imgur.com/mFDedvF.jpg)


## Introduction
The proposal is for NounsComics, a new comic book company that plans to release a monthly cc0 Nouns comic for nationwide distribution. An initial 6-issue series was commissioned by NounsDAO

0.69 ETH is to fund the drawing of gnarly artwork which we can auction off and do a Droposal, but the essence of this proposal is to get gnarsDAO and all the extremely gnarly stuff we do into the Nouns Funded nouns Comic


## How will impact be made?
Having GnarsDAO as an **AD-Page** in-front all the people that are going to be reading this comic sets us up as a cornerstone community in the Nouniverse.

it is an opportunity to grow our community and produce valuable content. I believe it will be an effective way to reach more people and increase interest in the Nouns project.

## Who's part of the team?

ComicsDAO Team will be coordinating the art and Print our for this. You Can Check out ComicsDAO Ad Pages in their [discord](https://discord.gg/pgMsp8rPJe) w/ Gogo offering Technical Support
Gnars AD Page Discord Thread: https://discord.com/channels/939895116276060180/1067774436251545670

## When will it be done?
Nouns: Nountown’ will be released in April of 2023, but the size of the print run will be determined by aggregate demand at the end of February.


## Why should we?

Having GnarsDAO in Nouns Comic is a great way to proliferate the long-term growth and prosperity of the GnarsDAO project because it is a fun and engaging way to share a story about Nouns with other people as well as a very effective way to reach new people and grow our community.

proposals.title: Sponsor Ashanti Maurice and Tyler Nelson w/ 3 ETH for That’s Gnarly IRL Activation
proposals.body:
NOTE: This Proposal is a re-imbursement proposal to Ser Gami for putting up 3ETH for Ashanti to be able to execute this "time urgent" proposal. read Below for Ashanti's Proposal
Tx Info: https://etherscan.io/tx/0xccf2ab1aa34ec2e5d13e917ff2fb01d437fba9807f6f6b699eea903bc72e2aa1

## TL;DR

Requesting a 3ETH travel grant for an on ground That's Gnarly" Activation and onboarding 15-20 new shredders/athletes at Pharmacy Skate Shop in Hollywood, Mystery Skateboards + Church On Sunday's w/ Stevie Williams all happening in LA. Plus another That's Gnarly **Expressions Session** in New Jersey.

## Introduction

Yoo what's up everyone its Ashanti. Hope all has been well. As you know I've been heavily building with Gnars Dao on our new platform (Thatsgnar.ly) I still cant believe how fast we are building the Gnars/Nouns Ecosystem throughout all action sports without energy drinks. Huge milestone for Athletes and Humanity right there!

It's almost been a whole year since I've been affiliated with Gnars/Nouns Dao, and would love to continue to keep building and growing my relationships with everyone who participates.

I've been a part of the Pharmacy boardshop Hollywood family since 2015. This proposal is a collaborative effort to Onboard High valued Skateboarding Athletes, Filmmakers, Photographers, Musicians, and artist (Shredders)

![](https://i.imgur.com/CuO1qPy.jpg)

**Pharmacy Boardshop** - Hollywood is owned By (Brian Herman) A super OG [Baker Boys Distribution] And [Pharmacy team member] He was actually one of the first to be put on both teams in early 2000s

This shop just got a huge upgrade and moved three doors over in our building complex we've been renting at for decades.(perks of a super cool landlord). now the shop can hold ginormous, indoor and outdoor events.

![](https://i.imgur.com/hGeqaqM.jpg)


### The Event!
One of our Gnars Dao skateboarders **DeeBo** is turning Pro as well as **James Fitz** (soon to be a Gnars Dao Skater) There will be a DJ, Food Drinks, Videogames, Artist art, Musicians all covered by Pharmacy and the Mystery Teams.

Venue is Pharmacy Boardshop Hollywoods Newest Location 1520 North Cahuenga Blvd, Hollywood,CA 90028

![](https://i.imgur.com/9ebDlHM.jpg)

NOTE: We Will be filming a Gnars Project, Like Bennie and Carlson for Youtube w/ the pharmacy crew

## What are all the details?

We are going to purchase 3 Boxes of Big klim's noggle 10pc carton 1 of each (Red/black/white) - These Noggles will be given to the Pharmacy & Mystery team members over in LA, Church on Sunday w/ Steve Williams & DGK,  New Jersey Expression Sessions
![](https://i.imgur.com/HWN9KbO.jpg)
![](https://i.imgur.com/AhiVhRd.jpg)

This ETH ask, Should cover my flight and one of the Mystery skate team riders (TNelz) flights to and from LA,CA including hotel stay. (Also for Deebo's cousin Tim who tought him and I how to skateboard) I think it would be cool to suprise him with a Family member at the event, they'll both be staying with me.

## List of Onboards / Impact

1. Pharmacy Skateboard Shop Riders(100+Team members) [all will be at event 03/03/23]

2. Mystery Skateboards (10+Team members) [all will be at event 03/03/23]

3. DGK Skateboards (20+Team members)[Most will be at event 03/03/23] I will be with the whole Team on Sunday for our [Church on Sundays Event at JKwon] aka (Ledge Heaven) which is held by Stevie Williams every Sunday at the same location.
4. ![](https://i.imgur.com/ZgH16Z6.jpg)

You'll never know how many goats can be at 1 place at the same time.

4. Baker Boys Distribution (BBD Team Riders 30+) [All will be at Event 03/03/23]


### After L.A. That's Gnarly Activation 
on 03/11/23 I should already be back on the East Coast in New Jersey setting up for the next Event at a DIY skate spot hidden in A field (a.k.a. in the woods)
Will live stream the event on our thatsgnarly IG page. All footage will be filmed by our very own Gnars Dao filmer ***floralshirtguy***. full length footage will be posted to Gnars Youtube + Skatehive. Single clips with be posted by participants on (thatsgnar.ly)

![](https://i.imgur.com/1JwtKaZ.jpg)

This should be the best time to try a new contest format on (Thatsgnar.ly) platform by adding a contest or event tab where all events will have their own collection. full length video, photos, and the top tricks of the event become a ***Collectors Collection Pack***

### Each Winning Trick in this competition Will win 1 Gnar NFT + 4 That's Gnarly Editions 
1. Best trick contest. [1 GnarNFT]
2. off the kicker over something [1 GnarNFT]
3. Manny mania [1 GnarNFT]
4. Best line [1 GnarNFT]
5. Tricks for ETH [1 GnarNFT]

### Companies that'll be at event in New Jersey.

1. Hue skateboards and Team.
2. AllIknowisgoon Skateboard clothing brands
3. NJ skateshop and Team
4. Travel skateshop and Team
5. Pro skateboard shop and Team
6. Dogwood skateshop and Team

## Budget Breakdown
* Travel to L.A. + Flyback to New Jersey (2 Athletes) - 2ETH
* Hotel Accomodation (2 Athletes) - 0.5ETH
* Big Shot Klim's Noggles (3 Boxes) + shipping - 0.5ETH
* Contest Prizes - 5 Gnars NFTS + 20 That's Gnarly Editions

proposals.title: That's Gnarly Gas Costs + Gas refund for Gami & Rocketman + Gnarly Trivia Prizes
proposals.body:
### TL;DR

Requesting 1.7 ETH to cover Thats Gnarly Gas Fees for 1 month + Refund Gami + Rocketman for Gas costs they have incured for past drops + Gnarly Trivia Prize Pool

### That's Gnarly Gas Cost + Refund Breakdown + Gnarly Trivia Prize Pool
1. That's Gnarly Edition Deployment Gas costs (1 month) - 1 ETH
2. Gami - 0.18ETH
3. Rocketman - 0.42 ETH
4. Gnarly Trivia Payments (1 month) - 0.1 ETH

### Introduction
One of the most significant challenges we have encountered is the high gas cost associated with deploying NFT editions on That's Gnarly. These costs have made it difficult to have a daily drops on some days, limiting our potential user base from growing.

### What are all the details?
To overcome this challenge, we propose to introduce a new initiative that will subsidize the gas costs associated with deploying That's Gnarly Editions on the Ethereum network. We have estimated the highest gas fee we have encountered during these drops is 55$ - 60$ on a high gas fee day.

55$ X 30 Daily Drops ~ 1 ETH cost per month to deploy these editions (Ununsed gas fees will be carried over to next month)

### Gas Refund for Gami + Rocketman

Gami and Rocketman have incurred significant gas expenses in their endeavors. We recognize the importance of compensating them for these costs, and we believe that it is in the best interest of the platform to do so. By reimbursing them for these costs, we hope to incentivize and motivate other community members to contribute and create similar projects and initiatives that will benefit our platform.

### Gnarly Trivia Prizes
Offering a prize for a trivia can incentivize more people to attend the Twitter space, leading to higher levels of engagement, interaction, and participation and this helps in Building community: A prize can bring people together around a common interest, creating a sense of community and shared experience.

proposals.title: Sponsor Rickyday Surftrip in Indonesia w/ 0.43 ETH to make Gnars Surf Content
proposals.body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/QmqVfRD.jpg)


Hey Gnars Fam, I'm Rickyday and going for a surftrip in Indonesia.

When? March 23 to April 23 (1 month).


### Who is Rickyday

31y Brazilian, Graduated in business school in São Paulo, always passion about the ocean, started producing surf championship in 2011 to 2015, the first event with 300 people in audience and the last one was 5.000 people at the beach.
At the end of each championship there was crazy surf parties.

![](https://i.imgur.com/TpcZM6x.jpg)

![](https://i.imgur.com/5yVRXGp.jpg)

Mid 2012 Red Bull found me and I worked with them helping in sports events and new athletes.

![](https://i.imgur.com/dmbl2fJ.jpg)

All my life I participated in amateur championship and won a few, I'm not a pro, but do my best.

![](https://i.imgur.com/NMgW55u.jpg)

![](https://i.imgur.com/VTOdg6I.jpg)

In 2018 I discouvered the Skipper life and start working as boat delivery and captain for charters. The surf is still my main Hobby, and as you can see, I'm always at the sea.


![](https://i.imgur.com/PL9KGqn.jpg)

![](https://i.imgur.com/u0GNHVX.png)

![](https://i.imgur.com/i2phgZ0.jpg)


Until today, I always helped athletes to get sponsored for what they do, and web3/Nouns world already provided opportunities for my athletes as [Nico Karolla](https://www.instagram.com/nico_karolla/) (Gnars athlete) and [Sunny Pires](https://www.instagram.com/sunnypires_oficial/) (sponsored by Nouns small grants).

## Proposal

Well, in Indonesia, the dream place for surfers, I'm going to spend 1 month with my girlfriend and visit a few different islands (Bali, java and Lombok), so it would be a perfect place for making Gnars content.

#### The Idea

The main Idea is to produce material for Gnars in all my midias, I will have gopro to film in the water, and want to hire filmakers and photographers for my surf.

In addition, as said on proposal thread, I will try to present gnars for the owner of the hotel to figure out how we can have do a partnership, so everyone who has gnars can stay at the hotel or discount for gnars travellers.

will try to make some small informal event to present gnars for the surfers I meet to onboard them. 

I will visit at least 3 different island and want to hire filmakers for media content.

Will do every day story on Instagram, post twice a week on IG, twitter and surfHive. 

Thatsgnar.ly and gnars will be in every post in all midias.

* I will produce t-shirts to use when in land and 2 tshirts to use when surfing, to be shown in videos and photos.

![](https://i.imgur.com/qfJFix0.jpg)

* already have hats (five panel model).

![](https://i.imgur.com/bOrGkDt.jpg)

* Stickers with nogles for surfboard with gnars.wtf written, I'll have 2 board
1 - 5'1 old school progressive twin fin model
2 - 5'11 progressive surf

![](https://i.imgur.com/bisIBct.jpg)

## Grants

0.43 ETH 

75% of the grants is filmaker payment, around 100-150 USD / hour.

The rest is to produce the phisical materia, 100USD for t-shirts and stickers, 100USD to by photographs.

The Grants asked is not to pay any cost of the trip, but to produce material and hire filmaker and photographers to make content for medias, and will be available for gnars to use how the community likes, cc0 material.

Hope you all liked the proposal.

Wallet adress for deposit

proposals.title: Small funding for Gnars Jam Session Retweet Pickers
proposals.body:
## TL;DR
Requesting 1.38 ETH to cover 10 weeks in retro and 10 weeks going forward of retweet pickers on the Gnars Jam Session Twitter space each week.

## Description
We’ve been running the Gnars Jam Session space on The Noun Square Twitter for 23 weeks.
Running a retweet picker to get people retweeting the space and more people to join is a valuable tool.
TNS has covered a bunch of these which wasn’t the initial intention and I’d like to repay 10 previous retweet pickers as well as fund 10 more into the future with this prop.
I’m requesting 1.38 ETH to cover a total of 20 spaces at 0.069 ETH each, 10 past and 10 future.

Requesting 1.5 ETH to commissioning gnarly resident gnartist April (@0xaprilia: https://twitter.com/0xaprilia) for 1 Open Edition Artwork + 2 free gnarnivesary Deck Designs Drop to celebrate our 1st year Gnarniversary ( all art is released as cc0)
 
![0xaprilia2.jpeg](ipfs://bafkreiawu5n74tbds4lyykzfbt7bc3oi27y7ozxvi64tzon7w3wf65xtkq)
    
## Introduction
After Deep consultation, we established that GnarsDAO  was published on Feb 15. Here is a Link to the transaction : https://etherscan.io/tx/0x9ec03f513d6cdc5df9e38ec023768742c40f73acba0fcd14d46594562e5dabae

This Proposal is to commission 0xaprilia to create artwork that celebrates this day for us which shall be minted as an open edition on Feb, 15th for 69hours

## A word from April?
Hi! I'm April. I'm a digital and traditional artist for almost 4 years with my style is mostly focus on doodle and cartoon. I've been active as a nounish community since July 2022 and now I'm part of Nouncil and NounsID. 
Since last year, I've been participating and won several nouns art contest like skateboard design contest, TNS art contest, and many more. I made various commison for several project, like Nouns Name Service (NNS), Alps DAO, Tiny Dinos, Ugly DAO and more. I also made several POAP's for TNS and Nouncil. 
You can check my previous work here :
![](https://i.imgur.com/abJ6W51.jpg)

## How will impact be made?
Having a Drop on our gnarniversary is a great chance to celebrate the 1 year we have accomplished together: A point to look back and Look ahead. A commemorative art work which give you access to mint 2 free deck designs by April.

## When will it be done?
Drop will be on February 15th, 2022: As Open Edition for 69hours and revenue will be shared 50% to Gnars Treasury, 25% to Artist and 25% to Proposer

Any Questions or discussions: Please refer to Discord Thread 

https://discord.com/channels/928811922244137020/1071870866318700695

proposals.title: Commission 5 web3 Musicians to make gnarly cc0 music
proposals.body:
## TL;DR
 Requesting 3 ETH to commission 5 preselected web3 musicians to create moore Gnarly cc0 music to be used by gnarthletes or gnartists in their creative edits for videos and

### Introduction
A few weeks back as i was brainstorming more ideas of growing gnarsDAO brand into the music space, i contacted [DFreshmaker](https://twitter.com/TheDFreshmaker) to see how we can get together a cohort of web3 musicians to experiment with cc0 music.

We came up with this idea of having 5 musicians to create a gnarsDAO EP, thats will be released as an Open edition collaborating with all the communities where these artists are apart of.

### List of Artists working on this cc0 Music EP

### 1. Jack Frost | Alien DJ [(@NftFrost)](https://twitter.com/NftFrost)
![](https://i.imgur.com/ex02Vrt.jpg)
Jack Frost is an Alien DJ from a distant planet. He is the Founder and CEO of Jack Frost Labs, a Metaverse Entertainment company. Jack is widely recognized as one of the most innovative music artists in web3. He has sold out 10X NFT collections and performed hundreds of Metaverse concerts. He has built a robust community of fans and supporters and is known as one of the top music NFT artists in the world. 

### 2. Ambi3 [(@AmbieNFT)](https://twitter.com/AmbieNft) 
![](https://i.imgur.com/vxJb8Us.jpg)

After touring in hardcore bands for two decades, Ambi3 has settled into his synth cave and become one of web3s music’s earliest producers, first in 2017 on the Steem blockchain as drum_operator and later through top ranked OpenSea Music NFT, AmbieNFT. Ambi3’s music has been featured prominently in major placements on HBO, Netflix and TBS and accompanied games from Microsoft and Twisted Pixel. Wherever crypto music boundaries are being pushed, Ambi3 will be found.

### 3. Jadyn Violet [(@JadynViolet)](https://twitter.com/jadynviolet)
![](https://i.imgur.com/RrA2UUQ.jpg)
Jadyn Violet grew up in New Jersey with a dream. Dropping out of college in pursuit for something greater, he navigated the underground music scene and rose against doubters as an innovator. Now he is an interdisciplinary creative using unconventional technology to pave the way for future generational artists.

### 4. Bobby Yaps [(@BobbyYapsNFT)](https://twitter.com/BobbyYapsNFT)
![](https://i.imgur.com/PwjqAS8.jpg)

Bobby Yaps is a multi-instrumentalist, composer, and music educator from New York. Bobby has over 20 years of experience in the New York City and Greater New York live music scene, and has extensive experience as a studio musician/vocalist and freelance composer. He has also collaborated with dozens of artists in many styles. Currently, Bobby is focusing much of his musical efforts on web3 as the creator and composer of the music and metaverse project, Soundscapes NFTs, and plans to release a rock album on the blockchain in 2023. 

### 5. The GX Universe [(@TheGXUniverse)](https://twitter.com/thegxuniverse)
![](https://i.imgur.com/VSz7i0f.jpg)

Manin Gauba, also known as Gx, is an American rapper, director, and animator. He first began his career in 2018, filming interviews with Dj Drewski and Hip Hop Mike on Hot 97. In 2021 he founded ‘The Gx Universe’, an independent, multimedia studio redefining what it means to be an independent artist in today's day and age. By combining music, cinematic visuals/animation, and AR/VR technology to create immersive experiences, Gx is raising the bar and pushing the boundaries as he reshapes the way we think of and consume media.

## Executive Producer
### DFreshmaker (@TheDFreshmaker)
![Dfreshmaker](https://i.imgur.com/ZW64P78.png)
DFreshmaker is a staple of the web3 music scene, finding his way into the ecosystem in September of 2021. DFresh has been instrumental in helping several musicians plan for and release music NFTs, as well as has been planning metaverse and physical concerts during this time frame. Artists Dfresh has worked with include Jack Frost, The Polish Ambassador and Grace Weber, among many others. Events include the 2022 NFT NYC Alien Invasion at IMI Studios, the Superlounge house party during Art Basel Miami and curating a stage during the 2nd Annual Metaverse Music Festival inside Decentraland.

### How will impact be made?
Music and extreme sports is like peanut butter and jelly, they all go well together, having gnarsDAO starting to play in the music NFT scene while creating culturally relevant music that can be used in the cc0 nature is a perfect way to fullfill the virtous cycle

### When will it be done?
After the success of Proposal, transactions to deal with the dispersing of ETH (3ETH/6 people) = everyone gets 0.5ETH upfront! Then wen we are ready to mint the cc0 EP, 50% will go back to gnars treasury + 50% will be shared amongst ourselves, plus proposer included! 
Track EP should be ready for debut after 2 weeks of Transaction executions. 
All Artwork created + music will be made available on nounsounds.wtf

### Why should we?
This 5 Track EP is going to be auctioned off as an Open edition for 69 hours and gnarsDAO gets back 50% as usual, but the rest is split between everyone else who has worked on the project, even us who are putting it together. having a 2.69% royalty on a cc0 music piece is kinda like having a house which pays you rent non stop

proposals.title: Collect Royalties for the Treasury on Secondary Sales
proposals.body:
## TL;DR

Let’s collect royalties on secondary sales on NFT marketplaces (like OpenSea) that will fund our treasury. While we don’t want to make this a core revenue stream, it will help keep us funded in the near-term and it is something we can always adjust in the future. If we approve this prop, we will seek to collect 4.2069% in royalties on secondary sales. There is no funding request for ETH! This prop is guaranteed to be profitable. 

## Introduction

Hi Gnarfam! I’m Gnarley-Quinn and I spend most of Gnar time in the auctions channel going pew pew pew. I’m an over-the-hill and retired (amateur) snowboarder and skater now living in Florida, USA, and with my wife, I’m raising what I hope to be two gnarly athletes. I’m a big believer in the Gnars ecosystem and want us to succeed internationally. My proposal does not seek any ETH and will only add ETH to the treasury!

## What are all the details and impact?

Most NFT projects collect a percentage of sales when an NFT is sold on a marketplace such as OpenSea. These are called royalties or creator fees and the amount collected varies from project to project, but typically ranges from 2.5% to 10%. For example, if you sold a Bored Ape Yacht Club (BAYC) NFT for 100 ETH on OpenSea, where the BAYC creator (Yuga Labs) collects 2.5% royalties, the creator would receive 2.5 ETH and you would receive 97.5 ETH from the buyer’s 100 ETH paid to purchase the NFT. While the typical Gnars secondary sale is much less and would only generate a fraction of this ETH, every gwei counts.

![BAYC 2023-02-04 013338.png](ipfs://bafkreiee65bs2vvha6nadcyr6otgf5yncx7oyfobxutl6b4j6e6pkz7gda)
    
To bring this concept home, let’s look at what we could have added to the treasury if we had royalties at the launch of the Gnars collection. For this example, let’s say we had launched with 4.20% royalties. According to OpenSea, as of February 3, 2023, Gnars and Gnars OG had approximately 86 ETH in secondary sales. That would be 3.61 ETH added to our treasury – enough to sponsor an athlete! And as recent sales and auction prices have shown, Gnar values are going up. With increased floor and mint prices, secondary sales volume will also increase, bringing us even more royalties. 

To collect royalties, we only need our Board to notify the relevant marketplaces and designate a wallet to receive them. While some marketplaces do not honor royalties, this should not be a concern for us on OpenSea. 

I’m a firm believer in royalties as I think it is one of the best things about NFTs, allowing revenue to flow back to a project’s artist, founder and team members for continuing to create value. The more popular a project becomes, sales volume typically rises and royalties paid to the supporting project increase. It’s a virtuous cycle and something that I think can greatly benefit the Gnars ecosystem. 

## When will it be done?

As soon as the Board notifies the marketplaces, it usually only takes a business day or two for the royalty system to be set up. As we will be reliant on these third parties, we can't guarantee timing. 

## Why should we?

This is low-hanging fruit for generating revenue. Based on trading activity to date, we do not expect the introduction of royalties to have any significant impact on volume. And we can always revisit our royalties to tweak or remove them in the future. Last, and most importantly, royalties make the eth machine go brrrrr!

proposals.title: Gnarly Smoke Lounge/Co-Working Space @ ETHDenver🤘
proposals.body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/wReXTRa.jpg)

**DISCLAIMER: This proposal is only for the ETH ask. Gami is assisting us to set up a multiSend transaction function that will be published as a follow-up proposal for the Gnars NFTs to be withdrawn*

***tl;dr***

Asking for 6 ETH and 5 Gnars from the treasury for Pin.Pusher and Vlad to promote Gnars DAO as ambassadors at ETHDenver and will sponsor a 2-day hangout/workspace at the only legal cannabis consumption social club in Denver, Colorado. The location is in the heart of the Rino Art District in Denver, surrounded by bars and restaurants, and roughly a 5-minute drive from the ETHDenver venue.  Funding will go towards rental fees of the location for 2 days, allow *FREE* entry to any ETHDenver attendee with an ETHDenver ticket or badge along with Gnars DAO members, creating limited merchandise for giveaways, video production of the event, pop-up booth set up, food, snacks and non-alcoholic drinks (alcohol is not permitted at cannabis events per city ordinance), 69 free pre-rolled joints per day for attendees, Gnars DAO talks, a Gnarly skate session-*weather permitting*, a Tony Hawk Pro Skater competition, and more Gnarly Sh**. The 5 Gnars from the treasury will be used for giveaways as onboarding opportunities during the sponsored event and skate session.

![](https://i.imgur.com/q5tTB8b.jpg)


***Event Details***

[ETHDenver](https://www.ethdenver.com/) is the longest running ETH event in the world and where a lot of really amazing things have been created, such as our beloved POAP protocol. Last year during the 2022 event, roughly 20,000 people showed up from around the world just for this annual event and it is projected to be even more this year. The event has grown so much that they moved all the way across the city of Denver and will now be held at the National Western Complex instead of the Sports Castle like last year. ETHDenver is an event where projects, builders, creators, companies, and more come to present themselves and their ideas to the masses. The event has always been a short way away from the side events; pop-up galleries, small concerts, meet-ups, and so much more are all going on apart from the actual ETHDenver main event. The event is broken up into three different sections, BUIDLWeek (February 24th-March 1st), the Main Event (March 2nd-March 5th), then followed by snowboarding/skiing Mountain Retreat in Breckenridge, CO (March 6th-March 9th).

The Gnarly Smoke Lounge and Co-Working Space will be a 2-day event will be open at Tetra Lounge (details on the venue below) on March 2nd and 3rd from 12pm-10pm. We have the opportunity to transform the entire location into a Gnarly hangout for anyone who attends ETHDenver or holds a Gnar to come chill, smoke, and work on things for free. The location will also be open to the public with the normal entry fee for the venue. Pin.Pusher and Vlad will be hosting daily Gnars DAO talks at 4:20pm to explain how the DAO is run, how to join, becoming a sponsored athlete or artist, the new That's Gnarly platform, and any other related questions attendees might have. We will also be joining the Gnars Jam Session and the That's Gnarly Daily Drop Twitter spaces live from the event. We will utilize the existing amenities to showcase Gnars and Gnartwork all over the place along with some of our favorite skate/snowboard/surf videos to make sure everyone feels the Gnarly vibe. We will also be displaying the Gnars auctions live via a projector so people can follow along with the bidding activity, and we will assist them in making their own bids. Being a local to Denver, Pin.Pusher has some connections with a handful of food trucks we will be reaching out to come pop-up out front. Depending on the pricing, will try to cover the cost of some of the food trucks to give out free food to attendees. We will also be bringing in a handful of artists to hang out with us to do some live painting throughout the day. Along with everything named here, we will also be hosting a Tony Hawk Pro Skater tournament where the top competitors will be taking home their own Gnars as prizes; 1st place will receive 0.1 ETH + 1 Gnar and 2nd place will receive 1 Gnar. 

![](https://i.imgur.com/FBjoBUz.jpg)


***Location***

[Tetra Lounge](https://www.tetralounge.com/) is the first, and currently the only, legal cannabis consumption social club in Denver, CO. They offer a safe and enjoyable environment to consume your cannabis products while socializing with like-minded individuals. To rent the location out entirely, it will cost 1 ETH per day for a total of 2ETH for the 2 days. This will give us access to transform the venue however we please along with covering the entry fees for all ETHDenver attendees who present their ticket or badge. This will also cover any Gnars holders who are not attending ETHDenver. Normally it would cost anyone $20 per day to enter but that fee will be fully taken care of with the daily 1ETH budget over the 2-day event. Tetra Lounge is in the heart of the Rino Art District in Denver (think smaller version of Wynwood, Miami where Art Basel is held), surrounded by murals, bars, restaurants, and other pop-up venues and is one of the most popular areas in Denver and also the closest area to the National Western Complex venue where people will go to eat, drink, and hangout. Our location is roughly a 5-minute drive or around a 20-minute skate from the ETHDenver venue. The capacity of Tetra Lounge is 100 people inside but could be up to 250 guests including the fenced in back patio area-**weather permitting*. 

On location, they have 8 tv's we can use to display Gnartwork, skate videos, and use for the THPS tournament. They have an Xbox for each of the 8 tv's if we need to use all 8 for the tournament. There is also a projector we will have access to for anything to display things at a larger scale. We thought it might be fun to use the projector to display the Gnars auctions and the That's Gnarly daily drops on the screen along with some Gnartworks and Gnars and potentially our championship round of the THPS tournament. 

![](https://i.imgur.com/pazvqRN.jpg)



***Merchandise and Other Giveaways***
*Everyone loves free sh***

We will be ordering 138 shirts to give away during the event days. 69 white shirts with the black Gnars branding and 69 black shirts with the white Gnars branding, around $8-$10 per shirt. Since size large is the most common size, we will be ordering them all the same size for easiest and quickest distribution. Shirts will be limited to 69 given away per day to ensure we will have enough over the 2-day period. We will also be ordering 420 3"x3" die-cut stickers, around $0.50 per sticker, using Illustradora's Gnarly skateboard logo. Any leftover merch will be handed out during ETHDenver, on-site of the event.

We will also be providing 69, 1-gram pre-rolled joints per day for all who join us at Tetra Lounge. Pin.Pusher can claim a 30% discount from a local dispensary from past collaborations which will bring the cost of each pre-rolled joint down to roughly $2 a piece, not including taxes. We want to hold a handful of the pre-rolls to be passed out during our 4:20pm Gnars DAO talks to get everyone locked in and Gnarly during it.

The 5 Gnars will be given out accordingly; the top 2 finishers of the THPS tournament will each receive 1 Gnar and the top 3 finishers of the Gnarly Skate Session will all receive 1 Gnar each. If we are unable to do the Gnarly Skate Session due to weather, we will be holding raffles to give those final 3 Gnars out to attendees over the 2-day event. 

![](https://i.imgur.com/tKejAO7.jpg)


***Gnarly Skate Session***
**Weather Permitting* 

[Rino Art Skatepark](https://speakeasyskate.com/rino) was created in 2021 as a free, public, skateable art installation. The park is a small, 2,000 sqft concrete park made up of mostly transitions that was once a water drainage area. The park is located right in the middle of the route between ETHDenver and Tetra Lounge, almost an equal distance from the park to either venue tucked away around some apartment buildings and restaurants. Currently there are no lights at the park so any skating will need to occur during the daytime and completed before our 4:20pm Gnars DAO talk. With it being the end of February/beginning of March, there is always the potential of a snowstorm rolling into Denver at this time of year. 

With permission from the weather gods, we will be hosting a 1-day *BEST TRICK CONTEST*. Skaters will have an allotted amount of time to perform their Gnarlist trick at the park in a head-to-head style tournament with the winner of each match up moving on to the next round. Skaters will be randomly paired up to compete against one another. Winners are to be voted on by the crowd via cheering to continue the feel of decentralized/community style voting. The skater who wins it all will receive 0.25 ETH + 1 Gnar. 2nd and 3rd place will receive 1 Gnar each. 

**ALL SKATERS WILL BE REQUIERED TO SIGN A WAIVER IN ORDER TO PARTICIPATE IN CONTEST*

![](https://i.imgur.com/8wUP78m.jpg)

***Gnarketing***

ETHDenver officially begins on Feburary 24th with its #BUIDLWeek, so we will be taking this opportunity to go meet everyone on-site and pass out flyers, stickers, and invite people in person to join us for our Gnarly hangout on March 2nd and 3rd to find out more about Gnars DAO. We will make sure to have plenty of these flyers printed to not only hand-out, but to also leave around the city at different skate shops, smoke shops, food markets, art spaces, and other Gnarly spots around Denver in order to maximize the amount of people who might be interested in attending. Along with the physical flyers, we will be promoting the event to all social media platforms using the same image.

![](https://i.imgur.com/YfMHzUx.jpg)


***Budget Breakdown***
Venue Rental - 2 ETH
Merch/Giveaway Items - 1.15 ETH
Contest ETH Prizes - 0.35 ETH
Food and Drinks - 0.4 ETH
Gnarketing - 0.1 ETH
Live Painters (2) - 0.5 ETH (0.25 ETH each)
Video Production - 0.5 ETH
Gnars Ambassadors (2) - 1 ETH (0.5 ETH each)

5 Gnars NFT's for Prizes/Giveaways

Total = 6 ETH + 5 Gnars

![](https://i.imgur.com/PUsjxpe.png)

*Please view discussion on [Discord](https://discord.com/channels/928811922244137020/1065843424399458376) for any further details or questions you may have.*

proposals.title: Set the stage for others to shine
proposals.body:
## TL;DR

**Requesting 6.66 ETH** for [Volky](https://twitter.com/volkyeth) to complete a series of technical upgrades that further decentralise Gnars and prepare us for the obstacles ahead.

This proposal reimburses 0xigami.eth with 3 ETH for [this transaction](https://etherscan.io/tx/0x71edc5e03d86f22b3bfc0aa7ab0cacb2373968a9ad8c95bd2b5d8c584c42eaf6) and pays volky.eth the remaining 3 ETH for delivery. 

I'm also asking for 0.66 ETH to cover miscellaneous expenses incurred by Volky, such as deployment gas refunds.


## Summary

Here's an overview of the tasks Volky is helping us with. I have already paid him 3 ETH upfront to commence work with an expected lead time of 2-3 weeks. 

### Scope of work

- Protocol upgrades

    - Replace auction house to include time extensions
    - Migrate gnosis safe and snapshot to DAO executor

        - Gnars V2 as main voting token (regular weight)
        - Gnars OG as 2nd voting token (double weight)

- Frontend upgrades 

    - Update content where required
    - Deploy voting and delegation ui
    - Show auctions until gnarving
    - Add download PNG button
    - Display traits on mobile
    - Resolve .⌐◨-◨ names 

- Backend upgrades

    - Migrate our hosting to Vercel
    - Setup auto deploy new builds
    - Refactoring and optimisation

## Further details

Volky has been collaborating with Sammdec to ensure we make the most of work already done, I've included some further information below for transparency:

### Gnars Tokens 

Gnars OG: `0x494715b2a3c75dadd24929835b658a1c19bd4552`
Gnars V2: `0x558BFFF0D583416f7C4e380625c7865821b8E95C`

### Gnars Auction House 

AuctionHouse Proxy: `0xc28e0d3c00296dd8c5c3f2e9707361920f92a209`
AuctionHouse: `0x46e57901ea1edd8a200cf982af4fd8cc3a957974`
ProxyAdmin: `N/A`

### Nouns Auction House 

AuctionHouseProxy: `0x830bd73e4184cef73443c15111a1df14e495c706`
AuctionHouse: `0xf15a943787014461d94da08ad4040f79cd7c124e`
ProxyAdmin: `0xc1c119932d78ab9080862c5fcb964029f086401e`

### Nouns DAO contracts 

NounsDAOProxy: `0x6f3e6272a167e8accb32072d08e0957f9c79223d`
NounsDAOLogicV2: `0x51c7d7c47e440d937208bd987140d6db6b1e4051`
NounsDAOExecutor: `0x0bc3807ec262cb779b38d65b38158acc3bfede10`


### Additional considerations

Volky has taken a careful and considered approach to planning for the changes. Our discussion has led to a number of gas optimisations, an innovative approach to our dual token voting arrangement (OG and V2), building out a test suite, and getting our GitHub setup properly with a full mono-repo like Nouns DAO.

Looking forward to setting the stage for others to shine and helping steward Gnars DAO to greater heights and a brighter future.

[Gami](https://twitter.com/0xigami) ⌐◨-◨

### Skateboaders Athletes Event Tournaments , Raffles Merchs & Some Stuff , Watch Party & Creating New cc0 Gnars Obstacles Design! ###

![](https://i.imgur.com/Lvs3RG9.png)

### Introduction
Whats up Gnars Fam! It's me [bossjcrypto](https://twitter.com/MemanJeff) a Community member of FilipiNouns, internatioNouns & other subdaos of nouns . I'm also a active prop builder, crypto enthusiast, marketer, proliferator and a community manager of a skateboard club called "[Ground Catch](https://www.facebook.com/GroundCatchTuguegarao)" composed of tons of Great Filipino Skateboard Atheletes. I’ve been in the Gnars community for about 5 months.

**WHO ARE WE?**

[Ground Catch (GC) Skateborders Club](https://www.facebook.com/GroundCatchTuguegarao) is a filipino skateboarder club, founded in 2010. We are just a small group and continue to seek support from our goverment,  but to no avail. But... We are not giving up! We continute to participate in many sketeboard tournaments from other cities to represent our club. As a community manager, I see Gnars as a wonderful opportunity to help our club by getting support from our Gnars Community. I am very thankful to start this proposal because i believe that this is gonna be a huge help for us to build a massive interaction IRL to proliferate Gnars Dao & to onboard new members to our club, Gnars, and to get our club more active.

In 2019, during the pandemic crisis, we managed to keep practicing and joining tournaments just for us to get some funds to help our co-skateboarding members.  Here are some of our achievement from the past 13 years!

### Description

We will also be coordinating with our LGUs (local government units) for outreach into our local community.

proposals.title: [Prop 47]  Gnars Hive Account Managemenet
proposals.body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/3YlPbhX.png)

*Screenshot from Gnars Hive account wallet taken on 1/23/2023*

TLDR : Asking 2.4 ETH funding for 3 months (0.8 Eth/month) for managing Gnars Hive blockchain account (activity, community building and treasury). 

### Some info about me

For those who don't know me my name is Haris or @knowhow92 on social, life-long skateboarder, Web 3 content creator, founder/ community manager of [Skatehive](https://discord.gg/skatehive) and board member/athlete of Gnars.DAO

I'm an active builder on Hive blockchain (former Steem) for 5 years and since October 2022 I'm managing Gnars account On Hive. 

### My GNARly work on Hive

Managing Gnars Hive account requires deep knowledge of how the social layer of Hive works like best hours for posting,tags used, post formation,people/projects/communities we follow/engage with etc., deep understanding of the blockchain itself and lots of hours of online activity weekly, just like every social media.

Some of the most note-worthy stuff I do for Gnars Hive account are

 - **Posting** : Currently posting from Gnars account 2 times a week. Some of those posts are mirroring [Gnarly News](https://peakd.com/hive-173115/@gnars/gnarly-news-13) by Satori, [Gnars shredding report](https://peakd.com/hive-173115/@gnars/gnars-shredding-report-january-05-january-11-2k23)  authored  by me on a weekly basis, [Gnarthly Hive growth report](https://peakd.com/hive-173115/@gnars/gnarthly-hive-growth-report) authored  by me on a monthly basis and more. 


 - **Curating** : A month ago after Gnars community voted "For" in [Skatehive's Decentralized Sponsorship Proposal](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x6100932649facab93f27106b0f8bf28194edb952e5c0866b9c297b850d72cedb),  Gnars Hive account [Powered up 11k Hive](https://peakd.com/hive-173115/@gnars/gnarly-11k-hive-power-up) so we can support extreme sports athletes on Hive. Since then we've distributed hundreds of dollars to skateboarders and surfers via upvotes on their content (curation) thanks to the awesome tokenomics of Hive and Gnars/Skatehive as well as partners (other projects on Hive). 

> When I'm curating content from Gnars account I always make sure I distribute rewards in a fair way and check every content thoroughly so I can be certain it's original. 

 - **Engagement** I am engaging in extreme sports athletes content (and some finance content) on a daily basis cause that's the best way to get noticed and build a solid following. 


 - **Hive Treasury Growth and Management** : I am growing Gnars Hive wallet daily either by posting, commenting or curating content on Hive blockchain. I am making sure all our rewards are managed correctly and split equally in both Hive and HBD (Hive stablecoin) so we can have both stability and safety in our account. 

----------------

### Benefits of an active Gnars Hive account?

**1) Supporting the artistry of extreme sports athletes**

Gnars Hive account distributes crypto rewards to all extreme sports athletes on Hive. What's more Web3 than distributing crypto rewards to every extreme sports athlete posting on a decentralized social media? Decentralized accounts, un-censorable content and tokenized interactions. A paradise for our athletes. 

On the screnshot bellow you can check the weekly stats inside Skathehive community and some of those $376 weekly pending rewards are coming from Gnars account.

*Screenshot taken on 1/13/2022*
![](https://i.imgur.com/2KdqKOj.png)

**2) Onboarding**

As we grown our reputation and treasury on Hive we'll get noticed more meaning more growth for our DAO. Hive users are all familiar with crypto and NFTs so it's definitely an audience we wanna capture.

About athletes onboarding, a bunch of folks from Skatehive and Hive have already joined Gnars and more will be coming if we keep of Gnars Hive account 
 in high levels.

**3) Decentralized Social Media**

Having an active online blog in one of the most-useds social blockchain right now is matters. No-one can delete our content, we're reaching out to like-minded people (athletes/investors/artists) and we're supporting the Web3 decentralized movement.

**4) Diversification**

Not having all our eggs in one basket is very healthy for a DAO. Our current stake on Hive is worth $4,391.030 at the moment of writing with Hive price at $0.39.

Our stake will only keep growing as we curate and create GNARly content and those rewards compound on a daily basis. Hive is a gift that keeps on giving.

### What to expect

I have many plans for Gnars Hive account in the near future if the community is with me on this one! Some of them are

 - Collaborate with Gnars community members and create more Gnarly content to post on our Hive blog, just like I currently do with Satori's [Gnarly News](https://gnarlynews.substack.com/)

 - Sponsoring Skatehive's upcoming “GetStoken” Contest  (more info soon) 

 - Creating arts and sports contests for our Hive followers

 - Growing our followers and engagement as well as our Hive treasury 
 
> You can check Gnars latest [Gnarthly Hive growth report](https://peakd.com/hive-173115/@gnars/gnarthly-hive-growth-report) for more info about Gnars Hive account and treasury growth.

### Requesting 2.4 ETH for 3 Months

I am requesting 0.8 ETH/month for my upcoming work on Gnars Hive account for the months of February, March and April. 

I have already recieved 0.8 ETH for managing [Gnars Hive account](https://stoken.wtf/@gnars/blog) 3 months ago when my [Sponsorship proposal to Gnars Dao](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x31d9113448e4dc06cf86cb8b2d94681297769fbe6cde158c24745c7eaf0f1b62) passed and if you're happy with the results so far you can vote "FOR" when this proposal goes live for voting. 

### What happens if proposal doesn't pass

As promised in [Skatehive's Decentralized Sponsorship Proposal](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x6100932649facab93f27106b0f8bf28194edb952e5c0866b9c297b850d72cedb) I am gonna keep posting the "Weekly Shredding Report" as well as mirror Satori's "Gnarly News" but will spend less time in growing Gnars reputation and treasury on Hive. 

What I am currently doing for Gnars on Hive is really time consuming so I am gonna keep it simple and won't engage in posts as well as think and execute account growth strategies such as new weekly posts and organising contests.   


---------

Thank you all for reading and feel free to ask me anything at [Gnars Discord](https://www.discord.gg/gnars), I'd be more than happy to answer all your questions.

Cheers and...

### SKATE4LIFE

![](https://i.imgur.com/vtVg3px.png)

proposals.title: Sponsor and add Carlos Salinas (professional skier) to Gnars Athlete Community.
proposals.body:
![Foto Carlos.jpg](ipfs://bafkreigsuysjhaanmcvf6alckwjbfoabglw5lazptfl66rpc5vim6heipy)
    Carlos Salinas (https://www.instagram.com/carlossalinasofficial/) is a young athlete pursuing a career to become a professional skier. Carlos would like to share the power of this sport and create gnarly content to spread the Garns spirit.

Carlos would like to get 3 ETH funding from Gnars to fund professional quality content documenting his life and growth as a professional athlete during this season and to explain how technology and this type of initiatives can really change the way of everything. 

Funding will be also used to get a nice helmet artwork done and create nice merch to share around.

Please find full proposal here

proposals.title: [Prop. 45] Commission Lil Bubble w/ 3ETH for 3 Tracks (cc0 music+Artwork, Timed Open Edition Mint)
proposals.body:
## Introduction ##
Lil Bubble is an established Web3-native character who has been releasing satirical songs and music videos for the community since 2019. His songs and remixes put a tongue-in-cheek spin on market events and have clocked over 8 million views, adding to the cultural fabric of the space with a comedic blend of music, video and niche subject matter.

![lilbubble1.jpeg](ipfs://bafkreidjozvtwjgayu6eop34gnoztirtozhykbt7dpa2w6ygruvzyncfpe)
    
His engaged crypto-centric audience and alignment with Nounish values (using creative remixes and finely-crafted memes to contribute to Web3 culture) make Lil Bubble a great asset to Nouns.

He has been a strong supporter and participant in the Nouns community - has featured Nouns in a previous music video, was one of the earliest members and supporters of Gnars DAO, has been a special guest in a number of Noun Square Twitter spaces, and is currently working on his own Nouns fork.

## Previous Nounish work ##

![lilbubble2.jpeg](ipfs://bafkreigxeuj5hldjt7giqgrupg6wu4tgtkid34xn2yz7qojgju65gvogh4)
Lil Bubble featured Noun #189 and owner Gami in a music video earlier this year. A custom Noun skateboard was featured in the video which was shared widely throughout the community garnering over 370k impressions on Twitter alone. 
 
![lilbubble3.png](ipfs://bafkreibu6u2ogzhwlweftwc5gowffrfjnezjoqsfxis5k5hokiziaj7oii)
    
## Budget and Deliverables ##
We are requesting for 3ETH for Lil Bubble to create 3 Original Tracks + Artwork + Track Stems which will be Auctioned off with a Timed Open Edition for 69 hours.

## Droposal Idea (TBA) ##
### 
Gnars X Lil Bubble (cc0 Music)

Track 1 – free mint
Track 2 – 0.0069 each
Track 3 – 0.069 each 
###

Customized Drop to be released through thatsgnar.ly

The Revenue raised from the open Edition will be split between 50% Gnars Treasury, Lil Bubble and Davin Oyesigye with a 25% each on a 0xsplit contract.

All Music and Sounds created will be made available on gnars.com/files and also a potential collaboration with Nouns Sounds Engine.

## Social and Links ##

Lil Bubble: All Time Lows-> https://twitter.com/TheCryptoBubble/status/1145529022538928129?s=20&t=YrvufGmcCIrXqUP1hMhSqg

Lil Bubble Youtube (30k Subs) -> https://www.youtube.com/@LilBubble/videos

Lil Bubble Instagram (15k+ Followers) -> https://www.instagram.com/TheCryptoBubble/

Lil Bubble Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/5KH8maDzl1ffVIuuxPBmms?si=VAqS4kXpT1i0UYfeHwHY_w&nd=1

proposals.title: [Prop. 43] Celebrate“The Gnarving”by buying Nouns!
proposals.body:
![1.jpeg](ipfs://bafkreifu4sn3mbu7j2ov7bq26iew2bzatvg4dgvcbshcbhorriznf7kymm)

The Gnars Auction Contract is unique and fascinating, For every 1000 auctions reached, the auction duration is doubled. As time continues to lengthen, the difficulty increases, and a series of very intense sniper battles will take place in the future. So I suggested: we should buy Nouns to commemorate those moments when the auction duration doubles!

Details

Why buy Nouns?     - It would be incomplete to purchase Nouns that simply commemorates“The Gnarving”.

1. As a kind of investment and value reserve to pave the way for future large capital proposals. Referring to The proposal 189 (https://nouns.wtf/vote/189) , we can see that it is perfectly feasible, but in the end, the proposal was not passed by a mere 4 votes, which is regrettable.
 
![2.png](ipfs://bafkreibremeu63a6thioxfkcyfzvfotdoc7lz2jdcqinbl42c5d325kqmu)
    
2. We know that Nouns DAO is the most famous CC0 project. As of today, hundreds of sub-DAOs (e.g. Lilnouns, SharkDao...) have been created because of nouns. (https://nouns.center/projects) It is a question to think about how to break through in these projects and let more friends know Gnars. I think nouns holders are a rich and wise group , like an ocean of resources, and we can use this ocean to attract friends who love extreme sports to our community and become a new booster.

3. Gami (0xigami.eth) personally owns Noun#189, Noun#401 and Noun#542. But gnars (gnars.eth) did not hold nouns.
 
![3.1.png](ipfs://bafkreifetw3mbvsn5a2h5v5xojb2e2uymq74xi526atebxpkyx54fqx7om)
    

![3.png](ipfs://bafkreibvf2lv75ibffcpx6h66h5hg3q5eqvport2o5ylke5oneplgw62ou)
    

I see them both as separate entities, but with a very close relationship. Gami helps gnars attract more traffic and hotspots, while gnars also provides partial financial support for Gami.
 
![4.png](ipfs://bafkreicewftlxstostsw25fvlfnaohgt5i6b425do6aucodx3xbc3xrm4a)
    

When buy Nouns?
 
![5.png](ipfs://bafkreiacqxq4yv6j5zgpsbeeacl4m4itylwr4cckopy4a46av44hl3cwwe)
    
The figure shows that whenever the auction duration doubles we bid a noun and deposit it in the gnars.eth so that all Gnars become common holders.

What to do after buy?

1. 	Vote by Gnars decision to help Gami or other friends' proposals to provide support.
2. Applicants for the nouns proposal are welcome to canvass our community, thereby increasing Gnars overall impact.


Who am I?

I am a Chinese college student with a passion for extreme sports, majoring in marketing. My English is not very good, and I have revised it many times using ‘DeepL’ translation software, so please understand if there is anything wrong.
 
![6.jpg](ipfs://bafkreiercsrznf4rnafhy5jtibv5awkeoyyk4xwguzguwfwgxuohewzh5i)
    
 
![7.jpg](ipfs://bafybeihrrwqungrjyz2cf4x6ctpp3jomuwij2qkck5gjxa6gnqabdmj77q)

proposals.title: Start the Gnars Revolution - #thatsgnarly
proposals.body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/ANwjIlw.jpg)

A "gnarketplace" for attention, [thatsgnar.ly](https://thatsgnar.ly) empowers the community to curate and drop the best Gnars content and rewards athletes with Gnars NFTs and ETH. 

## Details

Gnars holders can vote on their favorite Gnars content submitted via [thatsgnar.ly](https://thatsgnar.ly). Gnars holders get 1 vote per token, and Gnars OG counts for 2 (same as the Snapshot space).

The best content is "dropped" by the DAO via an open edition or a 1/1 auction. Athletes whose content is successfully voted to drop receive 1 Gnars NFT. 

![](https://i.imgur.com/koKIMXy.jpg)

Proceeds (ETH) from the drops are split between the athlete and the Gnars DAO treasury, 50/50. 

We propose the following structure:

* An Open Edition for the top video of the day 

    * 24h duration, 0.0069 ETH each
    * 1 Gnar to athlete

* A 1/1 Auction for top of the week 

    * 24h duration
    * 1 Gnar to athlete

Additionally, we're exploring closed editions as a means to drop the #2-5 pieces of content of the day to get more creators paid. We will share updates and make community decisions in Discord.

We will learn from the MVP and iterate to find the best drop setup that maximizes the following by order of importance:

1. ETH earned by athletes (ETH * # of athletes earning)
2. Revenue to Gnars DAO
3. Ownership (Gnars NFTs) distributed to athletes

Drops will pay out to a 0xsplits contract, with half going to Gnars DAO and half to a [multisig](https://app.safe.global/eth:0x50aBcbF1ca3ad1826cCe9d5B69D5Bee0bA446728/home) controlled by rocketman, Gami, and Vlad to payout athletes their share until a more trustless option is convenient.

## What we need to launch

### Gnars NFTs

We're requesting 50 Gnars NFTs from the multisig, which will be sufficient for at least 2 months of drops. These NFTs will be issued exclusively to athletes whose content is auctioned off.

### Feedback from you!

Are you a Gnars holder? Go vote! Test out the platform! What feels weird, what do you like? Any feedback is much appreciated. 

Are you an athlete? Visit [thatsgnar.ly](https://thatsgnar.ly), submit a video this week and test it out. Give us feedback in this [Discord channel.](https://discord.com/channels/928811922244137020/1052284040352366672)

## Launch

We are launching this Thursday (1/12/2023) at 8pm EST on the [Gnars Jam Session](https://twitter.com/thenounsquare). 

We will mint the first 24h open edition at 8pm, so submissions and voting will open the day before on 1/11/2023 at 8pm EST. The platform will be shared heavily on Twitter and we could use the community's help here! Follow the #thatsgnarly account [here.](https://twitter.com/thatsgnar_ly)

The more people submitting content, voting, and bidding, the more athletes we can onboard, the more ETH Gnars DAO earns, and the more powerful this movement becomes.

![](https://i.imgur.com/gugCzVm.jpg)

It's time, let's start a revolution.

proposals.title: [Prop 41] Gnarly News Newsletter
proposals.body:
# Gnarly News

![](https://i.imgur.com/gNedm9b.png)


**TLDR:** Requesting retroactive funding for past newsletters and funding to continue for the next 3 months (6 months of work total). Check out the publication at http://gnarly.news!


---
# Gnarly News Newsletter
As anyone who spends time in nounish discords knows, keeping up with all the latest updates can be a full time job in and of itself. There is a ton of information - upcoming projects and ideas, active proposals, contests, news, media from events, governance discussions etc. The goal of Gnarly News is to publish a weekly editorial condensing this abundace of information into a format that is easy to digest but captures the most important updates from the week.

So far, the weekly newsletter has been published 13 times with the first edition launching on 9/21/22 and a new publication going out every week since, except for two (due to travel/holidays). The newsletter highlights the latest developments within the Gnars ecosystem, including active and upcoming proposals, event updates, community highlights, and even current events in the broader Nouns ecosystem.

Since launch, the newsletter has reached over 2,300 reads and accumulated 365 subscribers (~68 organic, the rest have been brought over from an existing email list via Gami). It's also frequently referenced during Gnars Jam Sessions and is posted to [SkateHive](https://peakd.com/hive-173115/@gnars/gnarly-news-13) thanks to KnowHow. Lately each edition garners between 180-225 reads.

![](https://i.imgur.com/TdpImRD.png)

As you can see in the chart above, interest has been slowly increasing over time with a marked uptick in daily visits beginning in November. Currently, the newsletter has an average open rate of 31%, which is fairly high considering a substantial number of subscribers were imported and may not have been aware of Gnars prior to receiving the newsletter. Below is a chart depicting the growth in subscribers over the past 90 days.

![](https://i.imgur.com/7z7lctC.png)

The newsletter has proven to be a valuable resource for the community, and I anticipate that it's reach will only continue to grow from here. It's not only useful to those within the Gnars community, but the 'In Other Nouns' section at the end contains major news and events from around the nouniverse and can help you branch out as well. Between Prop House, Lil Nouns, and other nounish sub-DAOs there is always exciting stuff happening, and I compile the most exciting ones here.


---

# Scope
* Provide comprehensive weekly updates of the latest news and updates within Gnars DAO
* Provoke conversation around active and upcoming proposals
* Feature content from Gnars sponsored athletes and projects
* Highlight community events, projects, and builders contributing to the Gnars ecosystem

---

# Funds Requested

Retroactive funding for the first 13 publications is requested at half of the rate moving forward.

* Retroactive Funding
    * 13 Publications @ 0.20 ETH = 2.60 ETH
* Moving Forward (3 months)
    * January - 3 Publications @ 0.40 ETH = 1.20 ETH
    * February - 4 Publications @ 0.40 ETH = 1.60 ETH
    * March - 5 Publications @ 0.40 ETH = 2.00 ETH
* **Total = 7.40 ETH for 25 Publications over 6 months**

proposals.body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/zdLxzXi.png)



 ## Who is Nico? ##
 
 Nico [Istagram](https://www.instagram.com/nico_karolla/)

Nicolau dos Anjos Francisco Neto, better known as Nico Karolla, 30 years old. Hi is from Búzios, RJ – Brazil.

With more than 10 years of experience in the nautical area, during his time as sailor he discovers the Jetski Rescue world.

He started to specialize in the area and became the only local of Búzios with jet ski rescue operator certificated, his training was with the Biggest Jet ski Rescuer [Alemão de Maresias](https://www.instagram.com/alemaodemaresias/) (Jet ski Driver  Biggest Wave New World Record 2022 🏆) and the Big Wave Surfer [Carlos Burle!](https://www.instagram.com/carlosburle/) And yes, he is flying, here are some certificated and shredding stuff that he do!

![](https://i.imgur.com/eGpeqCb.png)

![](https://i.imgur.com/17ObJjw.png)
Alemão and Nico Training

He trained the Búzios Lifeguard and participated in search and rescue with a jetski with the 18• GBM CBMERJ, CBA V (Fire Command of Area V coastal lowlands).

![](https://i.imgur.com/hyO7Gal.png)

## Ok, nice, but what does he do now?

A month ago, he receive the invitation to be part of the Carlos Burle’s Rescue team.
Carlos Burle has the [“Burle Experience”](https://www.instagram.com/burleexperience/). Nico is going to be responsible for master the class for advanced piloting for big waves and pulling/Town in big wave surfers. Nico is going to be the teacher and master the class for jetski surf instructor.

He just been invites to participate in [Gigantes de Nazaré](https://www.instagram.com/gigantesdenazare/). A Big wave championship for pulling big wave riders.

Beside that, Nico is going to participate with Burle and his team at Big waves Search been in all those places that Burle Travels, giving the security and risking his life to Save Big Rider when they wipe out on those monsters waves. He will be in logistics maintenance of jetski and water security.

Currently living in Santa Catarina, south Brazil he works in a Piloting school for boat and jetski, teaches basic certificate piloting for civilians and Advanced water safety and Rescue courses to military, Fireman and Lifeguards.

Talking about proliferating Nouns/Gnars brand he works in a lot of different places, travels a lot, participate in Big events and have the company of Big names at surf Industry, great place to proliferate a brand, make the web3 more known with some influence athletes.

The events that he participates has always big media involved, and he is filmed constantly as the WSL event when he gets a pro surfer to the outside line, TVs, Jornals, Big surf Medias filming it and streaming.

JetSki: At the school that he works it has 2 jetskis that is going to be Gnars branded, and 2 brand new jetski coming soon, total of 4 water machines that will be his responsibility.

proposals.title: China Banks Crail - First edition minted by Gnars
proposals.body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/vSyAHsX.jpg)

Following the incredible response to our [Extremely nounish](https://create.zora.co/collections/0xdd930e878bdf23a78573998a451464c5bf56eeca) timed open edition during [Proposal 189](https://nouns.wtf/vote/189), I am proposing that Gnars release this awesome photo of [Kevin Kowalski](https://www.instagram.com/kevin_kowalski) by [Tim Aguilar](https://www.instagram.com/timaguilar), as a timed open edition.

Inspired by [Nouns Proposal 190](https://nouns.wtf/vote/190), this will be the first time that Gnars DAO mints and releases action sports media as a source of revenue.

By minting from the DAO via a proposal, we will be second only to Nouns DAO in dropping an NFT directly as a result of a governance vote. An NFT drop deployed via a DAO proposal is what I like to call a "[Droposal](https://create.zora.co/collections/0x3995036a238409e5ebb9b92ff06aaee3e5afae93)."

This photo will be released as a Timed Open Edition for a price of 0.015 ETH for a period of 7 days. Proceeds will be split between Gnars (34%), Kevin Kowalski (33%) and Tim Aguilar (33%) using a [0xSplits](https://www.0xsplits.xyz/) contract.

The timed open edition will be minted with Zora and will be available to mint onchain and at gnars.com/gnar001.

## Release Details

**Title:** China Banks Crail

**Description:** Kevin Kowalksi destroying the iconic China Banks spot captured by Tim Aguilar in the first ever edition minted by Gnars DAO.

**Symbol:** GNAR001

**Edition Type:** Timed Open Edition

**Start date:** January 16th, 1am UTC
End date: January 23nd, 1am UTC

**Price:** 0.015 ETH

**Split address**
[0xb63aA905f52aCb44c683f874Ed792aE2bbfd909f](https://app.0xsplits.xyz/accounts/0xb63aA905f52aCb44c683f874Ed792aE2bbfd909f/)

**Kevin Kowalski Address**
[0x394C480EB109f3C213E2A4aB24ACa5D394A387CA](https://etherscan.io/address/0x394C480EB109f3C213E2A4aB24ACa5D394A387CA)

**Tim Aguilar Address**
[0x9773f1F416dB509Dc408ACCE0753027629fe966F](https://etherscan.io/address/0x9773f1F416dB509Dc408ACCE0753027629fe966F)

**Gnars DAO Treasury Address**
[0x0658f4ed17289144717713adffc2539ef7c2ef8e](https://etherscan.io/address/0x0658f4ed17289144717713adffc2539ef7c2ef8e)
