proposals.title: Independent Artist Grant Ξ0.471337
proposals.body:
To Gnar Game Dev (GGD) Studio (Zack Goulet and Jon Tokarz) towards their efforts in developing their video game, Quest For Stoken.
This proposal is to support the work of artists Zack Goulet, and Jon Tokarz, and supply them with software, and supplies, to publish a gnarly video game for the Gnars Dao and Skatehive communities.

## Game Background:
Jon and Zack began learning coding and working on the game in June 2022. In 6 months, they have achieved a fun game that is featured on the homepage of Game Maker creations, for it's creativity and fun gameplay. 

![quest for stoken video game](ipfs://bafkreifgppak3tl4cn5ggk6jrczi3dwtco22m5iqaamw7xdycmphyxnetu)
    

-The game, in its Open Alpha form, gets about 100 plays per day, and is featured on GX Games’ homepage. 
https://gx.games/games/lkitb7/quest-for-stoken/

 
![quest for stoken video game](ipfs://bafkreih4ba7uyc5j65lxxulitflzqmxxxe5uro7udisfoftrkwdvut7foi)
    

## Vision for the game:
The long term goal is to integrate some kind of play-to-earn crypto mechanics. 
-The game will use web3 as a theme which underlies the game.
-QR codes within the game will lead to WEB3 skateboarding community websites.
-QR codes to collect POAPs made by GNAR STUDIO for accomplishing levels and beating the game.
-We are from Chicago and have created our city within the game. We want to add international levels. Greece and Brazil are two on our radar.
-We want to expand the game’s narrative so that it reads like a book, and tells a story.
-We ask the assistance of Gnars Dao for help to make the game more accessible to the community by making Web, and mobile exports.
-Gnars NPC characters to be featured in the game.

![quest for stoken video game](ipfs://bafkreie3zm463x47gpe3ooikutn5hzyjhadoevlztlljghvjzuqswjwtom)
  
## Breakdown of expenses:
1. Adobe After Effects 1 year: $252
    -make advanced animations	
2. Game Maker Indie subscription (3 months) and Enterprise subscription (1 month): $110
    -allowing us to publish versions of the game that can be independently hosted on web and mobile
3. Computer Monitors and a Game Maker book: $200
    -allowing us to further develop the game 

## Artist Background Info:
Zack Goulet and Jon Tokarz are 35 year old visual artists living and working in Chicago who are expanding their work into game development. Zack is primarily a painter, with an interest in animations and is one of the founders of the Skatehive community. Jon and Zack have used the word "gnar" to describe their work since 2005. Gnar Team was the skate crew name and gnarip.net was the website.

![zack goulet artist](ipfs://bafkreihj4tcita6poxxv7wtrgrufyccjphi3hxfom6sjiambqzxvinz4qi)
zack

![jon tokarz skating](ipfs://bafkreia65f7fxf6jvklpmsnklfflhvel73fug6aprz2vulll5kzo6dj6d4)
jon

## Zack's work samples: 
###### http://zackgoulet.us/

### Both Jon and Zack are skateboarders:
###### https://peakd.com/hive-173115/@web-gnar/ibndfefs

Thank you for taking the time to read our proposal.
-Gnar Studio
###### webgnar.eth

proposals.title: [Prop. 36] Sponsor Bennie Osnow, Dakota Connole, and Sam Gnoza w/ 9 ETH (Professional Skiing)
proposals.body:
Hi GnarsDAO,
Our names are Bennie Osnow, Dakota Connole, and Sam Gnoza. We are professional skiers based out of Salt Lake City Utah. Seeing that there aren’t many Gnars athletes that are skiers yet, us three would like to join as athletes to help introduce Gnars to the skiing community. We will do this by creating skiing content for the Gnars youtube channel. We are connected with people in the industry and our ski Videos are watched by people Worldwide!

## Who we are?
### 1. Dakota Connole: 
![DC1.jpeg](ipfs://bafkreig5q7fex73lh7i5iitfuetnkfi2wp2apk7tulu7iokakq26aqagvy)
I am a 24 year old professional skier from Taos, New Mexico. My name is Dakota Connole and for the past nine years home base has been in Park City and Salt Lake City, Utah. Throughout my time in Utah I have transitioned from competing in high level slope style competitions to filming for one of the best street skiing crews called ‘Child Labor.’ 

I am currently starting my fifth season of filming street skiing with them. Last year I competed in a railjam in Ukraine, and was a Level 1 Superunkown finalist last year. I am sponsored by 686 technical apparel, Vishnu skis, and Vortech corp. In terms of what is to come I will continue to push my mental and physical limits as an athlete to progress the sport and to meet my own personal goals. For this season I plan to continue filming for another street video, to attend team film shoots with 686 and other sponsors, and hopefully make some Nounish content for the Gnars Dao!

### 2.Sam Gnoza: 
![SG1.jpeg](ipfs://bafybeidlfux3subkblu5dloun5ylrj2rjux2dz4drsjgwskseefwqzxdjq)
I’m Sam, 24 years old from Killington, Vermont. I’ve been skiing all my life. When I was younger I was a competitive skier, but have found my real passion through a more creative approach. I got my first camera in high school, and since then, I have used being behind the lense as a tool to share my creativity with the world filming friends. Capturing a moment behind the lense is special because it lasts forever. 

I have also skied in multiple private park shoots with Ski The East and, Killington Mountain. I am sponsored by Line skis, Joy Stick, and R3. For the past 5 years, with Dak & Bennie, I’ve spent most of my winters filming street skiing.

### 3. Bennie Osnow: 
![BO1.jpeg](ipfs://bafkreif6l3fiu4pgxmoa4na4opyppo5u2msqjvhviju7mdsyzifj4eaztm)
Hi my name is Bennie Osnow. I’m 22 years old. I grew up in Londonderry Vermont, And went to highschool with Sam. I stopped competing early on to pursue making ski videos. my senior and following year of high school, I started filming for C sessions, a web seried made for Carinthia parks at Mountsnow, and did private park shoots with Ski the East. I then moved to Salt Lake city in 2019, and have continued my passion for making videos, focusing most of time on street skiing. I am sponsored by Line Skis, Vortech Corp, Smoke Proper, and R3 pants. 

I also have recently worked with some other major companies like Evo, Woodward, 805 beer, Level 1, and I’ve been featured in Freeskier magazine. Along with the videos I am excited to make for the Gnars DAO this season, I am also filming multiple street projects and filming for the Line Traveling Circus, the longest running ski web-series online.

## Deliverables
### We are proposing 3 ETH for each of us to be sponsored riders for the Gnars Dao. In return we will create 
1. 4, 5-7 minute long edits to be posted on gnars youtube channel throughout the winter season (Jan-april) each edit will have around 20-30 clips we will send to be utilized on all other Gnars and Nouns social media pages (120+ clips of footage)
2. Always speak highly of the gnars Dao and teach more of the ski and snowboarding communities what its all about tag gnars dao in social media posts
3. Talk with different companies and event organizers to get gnars involved with different types of events in the skiing world,(video shoots, railjams, movie premieres…)
When we post these edits, we will ask our other sponsors to help promote the videos to get more exposure over to the Youtube. Posting these videos on Gnars can lead to more people finding the Dao.

## External Links & Other Work

Here’s some example videos that we have filmed/ been skiing in:
https://vimeo.com/291089339
This is a video of Sam and Bennie in 2019 at MtHood

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eDI6y_arg4M
This is Dakota

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=19aie66cWpk&t=8s
Edit of Bennie

https://youtu.be/FzX5RXZP2T8
Line traveling Circus, featuring Bennie

https://youtu.be/ZW-03UnSZt0
Heres our Newest street skiing film “Why Not?” featuring all of us

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC1XWBwYsRgFtCsJtWtnetmg
This is the page for our street skiing crew most of our videos are posted

instagram pages:
Bennie Osnow: [www.instagram.com/_bennie]

Dakota Connole: [https://www.instagram.com/dakattak_/]

Sam Gnoza: [https://www.instagram.com/gnoza_content/]

We are really excited to start working with the Gnars Dao and help promote and grow the community! Thank you for taking the time to read this.

proposals.title: [Prop. 35] Sponsor Mari Nioac with 3.6969 ETH (surfing, paragliding and skiing)
proposals.body:
### What’s gnarly about me

Aloha! Call me Mari, aka [@marinioac](https://twitter.com/marinioac) or [@mari.salles_](https://www.instagram.com/mari.salles_/) , I'm not a pro athlete but a gnarly one. 

I surf, I fly and I ski. I live and breathe gnarly sports.

![](https://i.imgur.com/Ig7wfmb.jpg)



I'm partner of [Surfguru](http://www.surfguru.com.br), the best wave forecast website of Brazil. Surfguru has more than +250K users per month and +1MM access per month. 


I'm a web3 enthusiast and I’m totally in love with all the Nouns ecosystem. I bought my first crypto early 2020, I became part of a DAO late 2021 and I bought my first NFT mid 2022. During this year, I was part of the codesign of [Surflimpo](https://www.cambiatus.com/surflimpo)/[Surfhive](https://peakd.com/c/hive-141964/created) communities and [Drop](https://surflimpo.cambiatus.io/invite/3WRkvw), a social currency for beach cleanups. I’ve been in the Gnars community for about 3 months and I have 7 Gnars. I Know I'm a newbie in the Web3 world. But I'm for sure a believer that Nouns and Gnars are here to stay. 

I've gotten 2 proposal approved so far, one by [LilSisters (1eth)](https://www.addressform.io/board/details/b1dd12cd-4c10-4a4a-b5f8-c6410dc72ae2/fund-the-first-cc0-3d-print-wearable-noggles/3159) and another one was a subDAO collab by [Gnars (2.5eth)](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x0b3d6c307f7e596892dda29cf4914598368c0b0212739081290ab6608de770cf) , [Lil Sisters (0.5eth) and NounsBR (0.5eth)](https://www.addressform.io/board/details/f4772eb9-9ee3-479b-b957-d602415a100b/finance-children-in-need-at-tpm-a-brazilian-ngo-from-nuala-costa-an-lgbtqiap-black-surfer/2606) to sponsor children to surf from TPM NGO in Maracaípe, Brazil. We have just started onboarding and nounifing TPM. We have been making content on [Surfhive](https://peakd.com/hive-141964/@surfgurupro/engpt-br-ngo-todas-para-o-mar-receives-funding-from-web3-to-maintain-its-activities-or-ong-todas-para-o-mar-recebe-financiamento), [twitter](https://twitter.com/SurfguruPro/status/1602785803834478594?s=20&t=BgrcCAsx5ai2W3hjhzx-Ew) and [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/p/ClUgH_Pj9WG/) about it.

![](https://i.imgur.com/0AoMmlS.png)


![](https://i.imgur.com/o7LvisP.jpg)



I have a [BS in Industrial Design from MSU Denver](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1H4pxEZx7Y4qrZp_RBtLqUy9pPOAUrJV4/view?usp=sharing) and I graduated with Magna Cum Laude Honors and an [Outstanding Student Award](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1DQuUAptxW8dIwP9H84mN-SrRGcDpqhxo/view?usp=sharing) at the worst possible time during the US economic crisis in 2010. So in 2011, I quit looking for jobs and I decided to fulfill my dream to make my own ski. Thus I learned the process by myself researching all over the internet. There were very little info at the time, so I decided to give back to the community [a video of the whole process](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1CGm5_3GsQA), also because:
* I knew no one would ever believe a Brazilian female could make a pair of really good skis. 
* There weren’t any decent female skis on the market at the time. They were designed for very strong women. So I made a pair to fit my size (5’3”, 110 pound female) inspired by a Dynafit backcountry all mountain design. Four years later, Faction Skis made a pair pretty similar to my design for women.
* While I was researching, I had to stitch a bunch of incomplete information from YT and forums. Therefore I decided to make a video about the entire process to give back to the community one full content with all the necessary info to DIY a pair of skis. This video it's one of the most watched DIY ski videos on YT until today.
![](https://i.imgur.com/4MxgNOY.png)

Four years later, I was invited to host [14 episodes of a Brazilian TV series](https://vimeo.com/167509611) from [Canal OFF](https://www.instagram.com/canaloff/) about backcountry skiing in New Zealand. I got the spot because of my DIY ski video.

![](https://i.imgur.com/nBpRxT1.png)


In the meantime, I went back to Brazil and I founded 2 companies (Bolei and [Vrum Vrum](https://vimeo.com/manage/videos/109095074)) focused on recycling, upcycling, rethinking product design creation, fabrication and usage. But I never liked to sell products, then, I changed directions and I decided to work with tech and education. I pioneered the [Maker Movement](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mklywR7TQxs) (DIY) in Brazil (2011) and later I started to teach Product Design and [STEAM](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=C48oHf1TOcg) at a High School and a social project (2019-2021). Some of my students made a skateboard quarter pipe at a school that never allowed skateboarding inside, until then.

![](https://i.imgur.com/BheP4X1.png)


During the Pandemic, I designed an open source (CC0) face shield to donate to public health institutions. [We donated more than 8k face shields](https://www.instagram.com/p/CA-YocBJ78A/) around Brazil and my project was used in Ireland and Iran.

Meanwhile, I've been a partner of 3 tech start-ups: 
1st) [OHMS](https://www.instagram.com/partiufazer.ohms/) (2014-2017), the first Makerspace of Rio. We developed hardware and software for artists, engineers and children in the autistic spectrum disorder;
2nd) [GreenAnt](https://www.greenant.com.br/english/greenant) (2014-2021), an AI software developer for the renewable energy trading market;
3rd) [Surfguru](http://www.surfguru.com.br) (2021 - present), the largest wave forecast website of Brazil.

Of corse I’m a feminist. I’ve also pioneered women’s surfing and flying movements in Brazil. I was part of a [Canal OFF documentary](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1tSzAYOY7eVtPnP3AqJRTO5_uESR9egU1/view?usp=sharing) about the first Women Paragliding Festival of Latin America, Saia pra Voar (2015).


Today I manage [Surfguru](http://www.surfguru.com.br)’s tech, design, impact and community areas.

![](https://i.imgur.com/Zb7J1tD.jpg)

Since 2020, I’ve been living in the most iconic surf town of Brazil, Saquarema, which is the host of WSL main events: [Championship Tour](https://www.worldsurfleague.com/events/2022/ct/7/oi-rio-pro/main), [Challengers Series](https://www.worldsurfleague.com/events/2022/cs/26/corona-saquarema-pro/main) and [Qualifying Series 5000](https://www.worldsurfleague.com/events/2022/qs/94/saquarema-surf-festival/main). Saquarema is an awesome place to proliferate the meme to be seen by the world.


## But what about Gnars?

![](https://i.imgur.com/Yn4yVZm.png)


As a Gnars Athlete, my goal is to collab on developing Gnars brand, athlete merch and merch for the community. Creating and making it IRL. I also want to spark attention with gnarly photos and videos surfing and flying wearing gnarly merch made by me. Last but not least, I will make some weird pixeled gnartwork like these (collab with XMPNK):


![](https://i.imgur.com/q0teBui.gif)



![](https://i.imgur.com/GWyC7sK.gif)





As a community builder and a Surfguru partner, I'm gonna be creating Gnars content on Surfguru's media, such as **#gnarswave** of the month inspired by Skatehive to keep building Surfhive and Gnars web2 community. 

![](https://i.imgur.com/qpXcxXF.jpg)
*Data from Surfguru's Instagram*

I also want to make meaningful connections for Gnars. I’ve been introducing Gnars to female surfers, paragliders and designers around Brazil. I started onboarding [female athletes to Lil Sisters](https://www.addressform.io/board/details/b1dd12cd-4c10-4a4a-b5f8-c6410dc72ae2/let-lil-sisters-go-surfing/3183) and soon to Gnars.

Some examples that I can design for Gnars:
* CC0 3D print wearable Gnarggles ([I’m already prototyping](https://www.instagram.com/reel/ClRR30Qphdr/?utm_source=ig_web_button_share_sheet))
* Upcycled Gnars fivepanels caps and buckets made **of** [Sol Paraglider's fabric production residue](https://www.solparagliders.com.br/) and made **by** the skateboarders from [WayWardCaps](https://www.instagram.com/waywardcaps/) (It's on it's way)
* Gnars NFT buttons (done)
* Gnars Flag to fly
* Gnars see through stickers for ski/fly goggles lenses
* Connect small and interesting brands to make Gnars Merch and onboard them to take eth
* I can provide CAD work (blueprint) to replicate Gnarly sculptures.
* And who knows what


![](https://i.imgur.com/a4IhwzB.jpg)

I hope this opportunity is just a kickoff for a long term relationship as a Gnars Athlete and builder.

Cheers and thanks for reading it all ✨❤️
Let's get gnarly!

## Introduction ##

Kai (@m3thaverse) a pro snowboarder and Troy (@trizzytrunk) an award winning film maker with extensive backgrounds in the extreme sports industry and content creation. 
 
![kaispics3.jpg](ipfs://bafkreihszrrxppixrclx4ymytqy45vdu2y5ulac423fig3askcidlqbg2a)
    
Kai & Troy are both artists/athletes with a combined 35+ years in the extreme sports industry and 4+ years in the web3/crypto space.

Having worked with independent brands to bigger corporations; 
such as Adidas, Woodward and Redbull they aim to use their skill sets to bring the snowboarding community to web3. proposals.title: Sponsor Lucas Rocha (Bodyboarding) with 3 ETH
proposals.body:
## About me

![](https://i.imgur.com/qIquSyR.png)


**Take 2 minutes to know me some more [on this link](https://www.canva.com/design/DAFDHALIT2w/xxVFkxd67Su6PK_GxHLnkA/view)**

Hello guys! I’m Lucas Rocha, 28 years old, started surfing at 8 and still more excited to do it than ever, nowadays though, I usually chase bigger waves. I got into the Blockchain world in 2018 and I currently work as a community builder in some projects, such as [NXF Bodyboard](https://www.instagram.com/nxfbodyboard/?hl=pt) and [Surfhive](https://peakd.com/c/hive-141964/created).


## Work at NXF Bodyboard

![](https://i.imgur.com/M9HIHkG.png)


NXF was founded in 2005 and it’s a collective of brazilian bodyboarders focused on hunting big waves and creating content about it. The collective became notorious in Brazil and around the world after discovering and surfing the AVALANCHE - the gnarliest wave in Brazil. [(one wave at Avalanche surfed by me in 2021)](https://www.instagram.com/reel/CQtsgHHj2bz/)

![](https://i.imgur.com/Gjq5mKV.jpg)
Getting out of a cave this winter 

## Community Building

I’ve been working as a community builder at NXF Bodyboard since june 2021, when we entered the Web3 atmosphere and it’s been amazing. We were approved for a [10k USD grant from Harmony Protocol](https://talk.harmony.one/t/nxf-bodyboard-big-wave-surfing-nfts-and-web3-education-project-y/15948) to develop educational work involving Big surf, Web3, NFTs and Blockchain. Since then, I’ve worked organizing meetups, doing presentations, development of NFT drops and press releases. I’m also responsible for the treasury management at NXF.

![](https://i.imgur.com/VZOnj6D.png)
Meetup at [Base27](https://www.instagram.com/base27.co/), an Innovation HUB inside [Rede Gazeta](https://www.instagram.com/redegazetaes/) (state correspondent to [Globo](https://www.instagram.com/tvglobo/) - Biggest TV channel in Brazil)

Surfing is a long time passion. Me and my friends have been creating content of our action since before the Gopros became a thing, the idea was to take the footage of what we did in the sea, edit it, and show it to the biggest number of people we could.

![](https://i.imgur.com/m4PM1TK.png)
One wave back in 2009

![](https://i.imgur.com/NGMsnzz.jpg)
Another one, nowadays ⌐◨-◨

I’m still doing (kind of) the same crazyness when it comes to content creation, being more specific, joining surf and Web3 is exactly what I've been working on in the last few years. In April this year we created our first NFT collection as an experiment on how we could interact with communities and support our project using Web3 platforms. In June we launched our 2nd collection about a wave we discovered and surfed for the 1st time in 2012 (10 years ago) and named it ‘2012 - Treasury in Vitoria Bay’

![](https://i.imgur.com/qPwh1bU.png)
Presentation on Web3, NFTs and the NXF case for the community.

I’m really excited to be part of GNARS and Nouns community and thankful to Gami after getting my first Gnar [(Gnar 640)](https://opensea.io/assets/ethereum/0x558bfff0d583416f7c4e380625c7865821b8e95c/640), which I baptized as aquarium head! ahahaha
![](https://i.imgur.com/qcyqG7T.png)

And to close it of, my new Gnarly hat! (Thanks Luiz!) 
![](https://i.imgur.com/c2NNAuO.jpg)


## Sponsorship proposal

It would be an honor to be part of the select team of Gnars extreme athletes and help this community grow and bring even more impact on society. I propose 3 ETH for 6 months, which would be headed to: ***1)** content creation and the logistics needed to produce it, **2)** cost of living for 6 months, **3)** merch creation (Nounish hoodies, hats, shirts, stickers)*. 

**◎** In return, I commit to deliver consistent Nounish content on social media (spreading ⌐◨-◨) and work on bringing Gnars to notoriety in every community I’m part of. 

**◎** NXF Bodyboard  social media profiles ([IG](https://www.instagram.com/nxfbodyboard/), [YT](https://www.youtube.com/@nxfbodyboard2986)) would also leverage Nounish content (since Luiz Haddad, Gnars Team Member, is also part of NXF and the content we produce fits exactly into "extreme sports" subject - enabling total sinergy).

**◎** And at last but not least, Nounish merch (⌐◨-◨) would be always on my boards, hoodies, tshirts or hats, in any media I upload. Gotta be Nounish!

I would also become the 2nd member of [Surfhive](https://peakd.com/c/hive-141964/created) to be on the Gnars team along with @luizhadad to take the surf and bodyboard flag on!

Cheers to everybody and a big thanks to my brother @luizhadad for introducing me to the community and reviewing my proposal!

proposals.title: [Prop 32] Creating of Gnarsauce Hot Sauce product
proposals.body:
A proposal asking for 0.69 ETH and Gnar 2767 from the treasury to facilitate the package design and cost of a test-batch of “Gnarsauce” a gnars themed hot sauce to add flavor to your day. It’s perfect for those on fire trying to keep the flames stoked AND for cheering up those having a participation-trophy only type of day. 

# Deliverables
Bottle design for three different sauces with flavor names decided by the community.
Package design of a box that holds a set of three. 
This will be CCO open source downloadable for anybody to use.
Delivery of gnarsauce to discord raffle winners and promotional events.
An order site for additional gnars sauce after funding is used up.

# Funding uses
This proposal does not cover starting a hot sauce business as much as bootstrapping the ability to get branded gnarsauce. The small amount of ETH included in this proposal will be used for:
- Payment for printing and labeling a pre-existing hot sauce (white-label).
- Postage for sending out samples to discord winners and sponsored extreme athletes (drop-ship and manually).
- Taste samples, hosting, and material needs. 

Gnar 2767 will be moved to gnarsauce.eth and used as the primary gnar for labeling.

 
![This is the gnar in question](ipfs://QmewhovtATQJ5QHjt1S6gkAP3Qy4MWPujg2dvkedW8czRV)
    

# Timeframe
(Immediately) Public feedback, conversion to a markdown proposal with feedback to be presented to a board meeting.
- A month of design work and competitive hot sauce/whitelabel/dropship research.
- A month of active community votes while finalizing designs and first run participants.
- - We will lobby to present to the podcast, preferably with samples at the ready.
- - We will community vote on names and run raffles or contests for early taste testers.
Month three will be the final decision of purchase strategy, deliveries, and the creation of a product site.
Month four is realistic padding on delivery to individuals and smoothing out any operational hiccups.

  
![Quick and ](ipfs://bafkreifohxvjqxbj7j3mmzdtwz5ufhifxaxz6lfnk3ykhuhsbitjbtlzvu)
    
    
# Future plans
- A public site will be available to the public to order individual bottles or cases.
Crowdsource recommendations (recipes, dropshipping, etc) will be crunched for a future evolution (This is not necessary for the original whitelabel order concept).
- The creation of a business model where the majority of income is split between the gnars treasury and a gnarsauce coffer for administration and shipping costs to facilitate future events/tacobars/skishops/and other adoption fun stuff.
- FoodNOUNS will be approached, but this would not rely on their infrastructure.

# Goals
An excuse for a fun gnarsauce label and bragging rights.
Eat yummy tacos and spicy pho after a hard gnarly day.
(the dream) Using our extensive network to make our own unique sauce, funding further projects and athletes.

# About Geffenz
Longtime board sports enthusiast, slightly mellowed with age. I taught snowboarding in Tahoe, but now attend more online board meetings than first chairs sadly. Still! I make it to a mountain for some powder every year. I've been on the NFT scene since the beginning and have a healthy collection of gnars and noun derivatives (ok mostly gnars). I’m fucking psyched to do this for the sheer enjoyment of having our own hotsauce gnars label! My initial intent is to spend all funds on execution not personal profit, with an eye to a sustainable business model in the future.

# Mottos
Don’t be drunk just be drinking.
Don't sweat the small stuff and everything is small stuff.
!settle

proposals.title: [PROP. 31] Sponsor ProjektStacks Gnars Wheelie Boys! (Stunt Riding)
proposals.body:
Hey fellow Gnars! My name is Bloomz and I will be representing my Big Bro, ProjektStacks for this sponsorship! Seeking 3 ETH for a Stunt riding sponsorship. This includes a custom Gnars branded airbrushed helmet, Gnars hoodie, gear, fuel, photography and videography. We will also get stickers/swag to disbribute to the stunt crew!
 
![Mask1.jpeg](ipfs://bafkreibbz563oammkdvitr7w434a4tq33fi3tqeavnwsyjhhle5osfskoe)
    
Here in Denver there is a thriving stunt riding scene that my brother is a big part of! They do rides normally twice a week but always at least once ! I would love to get the Gnars name out into the scene not only through the video engagement this will bring but also to show the scene what we at gnars are all about, funding extreme sports!
 
![mask2.jpeg](ipfs://bafkreif5xf3rbdxznnginej2vnio5ggzkwb5oi3dro4v73gpgutxil6wla)
    
The Sponsorship will provide funding to get a custom airbrushed gnars helmet to wear while riding. We will put a gnargles decal on the bike for awesome wheelie content! This is a large group of riders and i will make sure to be on some of these rides gathering content, proliferating , and answering any questions about Gnars! I would love to do a Gnargles ride once the paper style gnargles are available in bulk.

This sponsorship will in part also go to fuel costs , oil changes, and maintenance as well.

This proposal is seeking funding of 3 ETH for the Gnars Wheelie Boys. The ETH will be allocated as follows:

1 Eth : Custom Airburshed Gnars Helmet
0.25 Eth : Custom Gnars hoodie
0.25 Eth : Stickers
0.5 Eth : Tires for burnouts
0.5 Eth : Fuel, maintenance, oil changes
0.5 ETH : videography and photography of rides

**Link to ProjektStacks Instagram**
https://www.instagram.com/projektstacks/?hl=en

Thank you for your consideration! Stay Gnarly!

proposals.title: [Prop 30] - Skatehive's Decentralized Sponsorship Proposal To Gnars DAO
proposals.body:
Both Gnars and Skatehive are web 3 communities building their dreams on the blockchain.

Gnars via their DAO, are funding extreme athletes (skateboarders included) and Skatehive, via their content creation community on [Hive](https://hive.io/), are educating skateboarders worldwide on how to monetize their content in an un-censorable environment. 

 - *Some of Skatehive's self-funded achievements:  Online [Games of S.K.A.T.E](https://peakd.com/hive-173115/@skatehive/skatehive-x-lbry-cyber-game-of-s-k-a-t-e-contest-registrations-are-open), [giveaways](https://peakd.com/hive-173115/@howweroll/dollar50-hive-giveaway-how-daryl-rolls), [rewards for contests](https://peakd.com/hive-173115/@howweroll/the-longboard-hive-we-re-sponsoring-a-race-in-the-philippines-ep-3), [events](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0CleCnNLc4M), helping skaters buy new equipment!*

 - *Learn More About Skatehive : [Welcome to Skatehive](https://peakd.com/hive-173115/@skatehive/welcome-to-skatehive)*

Skatehive has been around since late 2017 early 2018 and our primary focus is onboarding skateboarders to web 3 the easiest way, educating them about blockchain and partnering up with various projects so we can make more blockchain tools available to the skateboarding community.

Our decentralized ethos can't be questioned since we're building our community with commitment and passion for almost 5 years, surviving bear markets and rewarding skateboarders with hundreds of dollars weekly thanks to the trust we've earned as a community on Hive blockchain!

We at Skatehive believe Gnars is showing the same Web 3 ethos and after various talks Skatehive Council (knowhow92,web-gnar,howdarylroll,vlad) decided to draft this proposal so we can start bridging those 2 communities together.

### SKATEHIVE Proposal to GNARS

#### Decentralized Sponsorship

This model is another disruption of the traditional sponsorhip model. Instead of supporting one skater at a time we are going to use blockchain power to support a network of skaters by dPoS curatorship.

![](https://i.ibb.co/dgr7Z23/GNARS-prop-fin.png)


**GNARS INJECTION**


[Gnars](https://peakd.com/@gnars) account on Hive buy 3 ETH worth of Hive, stake them and vote on skateboarding posts inside Skatehive community.

Thanks to Hive's tokenomics, no Hive tokens leave the Gnars wallet when it's account upvotes skate content. Hive token rewards are coming from the Hive "Rewards Pool", a pool filled daily with newly minted Hive. The more Hive Power(staked Hive) a user has in their wallet, the more Hive tokens they can "take" from the Hive Reward Pool and give to posts they upvote.

As discussed in [Discord Forum](https://discord.com/channels/928811922244137020/1038086773106032720/1038086773106032720) we are going to ask 3 ETH for swapping for HIVE.

3 ETH ~ 10000 Hive ~ $0.20/vote 

Votes might look small compared to the initial investment but the more votes Gnars account gives to content the more returns it gets thanks to Hive tokenomics.

Using the price of Hive at 0.36, Hive's current token supply, as well as the average of curation rewards over time, we'd say Gnars account can get between 5.574% and 7.353% APR depending if we look at the last 30 days during the bear, or the last 138 days.

This doesn't include price changes, or the fact that HP is actually compounding as Gnars account receives curation rewards.  Or the 3% paid out in interest to HP holders nor the author rewards from Gnars account posts which would actually make the apr, or apy much higher, but we admittedly just don't know how to calculate that.

An average estimation would be around 10-11% APR for an initial 3 ETH investment. **Keep in mind that those Hive will never leave Gnars hive account wallet** and they just keep giving, to both the community and Gnars wallet.

Knowhow92 can take care of posting from Gnars account on Hive as well as curating skateboarding/extreme sports content.

![](https://i.imgur.com/HcLz6Il.png)


---------------

### Additinal Benefits

 - Gnars can support athletes without spending money from the treasury.  Not everyone can be sponsored, but using curation we can support as many athletes as we want, while also empowering athletes to support each other as a community.  
- Incentivizing grassrooots marketing, by monetizing content creation from all community members.  What could be better marketing, then everyone being rewarded for their efforts, and leading by example. 
- Community ownership: Everyone has a sense of having skin in the game, which encourages better community behavour. Also, no one can take what we've built away from us, if we end up ruffling feathers in the big tech social media monopoly.  
 -  Expandable model for the future of all sports communities.  Example: Surfers can post in [SurfHive](https://peakd.com/c/hive-141964/created) and also get curated by Gnars and Skatehive Upvote
 - Gnars partnership mention in ["The Weekly Stoken"](https://peakd.com/hive-173115/@stoken/the-weekly-stoken-26) Newsletter 📰
 - It's social media without all the bullshit 🍻	
 - Create a Weekly Curation Report from Gnars account. 75% of post rewards goes to Gnars account and 25% to @skatehive.
 
 ------------
 
# Win-Win

Skatehive wants to be the social aspect of Gnars, a place where GNARly skateboarders share their content and earn crypto for doing so and also ensures that Gnars is not just present in web2 but also lives the web3 social media, making the community more decentralized in this aspect

We will provide Gnars fam with Skatehive guides on how to create Hive accounts, subscribe to Skatehive and start posting as well as 24h support in our Discord if they need any help.


This is how many Hive tokens Gnars account has in its wallet with 0 investment and 6 posts. 

###### Gnars Hive account managed by @knowhow92

![](https://i.imgur.com/4M64BUu.jpg)

![](https://i.imgur.com/BO9ZaYG.jpg)

--------------------

### Learn more about Skatehive

For any aditional info about Skatehive feel free to join our [Discord](discord.gg/skatehive) and contact any of Skatehive @staff or contact us in [Gnars Discord](discord.gg/gnars). We're always hanging in there too hehe

**Find Skatehive on**

 - Twitter : https://twitter.com/Skate_Hive
 - Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/skatehive/
 - Hive : https://peakd.com/@skatehive

***Proposal drafted by Skatehive team*** 
 

| Daryl | Vlad | Web-Gnar | Knowhow92
| -------- | -------- | -------- | -------- 
|[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/howdarylrolls/)  | [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/sktbrd.eth/)       | [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/goulet_z_g/) | [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/haris_housos/) |
|[Twitter](https://twitter.com/HowDarylRollsE)  | [Twitter](https://twitter.com/vladhzc)       | [Twitter](https://twitter.com/webgnar) | [Twitter](https://twitter.com/theocharis_ch) |
|[Hive](https://peakd.com/@howweroll)  | [Hive](https://peakd.com/@xvlad)       | [Hive](https://peakd.com/@web-gnar) | [Hive](https://peakd.com/@knowhow92) |

proposals.title: Build a Gnars line at Taiku Bike Park
proposals.body:
![3df94a13-ef87-44e5-8497-fdeb54481ba5.JPG](ipfs://bafybeihkb5ss2b3ylbrcrcjfztnwi5r2fuolvve5qddfpqfjczafb4c4u4)


## About

Taiku, @taikupark on IG, is the first bike park in the Dominican Republic. Ever since the pandemic started, mountain biking has seen a huge spike in popularity all over the country and has gone from having only several spots to ride to over 10 popular local trails and two bike parks. Taiku seeks to become a hub for outdoor enthusiasts by having bike trails, hiking trails, yoga & wellbeing activities and also building "glamping" tents, pretty cool if you ask me. 
 
![404ce9ec-92e3-44eb-b4b3-6fe2a5f8004e.JPG](ipfs://bafybeidnxjjn7g6sgwv7gv3ad2nfciuvvzmke62farjuxo7vqfk3l5jsyu)

The owners of Taiku are friends of mine, so when I approached them with the idea of having a trail sponsored by GnarsDAO and showed them what the community is all about (nouns, lilnouns, etc) they loved it. 

## Ask

**I am requesting 2.5 ETH to develop and build a trail sponsored by GnarsDAO with features featuring the signature noggles and _allow the community to propose ideas on what to name the line._** 
 
![fdac11f0-b58d-4c29-9a03-26e83d267288.JPG](ipfs://bafybeidhwsifihnfgwl27xfwwdxbl7kc6unam7oa562fseex6of235r3au)

These are rough drafts of ideas we have had to feature the noggles through the trail. All wooden features (drops, berms, etc) will have the noggles painted on them making it a true nounish trail. 

Taiku has already hosted the first downhill race ever in the Dominican Republic and it was freaking cool. Videos and photos below...
https://www.instagram.com/reel/CeuBBiLF6Zq/?igshid=YmMyMTA2M2Y=

https://www.instagram.com/p/CewjZHEv66L/?igshid=YmMyMTA2M2Y= 
(photo #7 is me)

## My nounish track record

I was one of the winners of the lilnouns prop house round 8. Wakeboarding Proliferation.    https://prop.house/lil-nouns/round-8/1457

Completed✅      
https://www.instagram.com/p/CkGh44pOms7/?igshid=YmMyMTA2M2Y=

I also currently have a prop up on this weeks lilnouns prop house to replicate sktbrd.eth's skateable noggles at a local skate park in Santo Domingo, DR.

## Here I share extra pictures of Taiku
 
![46b3ac6a-3b5d-4d65-b477-c24ea8e3c7d2.JPG](ipfs://bafybeid6qgxbu2nvm65ho5vnranjcj23s3gcmi3ygmn22xhnupt2aeuyv4)
    
![03dfe213-d0f4-4334-aac7-18ca671b157d.JPG](ipfs://bafybeiai6xatskz56w6oytuvcrlnzs5fsgm4odzznfo7ht5mtwivluyi4a)
   
https://www.instagram.com/reel/CaAQjeprbPE/?igshid=YmMyMTA2M2Y=

Taiku will host the national mtb fest next march. A big multiday event where all mountain bike fanatics will gather for the different races and activities, it would be dope to have Gnars present with the sponsored trail.

proposals.title: Sponsor children from TPM NGO to surf
proposals.body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/CJZdTPk.png)

## Project Overview
[TPM](https://drive.google.com/file/d/17PxWdPZVDTHwklMzVLqbn_ucQqq-qYFp/view?usp=sharing) (All to the Sea) is an NGO that emerged as a feminist collective in 2016 in the community of the Bay of Maracaípe-PE, Brazil. Since then, it has been contributing to the personal and social development of children, adolescents and women, through social and educational activities, having surfing at the main core. Currently TPM attends about 70 children from 7 to 17 years old with a team of 8 powerful women and it has several projects. You can read more about [here](https://drive.google.com/file/d/17PxWdPZVDTHwklMzVLqbn_ucQqq-qYFp/view?usp=sharing).

## Why

Maracaípe is one of the main routes for surf competitions in the Northeast region of Brazil and it has a beautiful landscape that attracts tourism and culture around the surf scene, which makes a good oportunity to proliferate Gnars culture thought Include Surf TPM's project. Include Surf has the mission to give children in need the oportunity to stay away from drug traffic by keeping them entertained with surf. It's also a place where they can eat and learn how to read and write in  Portuguese, Spanish and English. However most of these children are illiterate and ended up having to work on the street to bring food to their family. Nevertheless surf is a strong social transformer, providing notions of citizenship to complement school studies and work oportunities.

Unfortunately TPM is going through the toughest financial crisis ever and it might close next year if they don’t find funds in time. Therefore we belive that Gnars has a huge fit with the project and can help some of TPM’s monthly cost. This sponsorship will allow these children to have fun Nounifing TPM, to surf and to learn all about web3 and it's potential with nfts, games and much more. In addition, to better these childrens lifes, nounifing TPM will attract people and companies from Maracaípe and all around Brazil that are interested in helping the NGO.

## How

Surfguru and Play4Change DAO are going to be key partners to proliferate Gnars and educate TPM about web3.

[Surfguru](https://surfguru.com.br/) is the largest wave forecast website of Brazil, it has the largest surfing community of Brazil with 300k passionate users and 2.5M visits per month. Surfguru is also involved in the web3 with the influence of it's business partners [Luiz Hadad](https://ecency.com/hive-141964/@luizhadad/stoked-to-join-gnars-dao) Gnars athlete and [@marinioac](https://www.instagram.com/mari.salles_/) that just got 0.5eth from Lil Sisters and 0.5eth from Nouns BR to sponsor TPM's children. Recently, SG launched [DROP](https://surflimpo.cambiatus.io/invite/5w2AoW), a social currency to motivate and reward beach clean ups and created the [Surfhive Community](https://ecency.com/hive-141964/@luizhadad/stoked-to-join-gnars-dao). Since 2020, SG gives 10% of member's income to help save the oceans. Since 2021, SG have been helping fund some of TPM's activities and supplies, such as workshops on how to repair surfboards, purchasing lycra to protect from UV light, purchasing chocolate for Easter, purchasing presents for Christmas, providing material for beach clean-ups and much more.

 [Here](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1JtMxPWdZ_juMJUnTepK4VWjjpW3us74E/view?usp=share_link) is a video about Surfguru's 2021 impact report.

![](https://i.imgur.com/ZwI7b9B.jpg)


Surfguru will create educational content about Gnars, Lil Nouns, Nouns BR and Nouns, and also will make content about the web3 educational process at TPM and will continue to spread TPM nounified content though it's midia.


We will also count with the support of [Play4change DAO](https://www.play4change.io/) to teach about web3, NFT, games, Nouns DAO and the SubDAOs to TPM’s children and Educators.
Play4Change is an ImpactDAO, that has the mission to create positive impact in the world. Impact DAOs are essentially organizations created to make an impact on issues where society already suffers great losses such as education, health, environment, etc. They aim to drive shared interests, public goods and common needs.

With that in mind, Play4Change will educate 5 multipliers from TPM:
- The basics of web3, exchange, wallet, nft, discord and twitter.
- What is a DAO, subDAOs and CC0. Especially Nouns, Gnars, Lil Nouns, Nouns BR and Lil Sisters.
- How to make money playing games in the blockchain (play2earn games)
- How to post articles on [Surfhive Community](https://ecency.com/hive-141964/@luizhadad/stoked-to-join-gnars-dao) to have an alternative web3 income
- How to transform Nounified drawings and photos into [NFTs](https://campanhas.mercadobitcoin.com.br/metaverso-chapadao)
[
](https://campanhas.mercadobitcoin.com.br/metaverso-chapadao)

This education process will guarantee the Nouns proliferation to be continued in TPM.


# **Gnarly action**

## Budget

We already got 0.5eth from Lil Sisters and 0.5eth from Nouns BR. If we get 2.5eth from Gnars, we will be able to afford the following:

#### 1.75 Eth for TPM
- Fund part of TPM’s monthly cost for 3 months (rent, bills, payrolls, food, educational supplies, surf supplies and transportation)
- Produce all sorts of nounish noogles artwork (stickers, arts and crafts) with TPM’s children to promote Gnars, Lil Sister, Lil Nouns and Nouns BR to the Brazilian community though TPM's and Surfguru's media.
- Organize [Play4change](https://www.play4change.io/) workshops for TPM’s children and educators

#### 0.5 Eth for [@marinioac](https://www.instagram.com/mari.salles_/)
* Manage the funding and the whole project: the content making, the workshops production, the stickers production, artworks production, and the media distribution plan on TPM's and Surfguru's medias, such as Instagram, SG website and twitter. 
* Connect TPM's coordinators, educators and children with web3, twitter spaces, discord, proposals, wallet, trade, NFT, Gnars, Lil Nouns, Lil Sisters, Nouns BR and Play4Change.

#### 0.25 Eth for Surfguru
* Media distribution to +300k users with banners, newsletters, articles and to +30k instagram followers with reels, stories and live with marinioac and Nuala Costa about the experience to be funded by Gnars, Lil Sisters and Nouns BR. All in Portuguese.

## Timeframe (3 months)

### 1st Month - Education and kick off:
- Week 1 - Plan the Nounification of TPM and the education of web3 with TPM, @marinioac and Play4Change
- Week 2 - Fund part of TPM monthly cost, such as bills and educational supplies 
- Week 2 - Make Noggle stickers
- Week 3 and 4 - Organize a workshop with [Play4change](https://www.play4change.io/) for 5 multipliers from TPM about web3, NFT, Nouns, Gnars, Lil Nouns, Lil Sisters and Nouns BR (action continues)

### Month 2 to 3, Deep Nounification:
- Make a lot of gnartwork with the children, such as drawings, arts and crafts with paper and plastic residues to make the noggles during the TPM classes to ware them during the surf activities.

![](https://i.imgur.com/RJRAysA.png)

- Make a big noggle on the sand with sand and another one with surfboars to shoot from above with a drone

![](https://i.imgur.com/tmkZPxB.png)
![](https://i.imgur.com/MkAegqb.png)


- Apply the noggles stickers on surfboards, around the TPM's house and around Maracaípe's town.

![](https://i.imgur.com/rsdCKyT.png)

- Photos and video making of all the activities to post on social medias

### Proliferation strategy:
- Week 1 and 2 - Launch the project to Nounify TPM to the surf community with an article, social media post on instagram and twitter and a newsletter about the whole project to SG users base.
![](https://i.imgur.com/D0Oz0j7.png)
*Surfguru Newsletter*

- Week 3 and 4 - Coverage on social media of the educational process and artwork making with reels and stories. [Here](https://www.instagram.com/p/CkRaVTUjVg4/) is an example of reels.

- Week 5 - Reels and an article about the results of the educational process. [Here](https://surfguru.com.br/conteudo/conheca-o-sistema-que-te-da-em-troca-de-lixo-2022-10-10-27974.html?utm_campaign=2022_10_20_sistema_recy&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RD+Station) is an example of article.

-  Month 2 to 3 - Continue to promote gnarly nounish media (photos, gifs and vídeos) on TPM and Surfguru’s networks, websites and social medias





# **Further Information**

### TPM promotes:

- Social-educative accompaniment 
- Democratization of surf
- New perspectives of life


### Nuala Costa idealizer of TPM

Nuala started her surfing career at the age of 16 in Maracaípe through a social project. She was the first woman to professionally represent the state of Pernambuco in national and international surf championships. She had her surfing career invisibilized, due to racism and class difficulties, unfortunately present in the sport. She lived in Europe for 15 years and when returned found a precarious scenario in the community. Thus, she decided to start a project of surf inclusion, and founded TPM - Todas para o Mar (All to the Sea).


![](https://i.imgur.com/xAbuVGv.png)

_Nuala Costa_



### TPM’s projects and actions

- Include Surf TPM: Since 2016, the project Include Surf from TPM is using surf as a democratization and a social transformation for children in need.
- Surf Day: TPM surfing experience modalities, since 2017 that challenges women, of any age, to new experiences.
- Maraca Surf Festival: Annual women's surf competition event, featuring several TPM surfing experience modalities, since 2017.
- TPM Mangue Woman Project & Suape Forum: Capacity-building for the political and productive organization of fisherwomen, affected by the Suape Industrial Port Complex. Since 2021.
- We all can menstruate: Project started in 2021 in favor of menstrual dignity.
- Covid-19 campaign: Social articulation during the period of social isolation. We distribute more than 1500 food packs, as well as hygiene products, every month 2020-2021 to 250 families in the community.
- Movie production:  Extension project of Include Surf TPM, where the students created and produced a short film.
- Surfboard repair workshop: Extension of the Include Surf TPM project, its objective is to teach how to do maintenance and repairs on surfboards.
- Include-you TPM: Artivist festival for the students of Inclua Surf TPM. It aims to introduce young people to dialogues and socio-educational and artistic experiences.





### Social realities

- Tourism expansion without planning
- Social problems: poverty, unemployment, drugs, prostitution, school dropouts.
- Environmental problems.
- The absence of a sociocultural space results in drug abuse, causing a considerable increase in social problems.
- Illiteracy


[More about TPM](https://drive.google.com/file/d/17PxWdPZVDTHwklMzVLqbn_ucQqq-qYFp/view)


![](https://i.imgur.com/hJf4pL4.png)


_TPM ONG's children_

### TPM in the media:

[Nuala Costa breaks barriers against racism in women's surfing](https://midianinja.org/news/nuala-costa-quebra-barreiras-contra-o-racismo-no-surf-feminino/) - Mídia Ninja

[Activist, resilient and empowered: Nuala Costa | Janaínas: Goddesses of the Sea | OFF Channel](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_L8NeGwfjUw&ab_channel=CanalOFF)



[Surfing and the LGBTQIA+ Community | Interview with Nuala Costa | OFF Channel](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-VJQsgFPLAI&ab_channel=CanalOFF)



[Natural paradise on the outskirts of Pernambuco! | Verão de Boa | OFF Channel](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_-OJixeW06g&ab_channel=CanalOFF)



[Recife: Sorority in Women's Surfing | Marias Tide | OFF Channel
](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wWdWPHi6MIU&ab_channel=CanalOFF)

[Surfing changes the lives of children and women in Maracaípe | Marco Zero Conteúdo](https://www.instagram.com/reel/ChaWInhJSgm/?utm_source=ig_web_copy_link)

proposals.title: Sponsor Raphael Gibson (skateboarding) with 3 ETH
proposals.body:
tl;dr: Seeking a 3 Eth sponsorship for 6 months to fund his activities for GnarsDAO such as: producing nounish content, promoting the DAO, organizing events, and producing merch. 

![Whats-App-Image-2022-11-10-at-12-42-08.jpg](ipfs://bafkreigwlf7gff4d52s5d2mreth3tsunp2tv25dtgsvewitilgbu5vzz3a)
        
## Skate and Entrepreneur Career     
Raphael Gibson is 31 years old and has been skateboarding since he was 12 years old. He spent his adolescence traveling between events and cities in Brazil, getting to know the most different states and habits of Brazil.  
 
![skate.jpg](ipfs://bafkreia2zsooiyp7727wuna4wwu4whhcc6idx64oestrb33m33gsk2sec4)

He skated for some sneaker brands over the years like Nike SB, Ous and New Balance Numeric and had several appearances in big Brazilian video channels, websites and in the main Brazilian skate magazines.
Today he is the founder and head of [Essência Skate](https://www.instagram.com/essenciaskate/) and a skater for [Disturb](https://www.instagram.com/disturbepicapparel/) 

![Whats-App-Image-2022-11-10-at-12-43-10-3.jpg](ipfs://bafkreifg6tufvk4dgvuwira6o577ni5aou3mrp42wpyzyyplfg2vf5sujq)
    
He graduated as B.A. in Advertising and produced two independent videos together with  while in college named "Soul Skatista”. With releases in [2013](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gIQxtFGPrIs&t=32s) and [2017](https://youtu.be/rnL15zgYDKg?t=420) he acted as a skater and filmmaker for both. Both videos were finalists for MIMPI (International Skateboard and Surf Film Festival). In 2018 he skated for [Ruexistência]( https://youtu.be/-cDTE3a87eE) video by Renato Riguetti. 
 
![Whats-App-Image-2022-11-10-at-12-43-11-1.jpg](ipfs://bafkreibgnkcyhyjryxorzdlgo5ztc36ss262gooos44wsy3ia5akahq4sy)
    
In 2015, in the midst of a scenario where there were no skate brands from Rio de Janeiro, he founded Essence. The skateboarding brand is now nationally recognized as one of the most acknowledged of the hood. As the head of the company, he has produced numerous campaigns, collections, and events over the years. Also introduced skateboarders in the skate market, produced their own authorial decks models, and managed new collabs with existing crews from the scene. 
 
![Whats-App-Image-2022-11-10-at-12-43-10-1.jpg](ipfs://QmbeX7T5pdyF1FDV9xizXaAcXXpNYcC5UCe5FMQRTdfaoB)
       
In 2020, he released the brand's first collective video called [PARFUM](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NqTDNRLDacg&t=28s), aired in the main Brazilian street skateboarding media. The video was produced by Gibson and shows footage of several skaters, including himself, performing high level tricks. By the end of the year he is about to release another skate video by brand named “Entorpessencia” and a documentary named “Resistance and Existence in Skate Parks”. Besides these, he will also release a major documentary about the history of XV Square, one of the main skate squares in Brazil, where [Gnars is sponsoring the annual event held in place](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0xb63306dbfe950dd9754d5edcf8f48c6ff9bdd32eeeff4c644cb90c974a3055fa).

![Whats-App-Image-2022-11-10-at-12-43-01.jpg](ipfs://bafkreidve6ubpikgvgbnkdlkobljzyfea7d5iyn3bnfdtvvm4y3k2deyt4)
    
Gibson is currently a regular trader and entered the crypto market in 2017. In 2019 he founded a group named “Jovens Crypto” that aims to help lay people to understand crypto and its dynamics. Opened also 3EC Financial Moves mentorship in 2020, which focuses on scalp trading and identifying market reversals, with its own setup developed over the years.

In 2022 he founded unBLOCK, a company that through technology empowers artists and companies that want to enter on web3. He is the financial operator of the company, which recently launched its genesis collection with the artist Talita Persi. Today, besides unBlock and Essence, he manages his time between filming, skateboarding, events, and the web3 ecosystem as a whole.

## Nounish track record
 
![mosaico-jp1.jpg](ipfs://bafkreidbedc5kvfui76d3hoi5h7rsledatsmmwkdo76tcec2eztdv6cj74)
           
Gibson’s recently organized an event at Providencia Favela at Rio. The “Lil Nouns Festival” was funded by Lil Nouns Prop House and had Essencia, Redley and Becks as partners. 
 
![Whats-App-Image-2022-11-10-at-17-44-49.jpg](ipfs://bafkreieeoahjfvivxd5ncokj55ch2i37sxnq4fv6iw3tjk3qxlecvpjqii)
  
Thus proving his ability to organize events and to connect with partners for Nounish things.
 
![Lil-Nouns-86.jpg](ipfs://bafkreiamprkiwwqnr25rtinttoy3chr5l2gtomzknagq3xwpjbvqmwpmaq)
    
The proposal stands for 6 months of work and aims to strengthen the Rio skaters community bond with Gnars DAO, to proliferate the meme through events and to create some nounish goods as merch and others for the community.

 
![creww.jpg](ipfs://bafkreidaceezk522o3fnwgqrxzfki55fumc4kqlmrxsyk367p2ho4vkzey)
    

[Let's Fucking Skate!](https://twitter.com/3rdeye_crypto/status/1584329078055718913)

proposals.title: Fund the developing of GNARS.HOUSE
proposals.body:
A supercharged governance client for GnarsDAO.

![](https://collectivexyz.notion.site/image/https%3A%2F%2Fs3-us-west-2.amazonaws.com%2Fsecure.notion-static.com%2F3042aafb-198c-4c03-be2c-99f881cf9783%2FScreen_Shot_2022-10-21_at_12.12.38_PM.png?table=block&id=01145f0c-1bc2-4176-9ae9-cc108cb6ebd4&spaceId=67ba971f-6418-4600-bc7c-d9bb38303a0e&width=2000&userId=&cache=v2)

### **Description**

**Why**

A revamped governance platform is necessary to increase participation in governance, make it more fun to read and participate, and enable a seamless transition to on-chain governance when that day comes. 

**What**

House of Nouns ([https://houseofnouns.xyz](https://houseofnouns.xyz/)) received a grant from NounsDAO in the Governance mandate Prop House round, and we'd love to build a revamped solution for Gnars as well.

Gnars House will enable discussion, better data, and crucial member context in order to scale Gnars governance participation to the next level.

## **Deliverables**

[https://gnars.house](https://gnars.house) 

An upgraded version of [https://houseofnouns.wtf](https://houseofnouns.wtf) specifically tailored to GnarsDAO. 

Beyond the killer features from House of Nouns, Gnars House would include the following upgrades:

- Discord ingestion
    - View Discussion from Discord inline on Gnars House
- Proposal templates
    - Easy to use templates to create new proposals for people unfamiliar w/ the Gnars proposal process
    - @gami “Templates are super interesting”:
        - Dropdown to choose one of the following:
            - Make a splash / marketing PR stunt
            - Sponsor me type
            - Do something for my community
- Automatic translation to make it more accessible for LATAM / European etc. residents
    - Some community members expressed interest in automatic translations for proposals, discussion etc.
- Ingest proposal ideas from Discord into a “feelers” section
    - Pull proposals from Discord and include in a Gnars.House feelers section to get more feedback
    - Allow easy graduation by trusted members from “Feeler” stage to official proposal
- Voter companion podcast potential
    - could potentially do a [Prop Talk](https://proptalk.podbean.com/) podcast for Gnars proposals and projects down the line

## **Timeline**

- 1 week: Basic MVP platform launch, ready for live testing and feedback
- 4-5 weeks: Full platform launch, upgrades built out and platform adjusted based on feedback

## **Team**

Will Hay (willhayjr#1802)

Gnars holder, long time crypto hacker and software man

Voting will work through Snapshot and continue to be gas-less.

proposals.title: Scale Up Gnars Jam Sessions Podcast with 3.069 ETH for 3 Months
proposals.body:
This Proposal is coming off a discussion I had with @Gami | UTC+11 about Pumping out more High quality Gnars Jam Sessions Podcasts to supplement all DAO Marketing efforts.

I am proposing to fund my audio team to Join me in the Production, Curation, distribution and Marketing of the Gnars Jam Sessions Podcast.

For the last few weeks since GnarsDAO started hosting our weekly Jam session on The Noun Square, we have been taking that Twitter space audio, editing it and adding some cool intro and outro to make our Podcast. We have been looking for ways we can do more than this for the podcast and we are requesting the DAO can give us this Opportunity to do more with the Podcast
 
![GnarsSessionsPodcast.png](ipfs://QmRX68Gc7YXy8SLq6cyTk3JPZijTWpjE19opBeZ9iJ51t3)
    
What Shall We Do with the 3 ETH

Purpose 
** The current proposal is part of the larger initiative focused on improving internal communication and collaboration between members ** 

As an average Gnars member it is difficult to obtain an efficient overview of who are the other members of the Dao and what are their personal stories. 

At GnArs we believe that improving personal connection between members is fundamental for the long term success of the DAO. 

Having a better understanding of people within the community is important for creating stronger connections which will favor more efficient collaboration over time. 

As a Media Unit of the DAO we believe we can have direct impact on the matter by creating dedicated audio content stream focused On giving voice to Gnars members and bringing to the surface the culture and Spirit of GnarsDAO and 

A dedicated audio content stream , GnArs Jam Session , will be a bi-weekly podcast produced internally

The proposal Is to ask for an initial investment to fund / support a 3 months pilot making sure the initiative can be structured to deliver long term success. 



Success Criterias & Evaluation

Objectives:

Understand better Gnars Members
Improve communication,  engagement  and participation between members 
Improve transparency and clarity about Gnars Culture and Long Term Vision
Exposing gnars culture to non web3, non NFT, non Nounish community

Our Assumptions 

Showcasing GnArs members profiles and stories will increase connection and engagement between members 
Showcasing GnArs members will help GnArsDAO to outline GnArs Identify increasing the potential to gather new engaged members 


Key Goals (Up to 3) 

1. Producing a weekly podcast for the next 3 months 
2. Hosting a conversation with at least 1 Gnars member ( unique )  collecting their profile and stories 
3. Transforming Podcast Content into additional formats to distribute Gnars Jam Session across platforms 

Key Metrics (KPIs)

# of Podcast Produced
# of Listeners 
contribution to new members sign up 

Metric to be set after 1st Team meeting, but as for now we are aiming at 36 Episodes
12 Video Episodes
12 Weekly Updates
12 TNS Gnars Jam Sessions (Twitter Spaces Re-edit + Broadcast)

** Additional impact on overall engagement will be measured , although the framework is not yet ready to be used ** 

Governance & Accountability 

As a team we are going to use Dework to map and monitor actions and tasks related to the development of the initiative.


Weekly updates will be provided to the board 

People involved and Roles ( more people will be included )

@davinoyesigye (Curation, Host & Executive Production)
@alberto_campora (Strategy)
@0xSatori (Distribution & Promotion Strategy)
@greta_gremplin (Podcast Covers)


Expected Roadmap 

Friday 06/11 - Proposal Submission 

Step 1 ( dependent on approval )  : Calendar Creation draft creation and process overview showcase 

Step 2 : Guest Scouting 

Step3 : Guest Outreach 

Step 4 : Calendar Confirmation Season 1 

Step 5 : Production Kick Off 


Time frame : 3 Months 

Budget 

Budget Breakdown (3.069 ETH / Pilot) 

4 Video Interview + Remote Podcast Recording Tool + Video Editing - 0.5 
16 Gnarly Voice overs + Editing - 0.5
2 Audio Engineers - 0.5
Podcast Promo Budget (Clip Editing + Ads) - 0.4
Podcast Covers + Social Media Templates - 0.1 (@greta_gremplin)
Planning, Strategy & Operations/Review -  0.5 (@alberto_campora)
Distribution + Promotion Strategy - 0.5 (@0xsatori)
Transaction fees - 0.069

A Major thank you to Flowable, Satori and Greta Gremplin for accepting to join in on this Test period, hoping we can develop a good system for decentralized media marketing. LFG!

proposals.title: Locals Only- A Short Proposal
proposals.body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/vNxNwca.jpg)

### **Description**

Locals Only will be a 2D animated short to be used as the 5-7 minute pilot episode for the creation of a complete animated series. The show is a TV-14/TV-MA rated comedy based around Duke, Flip, and Cam, three surfer beach bum friends in the fictional, Southern California surf town, Tidal Shores. They spend their days hanging out in their old, beaten up, van parked on their favorite locals only beach, La Playa Del Sol, drinking, smoking, talking shit to shoobies, and of course, tons of surfing.

As artists, we create content in the form of illustrations and animations that provides entertainment to our viewers. We see this as our own personal alternative to creating skate videos, for example, because this is something we are great at and love sharing with the world. Bringing laughter through comic relief and slapstick humor in animation presents itself as a great opportunity to bring a unique perspective to the Gnars community.

### **Tone**

Locals Only features similar humor and animation styles as compared to various shows such as Beavis and Butthead, Family Guy, Rick and Morty, Brickleberry, and Jay and Silent Bob’s Super Groovy Cartoon Movie.

### **Sponsorship**

We are seeking a 7 ETH sponsorship to make one, 5-7 minute short animation of Locals Only. The funding will be used accordingly to ensure all artists, actors, and parties involved are compensated appropriately for their hard work and dedication to the creation of this pilot episode.

Each of the 7 members of the team will receive an equal payment of 0.75 ETH. 50% of the payment will be distributed to each individual upon receiving Gnars sponsorship and the outstanding 50% will be sent out after the animation is complete. From the remaining 1.75 ETH, 0.75 ETH will be held if we need to hire another artist or voice actor. If no further assistance is required, payments will be bumped up to 0.85 ETH per team member. The final 1 ETH will be used exclusively to cover submission fees for the various film festivals we will be submitting to.

### **After the Short**

After the completion of this short, we will be submitting Locals Only to as many animation film festivals as we qualify for in order to be presented to as large of an audience as possible. Along with submitting to the festivals, we will be inquiring to pitch the series concept to various studios in hopes of creating a complete animated series. A variety of episodes have already been discussed for the future series and we truly believe that the sky’s the limit for how many episodes could be created. Our dream would be to have the show as a weekly, episodic narrative, bringing people back on a regular basis to find out what kind of shenanigans our characters will get into next. We also plan to share the animation on YouTube and a variety of other social media platforms to maximize our viewers.

Conversations have already begun about one of the local, Denver skate shops potentially co-screening the Locals Only animation as part of their video premiers. This will not only give us the opportunity to screen our film on a semi-regular basis, but will also expose the Gnars project to a huge community of skateboarders which we believe could be very impactful.

### **What about the Gnars?**

Throughout the Locals Only short, we will be featuring some of our favorite Gnars CC0 artwork in the form of stickers/artwork on the main characters van, graphic tee shirts on characters, surfboard logos, background graffiti, and whatever else we can think of to help get some of the amazing Gnartwork to a whole new audience. With the short being submitted to film festivals around the world while we simultaneously look for series pitch opportunities, many people will be able to see our homages to the Gnars we include in the animation. For our private screenings, we will include the Nounish-Gnars video at the end of our animation to help spread the word of Gnars and answer any questions people might have at that moment. We will also take that intimate opportunity to raffle off some Gnars from our personal collections we have been growing. Aside from presenting the Nounish-Gnars clip during private screenings, we will also include a permanent credit to the Gnars community for the sponsorship for all showings, including the film festivals. If the short does get picked up for a full series by a studio, we pledge to continue to include nods to the Gnars family, where applicable, in the animations in the form of hidden easter eggs, similar to how Bud Lite referenced the "noggles’’ in their 2022 Super Bowl advertisement by hiding them on a painting in the background.

### **The Creators and Locals Only Team**

*Brett a.k.a. Pin.Pusher - Producer, Director, Writer, Animator, Character Designer*
Brett has been creating cartoons for most of his life. He has always been writing stories and coming up with characters for them from a young age, but his artistic career really started in 2016 after moving to Denver, Colorado. Countless street art characters, gallery shows, and murals later, these opportunities have taken Brett around the United States painting murals and doing pop up shows in a handful of different states. Brett returned to college in 2018 in order to pursure his love for cartoons and obtain a degree in 2D Animation. He is now in full swing creating looping animated gifs, writing stories, and creating new characters on a regular basis in hopes of creating a series of his own one day.

*Jake a.k.a. Guts - Director, Writer, Animator, Layout Artist, Background Designer*
A lifelong creator, Jake has explored many mediums in his art career. Starting off young, Jake would draw everything from cartoons and elaborate scenes. These drawings quickly turned into murals and gallery work as an adult. Jake is also the host of his own graffiti/hip hop themed podcast with another season in mind. He has always aspired to be an actor and stand-up comedian. Over the last few years, Jake and Brett have worked on countless collaborative artworks together, both digital and physical works including gif animations, murals, story writing, and canvas paintings.

*Josh a.k.a. Mimer - Composer, Music and Sound Designer/Editor, Storyboard Artist*
Josh is an old school hip hop cat with a background in freight graffiti. He got into graffiti in the early 1990s and fell deeply in love with hip hop culture. He began making and performing his own music in the 2000s and started exploring his canvas paintings around the same time. In 2020, he started pursuing full production, audio formatting, and mastering of a few different music genres along with more recently experimenting with creating his own custom sound effects to assist Brett with some of his past gif animations.

*Alexander Cuenin - Scriptwriter, Animator, Editor, Storyboard Artist*
Alex is a writer, director and animator who got his start making short films when he was young. After studying and making live action films for six years, both personal and professional projects, he then turned to learn 2D animation at the Rocky Mountain College of Art + Design. Alex has edited video essays professionally for the channel “Hello Future Me” (July 2019 - May 2022) and is currently the sole editor and animator for the shows “Tale Foundry” and “Worldsmiths” (since October 2020).

*Greg Cipes - Voice Actor*
Greg is best known for his roles as the voices of Beastboy in Cartoon Network’s “Teen Titans” series and Michaelangelo in Nickelodeon’s “Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles”. Greg has also had plenty of other voice and live action roles in shows and movies such as “Astroboy”, “Fast and the Furious”, Ben 10", and “Star Wars- The Clone Wars”. Aside from being the voice of many popular cartoon characters, Greg is also the co-founder of Bright Moments DAO which is recognized for their CryptoCitizens and being an NFT art gallery pioneering how art is being co-created & co-consumed around the world. More recently, Greg has co-founded the NFTv Network which is looking to bring the power of television creation to the people that enjoy it. Find out more about the NFTv Network here [NFTv Network](https://www.nftvnetwork.com/) and [NFTv Labs](https://nftvlabs.com/home)
Also check out this incredible article [NFTV Web3 TV Network Is “Old School MTV Meets Adult Swim”](https://nftevening.com/nftv-the-web3-tv-network-thats-old-school-mtv-meets-adult-swim/)

*Heath Hyche - Voice Actor*
Heath began his acting career in the mid 1990s appearing on sketch variety comedy shows. This show was titled "Saturday Night Special ‘’ in which he co-starred alongside Roseanne Barr, Kathy Griffin, and Jennifer Coolidge with guest stars who included some of the biggest A-List celebrities in the late 90s. He also worked on a similar show in the 2000s called "Blue Collar TV’’ featuring stand-up comedians, Jeff Foxworthy, Larry the Cable Guy, and Bill Engvall. He also had a small role in "Man on the Moon ‘’ starring Jim Carrey and Danny Devito. Being around these other actors he worked with during his career and having the opportunity to experiment with ideas has helped turn Heath into a specialist of creating characters which he uses to this day in his own stand-up comedy acts.

*Nascha a.k.a RobotFishGirl - Voice Actor*
Nascha has been in the entertainment industry for her entire life. Starting off with commercial roles for Disney and Universal at age three and working for Disney in various roles as she got older. She did everything from performance to administrative work every single year throughout high school. In college, she channeled a lifelong talent for impersonation and language into voice acting. Primarily working in the video game world, she helped bring to life dozens of characters from modded Skyrim companions to World of Warcraft orcs.

***MAY HIRE ADDITIONAL ARTISTS/ACTORS AS NEEDED***

### **The Main Cast**
![](https://i.imgur.com/PQIFnBW.jpg)

Duke - Name homage to Duke Kahanamoku, father of modern surfing. Mid 20s. Born and raised right there by the beach. Duke is fairly tall, has shoulder length dirty blonde hair that is unkept. Blue eyes and fair skin that has been sun tanned. Duke just wants to surf all day and literally doesn’t care about anything else. He has lost almost every job so he gave up even trying to get a real one anymore. Duke usually can’t hold a relationship because surfing always comes before anything, sometimes even before food! Secretly he sings beautifully, but it is very uncommon that it happens. When someone hears his voice, they fall in love with the sound. But he doesn’t give a shit. Duke has weed on his person at all times, even while riding the waves.

Flip - Name homage to Filipe Toledo, Brazilian surfer. Mid 20s. Flip’s family is from Brazil, but he was also born and raised in this small surf town. Physically, he is slightly shorter than Duke. He has olive/tan skin and brown hair which he usually has pulled back into a bun while he surfs. Flip also wears a necklace made from shells. He loves surfing just as much as Duke, but he always wanted something more from his life. He always had a dream of being a talk show host. Usually Flip has an alcoholic drink of different variations in his hand, but he is almost never seen drunk.

Cam - Maybe short for Cameron? No one really knows his origin at all. In fact he doesn’t talk much either. He is their cameraman and the shortest of the three. His brownish-red hair is usually covering his face. When asked a question, he either shrugs, shakes his head or some other indication of his responses. He surfs just as much and also partakes in smoking and drinking, but someone always has to offer it to him. He normally uses an old flash camera, but he recently found a vhs camcorder after some shoobie got drunk at the beach one day not too long ago and was arrested leaving it behind. He is also secretly a closet genius.

### **What’s Next?**

Together we have the full story written for the Locals Only short animation completed and have made final revisions to the script. Initial character designs such as turnarounds and expression sheets are being worked on, as well as background designs. Post-sponsorship, more in depth character breakdowns will be completed. Secondary and background characters, along with storyboards, and final landscape designs will also be completed. At this stage, a theme song will be created. General music and sound effects to be used throughout the short will be mixed. Preliminary vocal recordings will also begin.

Once all those steps are complete, the team will take the storyboard, music, and preliminary vocal recordings to create a test animation before creating the final artwork, adding all the color, fine details, and final sound tracks.

Upon the finalization of the pilot, we will be working further with Greg Cipes, one of our voice actors. Greg has been working at Cartoon Network and Nickelodeon for over 10 years, helping bring to life some of the most beloved cartoon characters and has grown quite the following during this time, over 100k combined between his Twitter and Instagram. He has also been attending Comic Con’s around the country doing panel talks, signing autographs, and taking photos with his many, many fans who cosplay as the characters he has voiced over the years. Aside from him being a voice actor and the co-founder of the well-regarded Bright Moments DAO, Greg is also the founder of the new NFTv Network. This platform is being used to help gain exposure and opportunities for upcoming and established animators in the NFT world and beyond.

We will be more than happy to share the sketches, storyboards, and plenty of other fun behind the scenes things with the Gnars community once the final animation is complete. We don’t want to give away too many spoilers!

If you have any questions at all, please feel free to send me a dm on Twitter [@pin_pusher](https://twitter.com/pin_pusher)

proposals.body:
# Nounify I LOVE XV Event 
    
![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/974312040522989568/1020131564690087997/coletivo.gif)


# About 
I LOVE XV is [ColetivoXV](https://www.instagram.com/coletivoxv/) annual event, it started as a protest by the local skaters is Rio. In 1997 there were no friendly architecture or good skateparks in Rio. The only good place was where the emperor used to live (Praça XV) cause it had european archteture, also as its located in downtown every bus line ended there, therefore in 1997 all the skaters of the city started to meet there until they released a law that forbid Skateboarding and Biclicling in public squares 

After years of protests we got to change the city law and I love XV became the most influent skateboard culture event in Brazil.

+1000 skaters attend to the event which by tradition starts with a huge Skateboarding parade.  



![](https://i.imgur.com/0WPuEbI.png)


The local community started to gather every monday in a place called Circo Voador and then we started a serie of protests along with the GO SKATEBOARDING DAY that would become I LOVE XV event in the future, here is our timeline.

![](https://i.imgur.com/J4QNcvs.png)

Here is a more complete information in our last year presentation deck: 

 https://www.notion.so/coletivoxv/I-LOVE-XV-39cba0ce718040988b15d7839d828d19

Praca Xv is Brazilian LOVE Park, but where Love Park failed we prevailed 


Every year its a struggle to get sponsorship for the event, Brazilian brands suffer with the market and the support we get from the city is always efemerous and we can never rely on. 

Our idea is not only to pay for the event but also build a permanente obstacle in the main spot of Brasil, from this relationship and presence, create and friendly onboarding enviroment to skaters to understand web3, daos, nfts and Gnars Dao

Gnars Dao would become its main sponsor

# Gnarly Actions 

## 1. Build a skatable Noogles in [Praca XV](https://www.google.com/maps/place/Pra%C3%A7a+Quinze+de+Novembro,+20010-010/@-22.9031792,-43.1745803,17z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m5!3m4!1s0x9981e1f89cb249:0xa0b877e8c65313f6!8m2!3d-22.9031842!4d-43.1723916)

Every year we build urban sculpture suitable for common pedestrian use and skatable for skateboarding trick is done by coletivo xv

More than a gazilion people pass through this square cause its the conection between the biggest Rio de Janeiro cities, RIO -> Niterói

Apart of the obstacle we also wanna create

Usually we give away money for tricks and we do traditional best tricks in every obstacle, this time we will also give away some ETH for the skater and for that we are going to create crypto wallets in loco using a tent as described bellow.
