proposals.title: Sponsor the Uganda Bikers Association
proposals.body:
> A malcomzworld proposal
> Sponsored by andygnarhol.eth (Benbodhi)
> [Link to discussion on Discord](https://discord.com/channels/928811922244137020/1024079784608800851)

## TL;DR
Seeking 3 ETH to fund a ride of 225km organised by Uganda Bikers Association. Includes branded gear, fuel, food, accommodation, photography and videography.

---

In Uganda we have a super bike riders community called the Uganda Bikers Association that organises different races and biker escapades through different parts of Uganda every week.

![](https://i.imgur.com/g5iqd0h.png)

On the 11th of november, the bikers in the association are trying to organise a 3 day tour/racing escapade traveling through 3 cities in Uganda where they'll ride over 225km.

![](https://i.imgur.com/QVzXlGH.jpg)

This proposal is seeking funding of 3 ETH for the Riders association tour. The ETH will be allocated as follows:
* **0.5 ETH** - for developing gnarly branded helmets, jackets, shirts and gloves for the riders.
* **1.5 ETH** - for accomodation (rent and meals) during the tour for the riders.
* **0.5 ETH** - for fuel for the riders.
* **0.5 ETH** - video and photography.

**Some samples of what to expect:**

![](https://i.imgur.com/apL7HgD.jpg)
![](https://i.imgur.com/xrta0ra.jpg)
![](https://i.imgur.com/A59mlI8.jpg)

This is one of the moves we are making to build and grow the GnarsAfrica (Gnarfrica) community, starting with Uganda and East Africa.

This grant will have a big impact towards the Uganda Riders Association if the Gnars community sees it fit to grant us this opportunity.

**Links to the Uganda Bikers Association website and socials:**
* Website: https://ugandabikers.org/
* Twitter: https://twitter.com/bikersuganda?lang=en
* Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/centralridersclubug/
* TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@ugandanbikers

### Thank you for your consideration! Stay Gnarly!

proposals.title: Sponsor Haris Housos (skateboarding) with 3 ETH
proposals.body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/mCJpIsC.jpg)
*Photo by [Andy Haroupias](https://www.instagram.com/andy_haroupias/)*

Hey everyone, some of you may know me already but if you don't... My name is Haris Housos or Knowhow92 in the crypto world and this is my sponsor proposal for Gnars.

### [](https://hackmd.io/@knowhow92/SkmEM-AWj#A-few-things-about-me "A-few-things-about-me")A few things about me

I am 29 years old, born and raised in Greece and been skating for more or less 18 years! In 2019 I quit my job to go full-time Web 3. 

I am a full time content creator on Hive blockchain ([my blog](https://peakd.com/@knowhow92)), [Skatehive](https://peakd.com/c/hive-173115) community Founder & Community Manager, investor and Board Member of Gnars DAO.

When I was younger I used to ride for Vans Greece and Propaganda, a greek skateboarding company, been on many skate tours but a few years ago I left all corporate sponsors so I can skate without obligations and rules.

-------------

### [](https://hackmd.io/@knowhow92/SkmEM-AWj#My-work-on-chain "My-work-on-chain")My work on chain

I got involved into crypto back in late 2017 during the previous bull run and oh boi I got REKT haha!

This didn't stop me from exploring the blockchain though and as I dived deeper and deeper I realised that blockchain and crypto is the answer to SO MANY existing problems so I started building on it.

I founded "[Skatehive](https://peakd.com/c/hive-173115)", a community on Hive blockchain where skateboarders get rewarded with crypto and later down the road I met Vlad, Daryl and web-gnar and built skatehive into what it is today, a global skate community with people from all walks of life.

-   *[discord.gg/skatehive](http://discord.gg/skatehive)*

Since then we organized many contests like this HUGE online [Game of S.K.A.T.E](https://peakd.com/hive-173115/@skatehive/skatehive-x-lbry-cyber-game-of-s-k-a-t-e-contest-registrations-are-open), [giveaways](https://peakd.com/hive-173115/@howweroll/dollar50-hive-giveaway-how-daryl-rolls), [events](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0CleCnNLc4M), help community members with [medical bills](https://peakd.com/hive-173115/@skatehive/update-donations-for-mr-danilo-more-than-dollar400-raised-and-we-keep-going) and educate skaters on how to buy new equipment through the crypto they earn for posting their content inside our community.

*[The Origins Of Skatehive](https://peakd.com/hive-173115/@knowhow92/the-origins-of-skatehive-skateboarding-community)*

You can pretty much say I'm a "crypto-holic" and always on the look our for new opportunities involving blockchain.

-------------

### [](https://hackmd.io/@knowhow92/SkmEM-AWj#Gnars-Sponsorship-proposal "Gnars-Sponsorship-proposal")Gnars Sponsorship proposal

Like most athletes, I ask 3 ETH for 6 months (one time paid or 0.5 ETH monthly, don't mind). I will deliver GNARly content on a regular basis on both Web 2 (IG,Twitter) and Web 3 (Hive,Publish0x) social media, represent GNARS everywhere by wearing GNARS merch and film a GNARS'ly video part by travelling all around Greece/Balkans while onboarding people in our community at the same time.

**3 ETH = Around 4k**

- **1k to Pay my bills and expenses for the next 6 months**

*A dude's got to survive right? Hehehe! As a full-time content creator, having a few more $$ in my wallet means I don't have to hustle extra-hard with content so I will be able to skate more and worry less about paying my bills.*

- **2k for Travelling/filmer expenses for the upcoming GNARS'ly video part**

*I am currently working with 2 filmers, [Andy Haroupias](https://www.instagram.com/andy_haroupias/) and Mpiltzi (no social). Andy works with HD footage and Mpiltzi with OG [VX crispy one](https://www.skatehype.com/v/crispy-street-clips-ioannina-city-ftr-crew/13850.htm)!*

*My GNARS'ly video part will be exclusively filmed by Andy in HD but I will also try to deliver a few crispy edits in interlaced footage with my homie Mpiltzi.*

*These 2k will be spent on paying Andy, gas and hotels while I'm travelling, buying boards, shoes, GNARS merch from the official store and anything else I need/will need for my filming missions.*

- **1k for My work for Gnars Dao**

*I am already running [Gnars Hive account](https://peakd.com/@gnars), earned Gnars Hive account more than 30$ worth of [Hive](https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/hive) in less than 1 week, promoting Gnars to skateboarders and investors on Hive and am down to help with anything community related needed.*

-----------

### Let's get GNARLY

I find GNARS an excellent project full of like-minded people so I'd love to be a part of your athletes squad, homies! Even though Greece is small the internet is vast and web 3 social my playground so expect some sweet GNARS promo!

My social

-   [My Blog](https://peakd.com/@knowhow92)
-   [Twitter](https://twitter.com/theocharis_ch)
-   [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/haris_housos/)

Some of my latest projects

- *[Haris Housos 'Knowhow to play' part](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tuA-_EQDbng)*
- *[Haris Housos "Rollin Above Talking"](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=75jYOR5Bd_M)*
- *[untitled street | FTR CREW](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RtokVUC61HQ)*
- *[fTR:Light Me Up](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WvVT9Dr6RDQ)*

Cheers everyone and thanks in advance for the love and support

proposals.title: Sponsor Luiz Hadad (surfing) with 3 ETH
proposals.body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/YE6Yae7.png)

## About me

Aloha guys, I am Luiz Hadad, brazilian, 33 years old, surf since I was a little kid and have been on the blockchain world since 2017, working as a community builder in different projects, such as cambiatus.com. 

I am a partner at www.surfguru.com.br , Brazil's biggest online surfing community and forecast website, with 300k unique users and 2.5M visits per month. I lead the web3 movement there and we recently launched a social currency to [help clean our beaches](https://surflimpo.cambiatus.io/invite/5w2AoW).

When I got into crypto, I was able to get flexible working hours and dedicate myself to my biggest passion: spend time in the ocean chasing swells and surfing big barrels - as you can see on my [instagram](https://www.instagram.com/luizhadad).

![](https://i.imgur.com/cKtnaq3.jpg)

I live in Espirito Santo, a brazilian state with heaps of different slabs - they are the gnarlier types of waves: heavy, fast, hollow and shallow. In front of my house we have 7 different types of slabs - waves that break in different conditions. 

One of them is called Avalanche - probably Latin America's heaviest slab - this wave used to be a myth when I was a teenager, and became popular around 2016 when people started using jet skis to surf it (tow-in). This wave breaks at about 3km from the coast - and you can see it from my apartment.

![](https://i.imgur.com/xLLKVBq.png)

This [video shows](https://www.instagram.com/p/CdorBROL8m3/?igshid=YmMyMTA2M2Y=) my first avalanche wipeout touching the rocks, it was a heavy one.

Last year I became the first surfer to be accepted as a member of the [NXF Bodyboard](https://instagram.com/nxfbodyboard) collective, a crew of heavy wave hunters. 

We're constantly surfing slabs and creating content about it. In april this year we created our [first NFT collection](https://madnfts.io/creator/nxf-bodyboard/) to experiment and learn how we could engage with web3 communities to support our movement.

We were the first ones to register an epic session in a new slab this season, called 2012

> [Watch "2012" Baixa do Navio Fantasma - NXFTv Episódio #5](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=A5LPvqm3mcQ)

We also hosted meetups about NFTs and big wave surfing, getting in touch with the community, sharing our experiences and learning from their feedback.

![](https://i.imgur.com/5WfXBiz.jpg)

[NXF Instagram](https://instagram.com/nxfbodyboard) | [NXF Youtube channel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCtWEVMmxUuoRXPm8w4ZFlhQ)

Apart from the slabs, we also have Regencia, a great place to get barrels that is only 2 hours away from Vila Velha (my city). I love spending time there.

![](https://i.imgur.com/4QbY9EQ.png)

When the surf season is off in Espirito Santo (from november until march), we have the fishing season. Fishing can become pretty radical when you catch  marlins.

We catch and release them, and it's pretty radical to take them for a swim before the release.

![](https://i.imgur.com/irccKMC.png)

During the off-season, I also like travelling to places like Fernando de Noronha, aka as "Brazilian Hawaii" to get some blue barrels.

![](https://i.imgur.com/jTtnOAI.jpg)

## Web3 community building

I've been involved in blockchain conferences since 2018. I've helped organize few of them, and I am constantly speaking at events. 

It would be awesome to spread the word about gnars and help our community grow.

I helped organize Ethereum Rio 2022 and Ethereum SP 2022.

> [Watch Ethereum Rio 2022 | Tools to build desirable futures](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SD1c1ms8Pl0)

This year I was the [opening speaker at Ethereum Rio](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SD1c1ms8Pl0). I spoke how we could use web3 tools to build desirable futures.

I spoke in two meetups related to NFTs and big wave surfing, organized with the NXF crew.

I was also a panelist about impact DAOs in the Blockchain Rio Festival

![](https://i.imgur.com/TKk63n8.jpg)

I love to participate in beach cleanup events - and I am currently working with some projects that reward people with crypto to engage more volunteers.

![](https://i.imgur.com/8PN18f8.jpg)

## Sponsorship proposal

I'd love to become a gnars athlete and ambassador. I think 3 ETH for 6 months is a nice way to start - hope we can build a long term relationship.

My focus will be on producing content and representing gnars in different events - from beach cleanups to web3 events.

Surfguru.com.br will also be a partner in this iniciative, sharing news, reposting content on social media, and raising awareness about gnars in any other ways we can think about.

I'll get stickers to put on my board and all the other avaliable merch to represent gnars anywhere I go.

Cheers!

Thanks @VladHZC for helping me review the proposal and for introducing me to the gnars community!

![](https://i.imgur.com/1oEPgyq.png)
proposals.author: 0x73222225044cE0FC672Ff9b6F9730D0a0421382C

proposals.title: Nounifying Brazil and Web3 Workshops in communities of Rio de Janeiro
proposals.body:
> Should we as Gnars DAO submit this proposal to Nouns DAO?

Nounify the skate lane in the Gigoia Island community and onboard 120 teenagers – from 11 to 14 years old – to web3 at the *[Skate Cuida Institute](https://www.instagram.com/skatecuida/?hl=pt)* - both in Rio de Janeiro.

**Why?**

According to [Statista](https://www.statista.com/), **Brazil is the 2nd country with the most people using NFTs (5M users).**

![](https://i.imgur.com/d7fhQsI.png)

Rio de Janeiro stands out as a crypto hub. In June, the 1st international NFT event in Brazil took place in the city. Gathering renowned Brazilian artists, collections of different styles and lectures about web3, NFTs and DAOs, NFT Rio showed the potential of the Brazilian market.

The Nouns DAO featured as one of the main collections during the event. [After the approval of proposal 98](https://nouns.wtf/vote/98), [@beautyandpunk](https://twitter.com/beautyandpunk), [@leoclark](https://twitter.com/leoclark) and [@fabioseva](https://twitter.com/fabioseva) did a great job spreading the noun culture at the conference. We want to further develop this work.

![](https://i.imgur.com/mohS5HA.png)

For this, the plan is to:
## 1) Promote 4 educational workshops about web3 in Gigoia Island, Rio de Janeiro/RJ.

![](https://i.imgur.com/x4A8LV0.png)
*Bob Burnquist with the teenagers from the Skate Cuida Institute*

The workshops are divided in 4 stages:
**a) Wallets and tokens:** first, a “magic trick” makes money disappear… and reappear inside the pocket of an attendee. The instructor explains what are “the secret crypto words”, how they can “control magic internet money”, and how anyone - even kids - can earn, use or store such money.

**b) NFTs:** the instructor shows attendees how digital wallets can hold other digital stuff. A series of these valuable things have been scattered through the Skate Cuida Institute (QR codes linking to a minting page). A treasure hunt leads attendees to earn their first NFTs.

**c) DAO:** the instructor shows a site where they can use their NFTs as tickets to join a club. He tells them there is a proposal there where they can vote for a prize that will be distributed either to half the “club”… or to all of its members - depending on how they vote it. The instructor reveals the results (awarding a prize in crypto to every participant) and teaches basic concepts in cooperation and game theory. He tells the audience the workshop was sponsored by a “club”, too - NounsDAO - that collaborates online to do cool stuff in the real world. And incites attendees they can do the same via the club they now belong to.

**d) Skate & Lunch:** to wrap things up, Bob Burnquist invites the kids for a ride on the Institute’s track, then **food and drinks** are served for all.

We plan to bring 30 kids in each workshop. The goal is to **introduce 120 people to crypto and NFTs** via Nouns DAO.

The end goal is to find a format ([presentation here](https://www.canva.com/design/DAFHzoOmwAE/OhifeRzHPUSLD7X1YLORVQ/view?utm_content=DAFHzoOmwAE&utm_campaign=designshare&utm_medium=link&utm_source=publishpresent)) that can be replicated in other communities in a cost-effective way.

**The workshops will be conducted by guiriba, a member of Paradigma Education**. Paradigma is a crypto research house in Brazil with experience ranging from [materials for beginners](https://paradigma.docsend.com/view/vzysv4pg3evfqry9) to courses to [analysis for experts.](https://app.paradigma.education/feed/post/view?id=kru2M8m98ePrweKAjXeu)

## 2) Nounify the skateboard track of Gigoia Island, Rio de Janeiro/RJ.

![](https://i.imgur.com/5iJAROf.png)

***Left:** [Bob Burnquist at the skate park](https://oglobo.globo.com/rio/bairros/niteroi/noticia/2022/06/bob-burnquist-leva-projeto-social-para-o-caramujo-em-niteroi.ghtml). Right: the Brazilian version of Skater Noun was created by [Ozzz](https://twitter.com/ozzzmabro), member of the [Mafriends](https://twitter.com/MafriendsArt) collective.*

While the workshop takes place, Nouns artwork by Brazilian artists will be painted at the Skate Cuida Institute, where classes are taught by Bob Burnquist.
We will bring a film crew and later deliver a clip registering the workshops and painting action.

## 3) Make a donation to the Skate Cuida Institute.

Purchase 3 VR headsets and 3 notebooks for the institute, to support the 4 weekly encounters currently held there, where kids receive cognitive training, skateboarding lessons, food and a safe space to play.

### What is the Skate Cuida Institute and who is Bob Burnquist?

Bob Burnquist is the greatest X-Games winner in history.

A Brazilian skateboarder & ex-videogame star, he now  aims to empower unprivileged communities through sports, education and technology.

Skate Cuida Institute is a place in Rio with modest infrastructure where Bob and his team receive dozens of youngsters a week to study and skate together.

Bob is also avowedly a crypto-native. In 2021, he launched his first NFT collection, [Burnquist Gold.](https://twitter.com/bobburnquist/status/1446965292836524039) A fan of the Tezos blockchain, Bob has also experimented with Ethereum.

![](https://i.imgur.com/5hWMyOY.png)

Source: [Viva o Rio.](http://vivario.org.br/bob-burnquist-oferece-oficina-de-skate-no-parque-esportivo-e-social-do-caramujo/)

### **What is the motivation for Nouns DAO to fund the proposal?**

1) To foster web3 proficiency among teenagers from Rio de Janeiro communities.
2) To bring Nouns culture to young people having their first contact with the world of NFTs.
3) To seek media exposure in newspapers like O Globo, with [more than 25M readers and 185M monthly views](https://oglobo.globo.com/politica/o-globo-foi-jornal-mais-lido-do-pais-em-2021-25376960); and social media like that of Bob Burnquist, who has more than [160K followers on Twitter](https://twitter.com/bobburnquist) and [770K on Instagram.](https://www.instagram.com/bobburnquist/)
4) Create a cc0 educational material for communities around the world, allowing anyone to translate it and use it to teach web3 to children using Nouns.

### **How much will the action cost?**
**1) 3.5 ETH for the web3 educational program at the Skate Cuida Institute.**
 
- 1.2 ETH: airdrops for the attendees during the 4 workshops (120 x 0.01 ETH per person). The amount in ETH sent to the teens will be done via Polygon. A local business will be on the location, selling snacks and accepting crypto as payment.
- 2.3 ETH: event expenses:
	- 1 ETH for instructor’s transport and accommodation: will be 4 weeks traveling from Minas Gerais to Rio de Janeiro. He will travel to Rio de Janeiro every week, just to give the workshops.
	- 1 ETH for to organize breakfast, lunch, and afternoon coffee for the teenagers to spend the day at the Skate Cuida Institute
	- 0.3 ETH for the costs of printing QR Codes on the skateboard track.
	- 0.7 ETH for to pay the instructor in charge of workshops.

**2) 3 ETH for the artistic initiative.**

- 1 ETH: The money will be used to pay Brazilian artists who will create Brazilian versions of the Nouns. 0.2 ETH will be paid to each of the chosen artists, making it possible to create 5 unique arts. One of them is already created.
- 1 ETH: destined to purchase the materials used in the painting
- 1 ETH: to the artist responsible for painting the Noun on the institute’s skate track. In each of the workshops he will be present, nounifying the skateboard track of the Skate Cuida Institute with the artists’ designs.

**3) Donation of 4 ETH to the Skate Cuida Institute.**
- 1 ETH: for maintenance of the skateboard track at the Institute while the workshops are happening.
- 3 ETH: equipment to encourage teenagers to [learn about web3:](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UDuKAded86Y)
	- 3x AR Oculus Quest 2 (to introduce concepts of virtual worlds more easily and foster the creation of 3D art).
	- 3x Notebook [Ideapad 3i:](https://www.kabum.com.br/produto/254192/notebook-lenovo-ultrafino-ideapad-3i-intel-core-i3-10110u-4gb-ssd-256gb-windows-11-15-6-prata-82bs000jbr?gclid=CjwKCAjwrNmWBhA4EiwAHbjEQI7OaPM7XOhSlqUKD_bRjiN5Pf-8Ty16Ulmszeq3mRP6yCQZvgTZWxoCft0QAvD_BwE) to allow the classes that already take place at the institute to handle more students per lesson.

**4) 2 ETH for film crew to cover the workshop and further publicize the initiative.**

Therefore, **we require 12.5 ETH** for the execution of all the actions listed above.

proposals.title: Migrate SEO content from art.haus to gnars.com
proposals.body:
![image](ipfs://bafkreiaqavduqreiqmhkfk2qmi5jorcoqvyc74hdzytmorbv3ioapdct74)
    
I'm proposing to migrate all NFT specific SEO articles from `art.haus` to `gnars.com`. 

The motivation behind doing so is for **Gnars** to get the exposure of approximately 1 million yearly search appearances. 

Doing so involves exporting, importing and '301 redirects' which inform Google of the changes so they can adjust their search index accordingly.

I'd also like to follow on from this with a weekly article targeting SEO opportunities we uncover through tools such as SEMRush.com (separate proposal).

Based on AdWords paid keyword data, the organic clicks generated so far would have cost between $40k and $50k. 

I was planning on rebranding ART HAUS to NOUN HAUS, but since Gnars is my focus...

**Here's the plan:**

- Migrate all existing content
- Rewrite gnarticles where required
- Do all associated 301 redirects
- Google console updates

**Here's the value:**

- $50k for organic google search presence
- $3k for the associated labour to migrate
- $2k for the required content re-writing

*Approx: $55k / 37 ETH*

**Here's the ask:**

- $5k for search presence
- $2k for migration labour
- $1k for content rewrites

***Approx: 5 ETH***

*Note: Heavily discounted as I'd like to mostly gift the organic search presence to helping Gnars gain exposure.*

*Reference: https://art.haus/blog*

proposals.title: 2.5 ETH to Uganda Skateboarding Society for OTG activation
proposals.body:
A davinoyesigye proposal sponsored by shredthegnar.eth

![F4E13865-18BC-4EFC-8174-075F114156C0.jpeg](ipfs://bafkreih43l2gti27dmrbxpl7ni7x3cbotj2e5e2s5wbeqi2si7ljrp2v7i)

Hey Gnarlers, I’d like to Donate to the Ugandan Skateboarding Association: https://www.ugandaskateboardsociety.org/.

I’m seeking 2.5ETH for a donation to Uganda Skateboarding Association. This Donation is going to help our team do an OTG launch of GnarsDAO in our local skate scene here in Uganda.

1.5 ETH is to be used to purchase Skateboards, Fingerboards, Tshirts and any other gnarsDAO Merch that we shall distribute to the skateboarding society of Uganda (NOTE: Gnars street wear branded merch will be sourced from trusted gnars merch suppliers where possible)

0.5 ETH will be used for shipping and import duty tax clearance to get this Merch into Uganda.

Then we shall oversee an On Ground Marketing activation across the 2 mini skateparks in Uganda. 

We shall use 0.5ETH to do this Marketing run (Printing Stickers, Posters, Digital Billboards and Press Conference costs) with the Local sports conference aimed at attracting Sports community to the gnarsDAO (Major Local sports news networks)

We noted that once this OTG activation is successfully done, we shall use the Media coverage to launch a GnarsDAO streetwear shoe. Where Buy 1 and 1 is donated to skateboarders in Africa.. This will be done in collaboration with Lil Nouns or Nouns. This will be discussed after the initial OTG activation and feedback.

What we hope to achieve with this prop.
1. Launch of gnarsDAO Africa (As a Gnars on the ground community)
2. Create a market for GnarsDAO streetwear through Gnars fingerboards and Merch
3. OTG work for GnarsDAO shoes and streetwear
4. Get new athletes & artists into the DAO

Here are some of The socials:
https://www.facebook.com/SocietySkateboardingUganda
https://twitter.com/uganda_sk8bding
https://www.instagram.com/ugandaskateboardsociety/
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC_t0bnpXIPR73eZOgV-cYKg/featured

Thank you for your consideration!

If you have any questions or reservations, please reach out on Discord here:
https://discord.com/channels/928811922244137020/1004450678493679676

🤘⌐◨-◨ 🤘

proposals.title: Dave Bachinsky x Kevin Kowalski @ NFT NYC with Nounish and Gnars DAO
proposals.body:
![image](ipfs://QmTkzpfa966YmNQjXdNgbZztAZEGFGCCUnwE8dQeNv3ini)
 
An awesome opportunity has presented itself, but we gotta be quick as it's time sensitive. I have funded personally and this prop is for reimbursement.

## TLDR:

- Two legendary skateboarding pros
- Join Gnars DAO as NFT NYC special guests
- Billboard viewing during Time Square road closure
- Go Skateboarding Day sesh at LES Coleman Skatepark
- Shoot with Nounish film crew (Nouns DAO funded)

## Schedule:

Tuesday 21st June 2022

- 8:30am Times Square road closure for billboard viewing
- 9:30am Make our way down to LES Coleman Skatepark
- 10:30am Go Skateboarding Day x Gnars DAO meetup
- 11:00am Nounish film crew will capture the vibes
- 1:30pm Head back to NFT NYC with crew, or
- 3:00pm Hang with The Skatepark Project

## Costs:

- 2 x domestic flights for Dave Bachinsky and Kevin Kowalski
- 2 x nights accommodation at an NYC hotel twin double room
- Small amount to cover Uber trips and any other incidentals

To get in quick before flights and accommodation are too expensive, this proposal is to reimburse 0xigami.eth a total of 3 ETH already sent to Dave here:

https://etherscan.io/tx/0xf85825c52084d57ebdb905a293663861b961f005f0ecf4f0faa9be433cba5e75

And an additional 0.5 ETH to cover sticker and merch printing in lead up.

**Requesting 3.5 ETH total.**

For anyone unfamiliar...

- Dave: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SR02gR-G1ok
- Kevin: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1uvPK1kDDy0

Flights and accommodation are being booked directly with ETH, thanks to [Travala.com](https://travala.com) and [Bitrefill.com](https://bitrefill.com) for their services.

Hope to see you there!

proposals.title: Send gnars.eth 0.1 ETH as test proposal
proposals.body: This is a test proposal to make sure the [Zodiac Reality Module integration](https://gnosis.github.io/zodiac/docs/tutorial-module-reality/get-started/) from our [Snapshot space](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth) works with our [Gnosis Safe](https://gnosis-safe.io/app/eth:0x0658f4eD17289144717713ADfFC2539eF7c2EF8e/) correctly [as proposed for Gnars DAO](https://discourse.nouns.wtf/t/proposal-gnars-x-nouns-athletes/858#gnars-dao-3).
proposals.author: 0x73222225044cE0FC672Ff9b6F9730D0a0421382C
